title: Clear Advice. Confident Decisions. Aaron Mok Senior Investment Advisor; Wealth has a way of getting more complicated before it gets easier. There may be a business to run and transition, a portfolio to manage and grow, a family to protect, a tax bill to minimize, and a legacy to plan. Each one adds another layer of decisions that don't exist in isolation. Together, they create complexity that's easy to underestimate and expensive to get wrong. I've spent over 15 years working with business owners, professionals, new Canadians, and families at major crossroads. I believe I can help them as an advisor who strives to understand their full picture, not just their portfolio. Here's something I've noticed: high-net-worth clients may carry more financial anxiety than people with far less. Not about bills. Not about retirement. About legacy, complexity, and whether their wealth is actually working for the life they want. That's the work I care about. I also hold advanced designations in financial planning, investment and wealth management. I'm completing the CFA designation at the final level, and where your situation calls for it, I bring in TD specialists so every part of your plan works together. I am fluent in English and Cantonese.; Senior Investment Advisor

title: Senior Investment Advisor; Clarity · Conviction · Consistency · Communication These principles are at the core of Adam Oberman’s approach to wealth management and client service. With over 20 years at TD Wealth Private Investment Advice, Adam holds FCSI®, CIM®, Options Licensing, and a Certificate in Retirement Strategy. As a former TD Wealth Branch Manager, Adam has led and mentored a team of successful advisors, enhancing his leadership and financial expertise. Adam specializes in total wealth planning—a comprehensive approach that combines Investment Management with Retirement Planning, Insurance Solutions, Will and Estate Planning, Tax Strategy, and Legacy Creation, engaging TD specialists where needed. By integrating these complementary components, Adam delivers tailored strategies that help build, grow, and preserve wealth for generations. Adam is a Life Insurance Advisor with TD Wealth Insurance Services. Supported by a team fluent in English, Mandarin, and Cantonese, Adam delivers clear, personalized advice tailored to every client’s needs. Based in Vaughan with his wife, Gloria, and their three sons, Adam enjoys skiing, hiking, and traveling to explore new cultures.

title: Senior Investment Advisor; As an Investment Advisor with TD Wealth Private Investment Advice (TD Wealth) I can assist clients in all aspects of wealth management, engaging TD Specialists as needed. I provide investment strategies and navigate individual and corporate investors through investment and financial planning decisions. I have been an advisor with TD Wealth since 2006. I have a Bachelor degree in Economics from the University of Victoria, and a Master of Business Administration from Queen's University. I also hold the Certified Financial Planner (CFP) designation and I am a Life Insurance Advisor with TD Wealth Insurance Services. With my investment experience and education, I develop comprehensive and diversified investment portfolios to participate in market gains while helping reduce downside risk and taxes. Additionally, I ensure all clients have a detailed financial plan which is then used as a blueprint to develop the investment strategy. The financial plan can focus on such areas as retirement planning strategies, estate planning strategies, Insurance strategies, education funding and business succession planning strategies. My commitment is to build long-term relationships with my clients by providing regular communication and sound investment advice. Ultimately, my goal is to help my clients achieve financial security.; TD Wealth Specialists work with your family and, when required, tax and legal advisors, to answer questions about: • Wills, trusts, and estates • Executor and trustee services • Strategies to balance your priorities and charitable goals; Empowering Polly to achieve financial success When Polly moved to Canada, she was determined to build a great life for her family. title: Investment Advisor; I have been working in the investment industry helping advise families for over fifteen years and have worked in banking close to twenty years. title: Investment Advisor; As an Investment Advisor at TD Wealth Private Investment Advice, I have been providing comprehensive wealth management advice and solutions to individuals, small business owners and their families since 1996. I work with my clients to create customized, personalized wealth and retirement plans to build and protect their financial futures. The cornerstone of my business is one on one relationships with each client, based on trust, communication and a detailed understanding of their needs. By working in partnership with a team of specialists within TD Bank Group, I address the full scope of investment, wealth and retirement needs, including wealth protection and insurance solutions, estate planning and trust services and charitable giving strategies. I obtained my degree from York University, with a focus on finance. I hold key designations such as the Professional Financial Planner (PFP) and Certified Investment Manager (CIM). I am licensed in Life, Accident & Sickness and Disability Insurance as well. Outside of the office I am an avid supporter of several charitable organizations in my community. title: Portfolio Manager; Senior Investment Advisor; Alain’s 25 years of experience in wealth management provide him the insight and the reflexes to identify strategies and solutions for each client, whether their situation is simple or more complex. He understands the challenges clients may face when dealing with multiple advisors and his knowledge and experience allows him to integrate their advice into a coordinated strategy. Developing his expertise has always been a priority for Alain. After completing a Bachelor’s in Accounting and obtaining his CPA designation, he migrated into wealth management and obtained his Financial Planner’s designation. He then obtained the Chartered Investment Manager designation allowing Alain and his team to provide discretionary portfolio management to his clients. Alain has spent many years helping our industry evolve from primarily delivering investment advice to taking a much broader wealth management approach including retirement planning, tax strategies, risk management and estate planning strategies. Alain was born and raised in Montreal where he now lives with his wife and children. He is passionate about maintaining an active lifestyle that includes, tennis, cycling and skiing.; For more information please visit The Kamel Advisory Group

title: Senior Investment Advisor; Why I do what I do To be entrusted with the responsibility of guiding clients towards their wealth planning destination is perhaps one of the most challenging and yet rewarding experiences. When growing up, I realized very quickly that regardless of education and economic background, money is not a topic that was widely discussed within family or personal relationships. Our education system produced doctors, engineers, lawyers and other professions that teach people how to earn a living yet very little was taught as to how personal finance – specifically how money works. As a result, I witnessed many smart and hardworking people making financial mistakes or trust the wrong people with their finances. This has led to lifelong passion and mission of helping others realize their financial security. How do we do what we do? Our advisory team consists of Investment Advisors who engage with TD specialists such as Financial Planners, Private Bankers, as well as Estate Planning specialists. We work with families, business owners and organizations to create a financial road map and guide them step by step towards their financial goals. Our connections to the community … I support local and global organizations that make a positive impact in the world we live in. It's with that spirit that we support charitable organizations in the London community as well as global non-governmental organizations. I have volunteered and served on numerous Boards and committees locally and with overseas missions. Outside of my business, my family and I enjoy travelling and culinary experiences.; TD Wealth Specialists work with your family and, when required, tax and legal advisors, to answer questions about: • Wills, trusts, and estates • Executor and trustee services • Strategies to balance your priorities and charitable goals

Alex’s education, combined with his experience in Global Private Banking give him a unique perspective that resonates with High Net Worth families, professionals and business owners. title: Senior Portfolio Manager; As Senior Portfolio Manager for the Ottawa Wealth Advisory Group, Alex leads the team’s investment strategy and portfolio management platforms. He strives to astutely select investments to help create a suite of proprietary model portfolios that we can leverage to address each client’s individual goals, objectives and risk tolerance parameters. Alex brings a key differentiating factor to our team – he is qualified to offer discretionary portfolio management for clients who opt to entrust their day-to-day investment decisions to him. Discretionary services empower Alex to take swift action on opportunities or downturns without waiting to receive permission from clients. This also keeps conversations centered on big-picture goals rather than individual trades. In addition to his role as our team’s Chief Investment Strategist, Alex also applies his extensive experience advising individuals and corporations and maintaining client relationships with dedication. Alex graduated from Santa Clara University in Silicon Valley and joined TD Wealth in 2003. He helmed his own investment group for 11 years before teaming up with Chris Martin and Dan Soublière to create the Ottawa Wealth Advisory Group. Alex holds the Chartered Financial Analyst (CFA) designation and belongs to the CFA Society of Ottawa. The CFA designation is considered the gold standard of financial designations by The Economist (February 2005) and the investment industry at large. CFA charterholders adhere to rigorous standards of ethics, transparency and continuing education. On a personal level, Alex enjoys coaching little league baseball and minor league hockey, as well as spending time outdoors with his wife and their three young children.; TD Wealth Specialists work with your family and, when required, tax and legal advisors, to answer questions about: • Wills, trusts, and estates • Executor and trustee services • Strategies to balance your priorities and charitable goals; Empowering Polly to achieve financial success When Polly moved to Canada, she was determined to build a great life for her family. title: Investment Advisor; Allison is an accomplished private wealth management professional with over 20 years of experience, holding the Certified Financial Planner (CFP®) and Chartered Investment Manager (CIM®) designations. She works closely with individuals and families to help them build, preserve, and transfer wealth with confidence. Her areas of focus include comprehensive financial planning, investment planning, tax-efficient strategies, and estate planning strategies, delivered through a disciplined and personalized approach. Allison came to Canada to pursue a master's degree in accounting and began her professional journey without family support locally. Through determination, resilience, and professional excellence, she successfully established herself in Canada. This personal experience gives her a deep, first-hand understanding of the challenges faced by newcomers, as well as the importance of thoughtful wealth accumulation and long-term financial management in achieving stability and success in a new country. Allison is committed to professionalism, discretion, and long-term perspective. She takes the time to understand each client’s values, goals, and family dynamics. She provides tailored strategies designed to support financial clarity and confidence across generations. Outside of her professional practice, Allison enjoys painting, traveling, and maintaining an active lifestyle. title: Senior Investment Advisor; Alyssa Krahn is a community-oriented, seasoned Investment Advisor with TD Wealth Private Investment Advice. She lives in Sherwood Park with her young family. Alyssa has strong ties to her community with many of her clients also living in Sherwood Park. Alyssa is passionate about the importance of having a plan and weaves this into her deep discovery process of learning all about her clients' families, lifestyle, goals, and the values that influence their decision-making. But it doesn't end with a plan on paper – Alyssa collaborates with a team of TD Specialists to bring each client's unique plan to life. This often includes specialized tax, insurance and estate planning concerns, each so important to the legacies her clients want to leave for their loved ones. She has an additional focus on educating single women to ensure they're aware of their financial options and strategically grow their wealth, using a disciplined approach. She firmly believes that having a plan in place empowers her clients to feel confident in their ability to achieve the future they envision. She finds that retirement planning tends to be top of mind for many of her clients. She has a major focus on helping them transition from a wealth accumulation phase to creating a monthly income stream to fund the retirement lifestyle they desire. She truly cares about being there for her clients through all of life's stages and challenges. She is openly transparent in her communications with clients. Alyssa holds a Bachelor of Business Administration degree with a major in Finance, along with the industry-recognized designations of Certified Financial Planner (CFP®) and Chartered Investment Manager (CIM®). She is also licensed as a Life Insurance Advisor with TD Wealth Insurance Services. She is committed to professional development and is working towards becoming a Portfolio Manager to further enhance the value she can provide for her clients. A strategy built on your values We get to know you personally so we can deliver a plan designed to help you live the life you envision, now and into the future. Successful wealth planning is more than buying and selling investments. That’s why we create a thoughtful strategy in collaboration with TD specialists that incorporates the many complex elements of your financial life. *Some services are offered in collaboration with TD specialists Four key pillars of your wealth We turn your ambitions into manageable goals and then build your strategy by balancing the four key pillars of wealth. title: Amy Ge Investment Advisor; Amy has over 30 years of experience in the financial industry. She began her career in investment banking in the primary market and later traded stocks and options in the secondary market. For the past 20 years, she has worked as a Financial Planner and now Investment Advisor at TD Wealth, helping individual investors and families manage their wealth. She finds fulfillment in assisting her clients in achieving financial freedom and confidence. Amy believes that money should serve life. True wealth goes beyond mere numbers in bank accounts; it’s about leading a satisfying and fulfilling life. She understands that each client's financial goals reveal a deeper story—whether it’s funding a child's education, retiring early to travel, or leaving a legacy for future generations. Amy begins each client relationship by listening rather than just calculating. She takes the time to understand what truly matters to her clients and creates financial plans and investment strategies that help them reach their goals. Throughout this process, she focuses on her clients' needs, as they give meaning to her work. In addition to her financial expertise, Amy enjoys numbers, art, history, culture, and philosophy. She leads an active life filled with reading, traveling, sports, and gardening. She believes her wide-ranging interests help her connect with her clients and understand market trends. She recognizes how cultural shifts, policy changes, and historical patterns can affect long-term investments. At TD Wealth Private Investment Advice, Amy collaborates closely with a skilled team of TD specialists that offer a variety of services, including estate planning, tax planning, and private trusts. She ensures her clients receive the best possible support. title: Portfolio Manager; Senior Investment Advisor; Amy was born in St. Thomas, Ontario (just south of London), and came to the Niagara Region with her parents and sisters over 30 years ago. Amy grew up playing competitive basketball and soccer from a young age, and eventually played women's provincial soccer for the Niagara Falls Soccer Club. Amy and her husband have been married for over 17 years and live in St. Catharines on a sweet little Christmas Tree Farm. They have a very energetic and happy young son that keeps them very busy – both on and off the ice! They also have a cute toddler daughter that has a contagious giggle, and she loves being outside and close to the beach and the water in the summertime. Adding to the chaos, Amy and Paul also have a big (and friendly) dog - making for a cheerful and noisy household! Amy loves going to the gym and keeping active, and she also enjoys traveling with her family. After starting in the financial services industry 20 years ago, Amy joined TD Wealth in 2008. She graduated from Brock University with an honours degree in Business Administration with a concentration in finance, and has been inducted into Beta Gamma Sigma, an international honour society that represents the highest mark of distinction presented to business students in any country in the world. In 2023, Amy completed her credentials to earn her Portfolio Manager titling, and is now licensed to create and manage client portfolios on a discretionary basis. Amy brings her financial knowledge and exceptional client service to every situation, and builds careful portfolios and long-term financial strategies designed to deliver regular cash flow to clients. She is passionately dedicated to helping clients plan for their many possible futures, and meticulously listens to each client aspiration. Amy believes that peace of mind is priceless and encourages clients to plan in advance, and then revisit their intentions regularly to make sure they are staying on track.

title: Senior Portfolio Manager & Senior Investment Advisor; As a Senior Portfolio Manager & Senior Investment Advisor with TD Wealth Private Investment Advice I have the privilege to spend time and learn about what's most important to my clients and tailoring a holistic plan to help them and their loved ones reach their goals. I have been in the financial services industry since 2004, all of which have been with TD. I started my career as a part time teller while attending post-secondary, progressing on to sales and advice roles and eventually in August 2011 I made the switch to TD Wealth. The main reason for the change was because I wanted to have the ability to really get to know my clients and truly look after their financial well-being; I believed moving to TD Wealth Private Investment Advice would let me do just that. I obtained the CFA charter shortly thereafter, the most difficult and grueling exams I have ever taken. It was worth the effort because I believe having the education, along with experience, is a requirement to providing truly helpful advice. In my role as a Senior Portfolio Manager I take the time to understand what is important to a client and their family, work with them to create a bespoke solution to help achieve these goals. A risk managed and tailored portfolio is part of the solution but not everything; I work closely with the Wealth Advisory Services team at TD Wealth, a group of specialists with backgrounds ranging from legal, accounting, to estate planning, to help our clients look after all of the other pieces in their financial picture. I believe all the pieces, such as tax planning, retirement planning, will and estate reviews, philanthropic wishes, should work together to ensure the client is well looked after. This then gives my clients the opportunity to do things that things that matters most to them, whether it's travelling, building their business, spending time with family, etc. because they don't need to worry about I am a born and raised Edmonton. title: Portfolio Manager & Investment Advisor; With more than 25 years of experience in the investment industry – including many years in institutional equity research – I have learned that every client's story is personal. My role as your Portfolio Manager is to truly understand what matters to you, and to apply the same disciplined, research-driven approach used by pension funds and foundations to help protect and grow your wealth. I work one-on-one with my clients to create a personalized wealth plan that reflects the realities of their lives: career shifts, business growth, caregiving, entrepreneurship, loss of partners, and major life transitions. Together, we'll define your goals and build a plan that gives you clarity and confidence. Wealth is personal – it's about having choices, being prepared, and feeling secure in the decisions that shape you and your family's future. For many, it is building resilience, creating opportunity, and having the freedom to pursue what truly matters. What motivates me most is helping people feel confident and in control of their financial future. I take pride in building long-term relationships rooted in trust, clarity and steady guidance - the kind of relationship you can rely on through every stage of life. And when needed, I'll bring in trusted specialists from across TD to ensure you have the full strength of the organization behind you. I hold an Honors Bachelor's Degree in Science from Queens University, and a Chartered Financial Analyst designation from the CFA Institute. I grew up in Northern Ontario but now live in Toronto. I have three children. Every year of life has brought some kind of adventure and whether it seemed positive or negative at the time, I learned about being in the world. After decades in institutional equity research, I saw firsthand how powerful informed, disciplined investing can be. I now bring that same rigor to the people, families, foundations, and businesses I work with, but in a way that is personal, approachable and tailored to them. My goal is to holistically manage your wealth by applying my breadth of knowledge and experience so you can reach your best financial health possible!

In 1999, Andrew joined the TD management training program, and in 1999 moved to TD Trust, the predecessor of TD Wealth Private Investment Counsel. Over 25 years in the investment management industry, Andrew has forged meaningful and successful long-term relationships with his clients, based on trust, mutual understanding, and a commitment to professionalism and excellence. As a serious steward of his client's savings, Andrew strives to maximize the odds of success with a determined focus on controllable factors, such as planning, preparation, and commitment to a proven, adaptive investment process, one that emphasizes asset allocation, disciplined security selection, broad diversification, downside risk management, regular rebalancing, cost minimization, tax efficiency, and sustainable withdrawal rates. Andrew helps his clients make sound financial and non-financial decisions over their lifetimes, and to prepare for the chaotic nature of markets (and life) – which presents both risks and opportunities in the long-term preservation of their savings. Andrew views himself as both a curator and problem solver. His craft is to tailor investment portfolios and the planning process to his clients, addressing their unique and most important priorities. In his view, an "optimal" portfolio is best defined as the portfolio each client can live with through economic and market cycles. His background in the arts, sports, business, and social sciences provides a versatility from which he can view investing from multiple perspectives and relate to clients of different backgrounds. Highly analytical and curious, Andrew is fully immersed in the stimulating and ever-changing investment profession, and committed to the continuous pursuit of knowledge on behalf of his clients. Andrew holds an Honours Bachelor of Arts degree in Economics from Queen's University and is a Chartered Financial Analyst charterholder. Andrew lives in mid-town Toronto with his wife, a professional artist, and two daughters.; Putting finances into perspective As small business owners, Nick and Justina make a powerhouse team, supporting each other through ups and downs. As parents, they worry about how potential challenges with the business could impact their family’s future. title: Investment Advisor; Portfolio Manager; For more than 20 years, Andrew (AJ) Rotstein has specialized in managing income-generating investments and risk and tax-planning strategies. His skills help affluent families to preserve and grow their wealth while protecting their incomes and lifestyles. A University of Western Ontario grad and a Life Insurance Advisor with TD Wealth Insurance Services, AJ is also licensed to provide sophisticated options and derivatives strategies to help his clients hedge against risk. AJ also holds the Chartered Investment Manager (CIM®) and Personal Financial Planner (PFP®) designations. His wealth plans provide big-picture strategies to help ensure clients are on track to make major purchases and address their financial needs at different life stages. AJ is driven to deliver meaningful advisory services that impact people’s lives. Nothing is more rewarding to him than being welcomed to his client’s weddings and other important events as a member of the family. With his big, sociable personality, AJ has a gift for building rapport and clearly conveying the stable, structured manner in which our team operates. When it’s time to relax, AJ enjoys spending time at the cottage with his family and enjoys cheering on the Dallas Cowboys. In the city, you’ll likely find him taking his three kids to hockey, dance, or baseball.

title: Investment Advisor; Prior to joining TD Wealth Private Investment Advice in 1999, I spent 13 years as a Senior Investment Advisor with another National Investment firm. With over 25 year experience, I offer my clients a diversified array of financial advice and services. I strongly believe, in order to achieve your personal and financial goals, ultimately your financial independence; there must be a commitment to build and maintain an on-going relationship with you. This involves always taking a closer look at your financial plans. At times employing a passive approach, and other times a more pro-active strategy, but always communicating and understanding your needs at the various stages of your life. My Personal Mission To work with you, to understand your current financial position, and to establish a process of growing your financial assets and meeting your investment needs. Your comfort level is critical throughout this process; the greater your comfort, the easier and more enjoyable your decision making process can become. Your Success Is My Only Business I believe a relationship built on interdependence and trust is the foundation of our success. By utilizing various investment strategies, I can help you reach your financial goals and needs. My Five Rules of Future Worth In the complicated investment environment of today, investors can become overwhelmed with data, decisions, and headline news. I think it is wise to remind ourselves of a few simple strategies. Be Invested - The real risk in investing is not being invested. Be Goal-Oriented - If you aim nowhere, you’ll hit the mark every time. Be Diversified - Never put all your eggs in one basket. Be Long Term - Time heals all things. title: Senior Investment Advisor; Anthony brings over 30 years of experience in the financial services industry to the team. He has developed a deep-rooted connection with his clients focused on goal-based and legacy planning. With an emphasis on understanding family and workplace balance, Anthony incorporates the team's VSI Wealth Planning process to help clients achieve financial and personal goals. After completing his undergraduate degree from Simon Fraser University, Anthony embarked on his career in the financial service industry in 1991. Anthony focuses on building customized solutions tailored to each individual’s unique needs and circumstance – balancing investment needs with estate planning needs. He is also a Life Insurance Advisor with TD Wealth Insurance Services. Anthony has incorporated this outlook on a personal level. He wakes up daily at 4:00 AM and commutes by bicycle from his home in Burnaby. He returned to his old neighborhood 17 years ago to raise his four children alongside his wife. By sacrificing a little sleep, he has been able to balance a busy work and family environment while looking after his mental and physical well-being. Spending time traveling with his family and seeing parts of the world has made him appreciate the simple things in life and how fortunate we are to live and work in Vancouver.

title: Portfolio Manager & Investment Advisor; I’m Atif Riaz, CFA, a Portfolio Manager and Investment Advisor with TD Wealth Private Investment Advice. I’ve spent over 10 years at TD helping clients make smart, disciplined decisions across different market conditions. I believe good investing is simple—but not easy. It’s not about chasing returns or reacting to headlines. It’s about building the right portfolio, managing risk properly, and having the discipline to stick to a plan when emotions try to take over. My background in psychology and economics heavily influences how I work with clients. Because investing isn’t just numbers—it’s behavior. I believe fear, overconfidence, impatience, and anxiety can ruin more portfolios than bad markets ever do. My job is to help you avoid those mistakes while keeping your strategy aligned with your long-term goals. I spend a lot of time getting to know my clients. What you’re trying to achieve. What keeps you up at night. What financial success actually means to you. From there, we build a portfolio and plan that fits your risk tolerance, time horizon, and life—not someone else’s template. My role is to bring clarity, structure, and calm to your financial life so you can focus on everything else that matters. If you’re looking for thoughtful advice, disciplined portfolio management, and a long-term partner in your financial journey, we’ll work well together.; TD Wealth Specialists work with your family and, when required, tax and legal advisors, to answer questions about: • Wills, trusts, and estates • Executor and trustee services • Strategies to balance your priorities and charitable goals

title: Senior Investment Advisor; Senior Portfolio Manager; My story is my strength. My family immigrated to Calgary in 1972 from Hong Kong. My parents worked long hours in the restaurant business to provide for our family. I truly understand what it means to work hard to accumulate assets and how important it is to balance work and life, wealth and health – that’s why I take my role stewarding my clients' assets very seriously. I believe that my background has also helped me to advise a wide range of clients with diverse backgrounds. Collaborating for excellence. I work well with clients who share similar values as I do. We have open and honest conversations about what is most important to them. Together, we explore the four pillars of wealth and I help them navigate through life's uncertainties. We offer multi-generational strategies, including long-term succession planning in tandem with TD specialists. Experience and depth. After graduating with a Bachelor of Arts in Economics from the University of Calgary in 1990, I gained valuable experience in the financial services industry with Canada's top chartered banks, leading to the role of Asian Banking Manager helping new immigrants settle in Canada. In the year 2000, I focused my career as an Investment Advisor and advanced to be a Portfolio Manager, having earned the Chartered Investment Manager (CIM®), Personal Financial Planner (PFP®) and Fellow of Canadian Securities Institute (FSCI®) designations. I formerly volunteered as President (Calgary section) and National Secretary with the Hong Kong-Canada Business Association. My fun side. My husband and I enjoy travelling all over the world; experiencing local cuisines and wine. When at home, I'm experimenting with various recipes to hone my culinary skills, followed with long walks to balance out my indulgences. I enjoy watching historical drama films, binge-watching British TV series and practicing yoga.

title: Noseworthy Wealth Management Working together to help you achieve what truly matters to you At Noseworthy Wealth Management, we are committed to: Professional & Personal Approach to Honest, Straightforward Advice Long-Lasting Relationships Built on Trust Customized Wealth Planning Tailored Advisory and Portfolio Construction With over 60 years of combined industry experience, we use a team approach to foster a comprehensive and disciplined wealth planning process by placing our client's interests at the forefront of everything we do. While working closely with you, we hope to achieve one central goal – yours! Our aim is to be the primary financial resource for families with assets of a minimum of $500,000 who are seeking to preserve and maximize their wealth through comprehensive high net worth financial planning. Meet the Team Disciplined Wealth Management Process We believe that each client’s needs are truly unique. Our goal is to offer you the relevant, customized wealth advice you deserve - and we can do that only by fully understanding you. That is why we take a unique approach to understanding you, your family and your values. Understanding : We take the time to understand your needs, dreams and aspirations. Confirmation : We summarize our understanding of your financial priorities and needs to make sure you're in agreement. Determine Solutions : Our experienced team works together to develop a personal strategy that is designed to help you meet your specific goals. Present Solutions : We present your strategy to you for discussion and approval. Implement Solutions : We work with you to put your strategy into action. Ongoing Management and Review : We monitor the progress of your strategy and adjust it to keep pace with any changes in your life. Benefits of Discretionary Investing You no longer have to make daily investment decisions - you can entrust them to our team. We can manage your money for you, not just with you. One transparent, asset-based fee with no commission per trade lets us focus on driving your portfolio's success without worrying about the cost of trades. Sudden opportunities and risks can be addressed swiftly without waiting for your approval. Your unique goals You've worked hard to get where you are today. Now's the time to maintain, grow, and protect your net worth. Get tailored advice, solutions, and strategies that can help achieve your goals.

title: Senior Portfolio Manager & Senior Investment Advisor; With over 20 years of industry experience, I bring significant knowledge, expertise and depth of experience to my role as Senior Portfolio Manager & Senior Investment Advisor at TD Wealth Private Investment Advice. As a member of TD Wealth Private Investment Advice, I work with a talented group of partners and have complete access to their expertise and the resources of our TD Wealth and TD Bank Group teams. My role is to create a fully integrated and comprehensive plan for my clients, by ensuring that the appropriate TD specialists are brought in when required, to apply their specialized knowledge to a particular situation. This can incorporate retirement planning, business planning, estate planning, insurance, planned giving as well as credit and day to day banking needs. This collaboration is crucial to my client's evolving needs from the accumulation of wealth to the preservation and transitioning of their wealth through every stage of their life. I hold a Bachelor of Business Administration degree in Finance and Accounting from Simon Fraser University as well as the Chartered Financial Analyst (CFA) designation. title: Bev Kumar Senior Investment Advisor; Bev Kumar, Senior Investment Advisor at TD Wealth Private Investment Advice, works to serve both individuals and families to help simplify the financial landscape by focusing on what matters most, guiding individuals to connect with their purpose and goals. Once Bev understands you and your goals better, she then presents a tailored investment solution. Bev's passion lies in not only building her clients' net worth over time but more importantly building their financial confidence . Bev focuses on a holistic approach as she helps you organize your finances, to bring to the forefront any blind spots, so decisions aren't made in isolation. She achieves this by understanding what your priorities are in life and helps create a financial plan that can identify any gaps and show your wealth trajectory incorporating all your needs to fully grasp and visualize the big picture. This helps in understanding that money itself isn't the end goal, but instead is a tool to serve the life you are creating and want to lead. In addition, depending on your personal situation, Bev can leverage the expertise of a team of TD specialists in areas of Tax & Estate planning, Business Succession, Insurance, High Net Worth Strategies and Philanthropic services to help ensure all your wealth needs are covered. Bev has over 25yrs experience in Wealth Management services and has held the Certified Financial Planner (CFP®) designation since 2008.; Bev Kumar Wealth Advisory Group is a part of TD Wealth Private Investment Advice, a division of TD Waterhouse Canada Inc. which is a subsidiary of The Toronto-Dominion Bank.; Senior Investment Advisor

title: Senior Investment Advisor; Senior Portfolio Manager; Bringing nearly 30 years of experience to the operational and advisory services of the Bayswater Group, Bill’s primary focus is on establishing and building durable client relationships. Bill studied Economics and Political Science at the University of British Columbia before working with RBC Dominion Securities for more than 28 years. He joined TD Wealth Private Investment Advice and created the Bayswater Group in 2017. Bill holds the Chartered Investment Manager (CIM®) and Fellow of Canadian Securities Institute (FCSI®) designations. In 2008, he became a Portfolio Manager, enabling him to offer discretionary portfolio management services to our clients. A long-time resident of Metro Vancouver, Bill is deliriously happy to be married to Shelley and is the proud father of two sons. Bill enjoys running, competitive hockey and good food. A former Chair of the Richmond Hospital Foundation and a member of the Rotary Club, Bill devotes much of his personal time to charitable work.

title: Senior Portfolio Manager; Over three decades, Brad has developed an abiding belief in evidence-based financial science and the efficacy of free capital markets. He sees markets as an ally, not an adversary and he believes his philosophy leads to better solutions. Rather than delivering "products" driven by manager "skill," Brad concentrates on what he believes really matters: portfolio structure and avoiding big mistakes. Prediction, prophesy, market timing, stock picking and technical analysis are considered to be futile and costly. Markets beat managers. Investing requires objectivity, and few of us have it, especially when it comes to our money. It's not easy and asking for help doesn't mean you're weak or foolish. The solution sounds quaint, but I believe you need someone who cares as much about your money as you do, but has the emotional distance, discipline and experience to help you make smart decisions. You need more than a broker. You need a wealth management team and the cornerstone of that team is me - a Senior Portfolio Manager and Senior Investment Advisor. A wealth management team consists of all the financial advisors in your life, from your lawyer and bankers to your accountant. My role, as a Senior Portfolio Manager is to understand what you need from your investments. Maybe it's more free time with your family, a new cottage, a top-notch college education for your children or grandchildren or ensuring a comfortable retirement. Whatever your goals, a Senior Portfolio Manager will co-ordinate with all of your other advisors and help make it happen. You still make the important decisions but I'll make sure you're making the right ones. It's an emotional investment on both our parts. A good Investment Advisor will know what makes you "tick," and in the beginning that can be a little uncomfortable. However, in time, you'll reach a point where you can release yourself from the burden of second guessing every investment decision. To that end, I'll help you cut through the complexity and confusion and step by step, together, we will strive to make smart decisions with your money and help make your financial dreams a reality. Brad holds a BA in history from the University of Western Ontario and has earned the two of the most senior investment designations in Canada: FCSI® (Fellow of the Canadian Securities Institute) and CIM (Canadian Investment Manager). He is currently Senior Portfolio Manager and Senior Investment Advisor with TD Wealth Private Investment Advice. Brad loves life. He is an avid gardener, a passable chef and he likes to play hockey and golf. He has been married to Pauline since 1986 and the couple have two children, Luc and Alana. The family makes their home in Aurora.

title: Senior Investment Advisor; Senior Portfolio Manager; As a Senior Investment Advisor and Senior Portfolio Manager with TD Wealth Private Investment Advice, Brian Jones has dedicated his entire 20-year career to helping people manage their wealth to achieve their goals and reach their dreams. As a wealth manager, Brian incorporates how the economy works with stocks and believes it’s important to walk each client through everything to help them interpret and understand their investments. He is an economist and an award-winning financial advisor committed to academics, a citizen dedicated to philanthropic causes who has raised over $2 million for his local community. Brian is in the Canadian Securities Institute, a Certified International Wealth Manager, and a Canadian investment advisor whose skill and commitment to the field has garnered multiple awards, including Advisor of the Year in Canada by Advisor Magazine and being twice ranked as a Top 7 Portfolio Manager of the Year in Canada by Wealth Professional Magazine. He draws from his vast knowledge across the universe of finance and economics to deliver solid results for his clients. In addition to the insight gained through his experience in the field, he harnesses his knowledge from a cache of degrees and certifications. Brian holds a bachelor’s degree from UNB in economics and military history, and is a graduate of the SIFMA program at Wharton School of Business, Negotiation Essentials at Notre Dame Mendoza College of Business, Advanced Risk and Investment Management at Yale School of Management and a graduate of Authentic Leadership Development at Harvard Business School.; Your Investment Advisor will stay in touch with you, keeping you up to date on what matters to you.

title: Investment Advisor; Many can articulate the lifestyle they want and the goals they aspire to, but few can build the blueprint to get them there. People are typically more successful in achieving both when they: Have a trusted advisor dedicated to helping them achieve their vision of success - guiding them through the ups and downs in life and the markets Follow a disciplined process backed by an integrated wealth plan that incorporates the whole financial picture Have specialists in estate, trust, succession and tax planning that collaborate together to create and implement sophisticated strategies to help grow and protect their wealth As a client at O'Neill Private Wealth , that is exactly what you will have. I lead a dependable team that strives to delivers the best. My inspiration to make a career in helping people achieve financial security started when I was a young boy. I personally saw what financial insecurity looked and felt like. This inspired me to develop the necessary skills to become a successful investment advisor as I wanted to be able to help people avoid the financial pitfalls that can lead to uncertainty and stress. Growing up, I learned a lot from my parents and uncle who were avid investors. I soaked up as much as I could from their experiences and became a voracious reader of books like The Wealthy Barber, Rich Dad Poor Dad, One up on Wall Street and The Book of Investing Wisdom. In 1998, I attained the required credentials and began my career in finance. About me I feel fortunate to have found a career where I have the same level of passion for it today, as the day I started. After 22 years in the industry, I can still say I love what I do. Helping clients navigate through the process, whilst minimizing the daunting tasks for them, so they can achieve their financial potential is extremely rewarding. I truly want to see them succeed because I care about them. I believe they deserve the best when it comes to wealth management. In my career, I am most proud of the genuine relationships I have built with my clients and the feedback I hear from them. It's nice to 'think' you are doing a great job and measure the financial results. But for me, there is nothing more energizing then getting feedback directly from them that confirms they see it, feel it and are benefiting from it. I have been described as dependable, honest and relatable with significant experience, skillsets and disciplined process. Being a life long learner and enjoying learning certainly helps me bring the best to my clients. As the industry evolves, I ensure I finesse my approach and process. That is why I have continued to seek out educational opportunities and attain top industry credentials. I also strongly believe in the power of mentorship and the sharing of knowledge. That is why I became a mentor in the Brock University and TD mentorship program in 2006 and thoroughly enjoyed teaching personal financial planning in Brock's Faculty of Business. My credentials Certified Financial Planner (CFP®) Canadian Investment Manager (CIM) Financial Management Advisor (FMA) Certificate in Retirement Strategy Masters of Business Administration (MBA) in Financial Services, Dalhousie University Honors Bachelor of Business Administration, Brock University I grew up in the small town of Ingersoll and moved to the local area, St. Catharines, when I began University. Soon after, I met my lovely wife Trish, who was from the area and we decided to plant roots here. Fast forward a few years and now we have a very lively household. Our three children keep us on our toes and often in the hockey rinks. Yes, big hockey family and big Toronto Maple Leaf fans. On a more personal note If I have the time I love to get out for a game of golf and also continue to look for opportunities to give back to the community.
persona_summary: As a TD Wealth Investment Advisor in St. Catharines I’ll work with you to design a unique and personalized investment and wealth plan. Contact me today.

title: Senior Investment Advisor; Experienced, Professional, Trusted Advice Brian W. Sonoda began his investment advisory career in 1981 with Midland Doherty Inc., subsequently moving to TD Wealth in 2007. When sons Adam and Jason joined the practice in 2014 and 2016 respectively, Sonoda Family Wealth Advisors was born. Today our family group focuses on helping High Net Worth individuals, families, professionals and business owners navigate the unique challenges facing retirement and everyday life needs. Born and raised in Hamilton, Brian graduated from McMaster University business school in 1978 with a Bachelor of Commerce (Magna Cum Laude) degree. Among his many professional designations, Brian is a Certified Financial Planner (CFP®) , Chartered Investment Manager (CIM®) and a Fellow of the Canadian Securities Institute (FCSI®) . He also has professional accreditation on Aging as well as certification in Retirement and Estate Planning Strategies. Managing considerable wealth can be complex and time-consuming. Using a distinctive approach to wealth management, Brian and his team focus on establishing a deep understanding of their clients' priorities, and then build a customized strategy rooted in their long-term goals. As clients' needs change and evolve over time, so do the services and solutions that are offered. Whether building a career or business, or shifting into retirement, our family team's insightful counsel, disciplined planning and dedicated risk management can help make our clients more confident in their decisions, and more focused on building their life dreams and future. Brian and his family have resided in Burlington since 2000, after having moved from his hometown, Hamilton. In their personal time, Brian and his wife, Sharon, enjoy family time, working out, reading and traveling together. He was actively involved in the local community and continues to supports a number of charities. Please call Brian today at (905) 331-3356 for a confidential complimentary review , and discover what sets our family team apart from other advisors. Sonoda Family Wealth Advisors is a part of TD Wealth Private Investment Advice, a division of TD Waterhouse Canada Inc. which is a subsidiary of The Toronto-Dominion Bank.; TD Wealth Specialists work with your family and, when required, tax and legal advisors, to answer questions about: • Wills, trusts, and estates • Executor and trustee services • Strategies to balance your priorities and charitable goals; Sonoda Family Wealth Advisors is a part of TD Wealth Private Investment Advice, a division of TD Waterhouse Canada Inc. which is a subsidiary of The Toronto-Dominion Bank.

title: Portfolio Manager; Senior Investment Advisor; For more than 20 years, Brian has been helping individuals and families build confidence in their financial future. His approach is simple but powerful – make financial topics understandable, help clients set clear goals, and create clear action plans to move forward confidently. Holding a Bachelor of Management (Finance) from the University of Lethbridge, Brian also holds two industry respected designations: Certified Financial Planner (CFP®): meeting the highest standard for Financial Planning professionals in Canada. Chartered Investment Manager (CIM®): reflecting an in-depth knowledge of portfolio construction and the ability to offer discretionary investment management. With a belief that strong communities are built through connection and service, Brian has sat on the Board of Directors for both the Medicine Hat Family YMCA and the Medicine Hat & District Chamber of Commerce. Away from the office, you'll often find Brian enjoying the outdoors - camping, kayaking or mountain biking. He's usually joined by Rio, an energetic Small Munsterlander who's always ready for another adventure.

title: Investment Advisor; My name is Cameron Byrne and I am a wealth management consultant with TD Waterhouse Private Investment Advice. I work with families and businesses to help them protect and preserve the wealth that they have worked so hard to accumulate. I do this by helping them integrate the 11 essential wealth management considerations into their lives. Through my discovery interview process, I am able to help my clients address the areas that are affecting them today, while being mindful of how these decisions will affect their future plans. With ongoing meetings and reviews, I am able to design, implement and monitor customized wealth solutions. An investment relationship should be based on long-term thinking, mutual obligations and shared goals. I believe this is the key to creating a successful and long lasting relationship. I chose to build my practice within the TD Bank Financial Group as I wanted to work in an environment where others were as passionate about the customer experience as I was, and that I had the ability to call on a number of internal partners and resources to ensure I was able to give my clients service that was second to none. I truly believe that I have access to some of the best resources available, and am thankful that I can rely on one of our consultants who specialize in Wills and Estate Planning or Income and Asset Protection to help serve the needs of my clients. A firm believer in ongoing education, I have been committed to learning since I began my career in 1997. I have my Financial Management Advisor (FMA) designation along with my Fellow of the CSI Designation (FCSI). The latter is the one I am most proud of. Representing individual integrity and unrivalled professionalism, the FCSI designation is reserved for financial services professionals who have met the most exacting standards for industry experience, advanced education and solid endorsement from their peers and superiors. It is recognized as one of the highest honours in the financial services industry. Whether you are a retiree, a professional, or a business owner, I am confident that I have the tools and resources available to me to help you meet the challenges of today’s complex financial world. I invite you to give me a call so that we may determine how I can help you.; TD Wealth Specialists work with your family and, when required, tax and legal advisors, to answer questions about: • Wills, trusts, and estates • Executor and trustee services • Strategies to balance your priorities and charitable goals; Empowering Polly to achieve financial success When Polly moved to Canada, she was determined to build a great life for her family. title: Cameron Murton Senior Investment Advisor; Senior Portfolio Manager; Cameron Murton works as an Investment Advisor with TD Wealth Private Investment Advice. Cameron has extensive experience in finance having begun his career in Investment Banking with a Big 6 Canadian bank, where he assisted several multi-national companies to raise capital and identify potential mergers and acquisitions. The financial analysis skills developed in this role have allowed Cameron to build a knowledgeable understanding of the financial markets. With this experience, Cameron joined TD Wealth Private Investment Advice in order to provide investment strategies and navigate individual, corporate and institutional investors through potential investment and financial planning decisions. Cameron uses his investment expertise to develop diversified, comprehensive and personalized investment portfolios and investment plans to facilitate participation in gains while helping to reduce downside risks and taxes. Cameron understands that clients want an investment advisor who takes into account how clients feel and combines it with what’s rational. Cameron’s commitment to regular communication and sound investment advice allows him to build long-term relationships with clients. His goal is to provide clients with peace of mind that they have financial security, actively managing portfolios to maximize clients gains while reacting to the downside and fluctuations in the markets. Ultimately, the goal is for clients to have comfort with respect to their investments and to achieve their personalized goals. title: Investment Advisor; I know you want the hard work you're doing now to create the lifestyle and legacy you envision. To make that happen, I believe you need wealth planning and investment strategies that work together and get you where you want to go. The problem is that we live in a time of market complexities and information overload. It's easy to feel in the dark about your wealth plan—especially if you're not receiving the support you need from your investment professional. You're not alone if you're unsure whether your investments align with your goals. Even educated, successful professionals can feel a bit lost when it comes to their personal wealth planning and investing. But you deserve an advisor who manages your wealth with the same dedication you've put into building it. When we work together, we'll start by clarifying what matters most to you—both now and in the future. Then, I'll focus my expertise on designing a wealth plan and investment strategy that's realistic, purposeful, and tailored to you. Every good relationship starts with a conversation, so reach out any time. You don't need to keep wondering if the wealth you're creating will support the life you envision. Instead, let's work together and give you clarity and confidence about where you're headed and how you'll get there.

title: Associate Portfolio Manager; Senior Investment Advisor; Charles developed an interest in investing at an early age and chose to study economics at Wilfrid Laurier University. He joined the wealth management industry as a young adult and explored a number of different roles in the banking and brokerage world. When Charles first became an advisor he found that, as the markets were an unpredictable and uncontrollable factor in asset management, he made the most impact when identifying and addressing the factors within his clients control. This includes focusing on where to best contribute savings, proper asset allocation and diversification, tax planning, etc. Thus, his passion for financial planning began. He promptly began studying for his Certified Financial Planner (CFP®) designation and applied the fundamentals to his practice. He uses a holistic lens with each client relationship and leverages comprehensive tax, retirement, estate and risk planning to create a bespoke plan for each individual. He continues to hone his knowledge within these ever-changing spaces to ensure his clients are doing everything they should be to maximize tax efficient savings. He is particularly adept at developing creative solutions and navigating tax and saving strategies for professionals and other small business owners. Before joining Northlake Wealth Management in 2022, Charles spent 9 years working with physicians and their families developing a deep knowledge of professional corporations and the tax planning that goes along with them. He continues to have a focus on healthcare professionals and other individuals that have the ability to incorporate. Charles views his relationships with his clients as long term. He envisions working with his clients for decades to come and personally guiding them through their retirement. Charles enjoys watching the strategies he puts in place materialize in the progression of his client's situations over time. Charles loves to spend his leisure time travelling and playing sports with his wife and three sons. He is an avid canoeist/tripper and takes every opportunity to guide his family into the wilderness for some valuable serenity.

title: Senior Portfolio Manager; Charles E. Martin bought his first bond at age 13, earned 20% and instantly knew that investing was his calling. After earning a Bachelor of Commerce in Finance at Concordia University in 1993, he became an Investment Advisor a year later and joined TD Wealth Private Investment Advice (TD Wealth) in 2009. Since 1994, Charles has led the Martin Advisory Group to help serve affluent families and institutions with passion, vision and discipline. He is a Chartered Financial Analyst charterholder (CFA®), the industry’s gold-standard designation. As one of the leaders within TD Wealth and the industry, Charles has served on the TD Wealth National Advisor Council to liaise between management and advisors; frequently delivers seminars on economics to TD Bank Group businesses, clients and professional firms; is often featured in the Quebec media as a TD Wealth spokesperson and commentator; mentors many promising young advisors at TD Wealth and externally to help them learn from his mistakes. Through these roles, Charles hopes to foster better-qualified advisors and better-informed investors. Charles brings his clients a sound understanding of economics, portfolio management, investment strategies, market fluctuations, and wealth planning. As one of the industry’s first Portfolio Managers, he began offering discretionary services in 2001, helping free his clients from the pressure of making investment decisions and delivering many other benefits. He values the relationships he has built by providing goals-based investing and great service, and his primary measure of success is his clients’ satisfaction.. A true family man who believes in work/life balance, Charles is serious about his business but always makes it home for dinner with his wife Elisabeth and their daughter and two sons. He previously lectured for Concordia’s commerce program. When it’s time to unwind, Charles enjoys firing up his charcoal barbecue and grilling something great. Also, he previously coached minor hockey and is passionate about playing the game himself as well as cheering on his beloved Habs.; At The Martin Advisory Group, we want our clients to remain clients for the rest of their lives, so all our decisions are made accordingly. Our dedicated team strives to continue to earn our clients' trust every day, with our priority always being to put the client first. transcript Celebrating 30 Years! Thirty years advising clients on money management, and many more to come! transcript The Martin Advisory Group We are one of the largest discretionary portfolio management groups at TD Wealth Private Investment Advice in Canada, based on assets under management as of April 30, 2022. We serve business owners and affluent investors and their families since 1994. We provide comprehensive service, personal wealth advice, placing our clients and their goals at the centre of everything we do. Our long-term commitment enables our wealth services to grow and adapt with our clients, their families and their businesses as they move through the different phases of their lives. Learn More Here The Martin Advisory Group is a part of TD Wealth Private Investment Advice, a division of TD Waterhouse Canada Inc. which is a subsidiary of The Toronto-Dominion Bank.

title: Christie Bartram Associate Portfolio Manager & Senior Investment Advisor TD Wealth Private Investment Advice; How did your investment advisor save you money this year? It’s a question every Canadian should be asking, especially in a world where rising costs and complex tax rules are putting pressure on household wealth. Helping you save money isn’t just a nice bonus—it’s built into our process. As a Senior Investment Advisor, I take a customized, hands-on approach with every client. From day one, our relationship is built on proactive communication, regular check-ins, and a commitment to going far beyond the expected.; Why Settle for a Set-It-and-Forget-It Approach? We believe your financial future deserves intention, attention, and expertise. If your advisor didn’t help you save money this year, maybe it’s time for a second opinion.; Christie has been more than a great investment advisor for us over the years. In review of our 2024 tax year taxes she flagged a T4 slip anomaly that we had totally missed - it was almost $20,000 that came from my old employer in back pay - we had paid taxes on it (thus the T4) - but had never received the actual amount (in the form of a cheque) due to moving around a lot since retiring! My old employer has now re-issued the cheque to our new address! Paying taxes is one thing, but paying taxes on money not received is quite another!! Thank-you Christie for having our “financial backs".

title: Senior Investment Advisor; Chris has been a trusted Investment Advisor with TD Wealth for more than 28 years. He was one of the three founding Investment Advisors who came together in 1994 to launch TD Evergreen, the entrance into the full service brokerage market by TD. Following several successful years, Chris was promoted to Vice President and Managing Director in charge of overseeing the Eastern Ontario region for TD Evergreen. After growing the business considerably, Chris redirected his efforts to focus exclusively on advising private clients. Chris is the first point of contact for potential clients in determining their individual wealth management needs and coordinates solutions and strategies with other team members and/or business colleagues. The extensive network of professionals with which he has surrounded himself helps to ensure that the appropriate solutions are delivered to his clients, and are updated as their needs evolve. We believe that Chris has a proven reputation for providing highly personalized investment counsel and wealth planning to high-net-worth individuals, families and businesses. Having experienced several market cycles, Chris has developed an effective investment perspective that aims to provide clients with a steady hand through market volatility. title: Portfolio Manager; Senior Investment Advisor; Claude Paré graduated in Law from Laval University and specialized in Insurance Law until the age of 53. In 2006, once his family was complete and his finances secured, he decided to leave his first career to pursue his youthful dream of becoming an Investment Advisor. He started at RBC before transitioning to TD in 2011. A passionate enthusiast of the financial markets since his youth, Claude even hitchhiked to New York at the age of 16 to visit Wall Street. He managed to pay for his first house with the returns from wise investments he made with his loans and scholarships while studying. Admiring Warren Buffet, he modeled his investment style after his idol, focusing on value investing. Claude enjoys finding and investing in profitable companies with good long-term growth potential. Married for over 50 years to his wife Lucie, Claude is the father of three daughters and the grandfather of three grandchildren. He spends his free time reading books, financial news, and scientific journals. He has been a subscriber to Scientific American for over 50 years!

title: Click here to read about Cliff and his team Clifford Noonoo Senior Investment Advisor; Noonoo Pinsler Donato Family Wealth Management is one of the largest advisory groups at TD Wealth Private Investment Advice and is entrusted with almost $3.465 billion in assets under management, as of January 2026. So a little about me - I grew up in Tehran Iran, where activities outside of school were dominated by sports. To this day I am an unabashed sports fan who keenly follows the soccer scene. In 1976 I came to Canada at the age of 16 for what was to be a few years of study and adventure in the western world before returning home. Due to the revolution in Iran, the sojourn became permanent and my parents joined me in 1982. In 1994 I was hired by TD to open their first wealth investment branch in Montreal. For the first 13 years at TD I managed the operation as well as client accounts. As I grew that branch to be one of Canada’s largest, I gave up my management responsibilities to focus on client accounts.; We're Clifford Noonoo , Jonathan Pinsler , and Christopher Donato and we have been proving that three heads are better than one for more than 25 years. We are united in a mission to give clients more attention and better service than they can get anywhere else. transcript Noonoo Pinsler Donato Family Wealth Management is one of the largest advisory groups at TD Wealth Private Investment Advice and is entrusted with almost $3.3 billion in assets under management, as of October 2025. Outside of the office Cody enjoys playing sports, traveling and spending time with his wife, children and animals on their farm. He brings this sports background and mindset to bear in his proactive approach to wealth management, which focuses on staying ahead of major life events instead of reacting to them. As a Portfolio Manager and Senior Investment Advisor, Cody works one-on-one with a select group of professionals, business owners, retirees and professional athletes. Through deep discovery he ensures that the right questions are asked — and answered. His goal is to help clients make rational decisions every step of the way so they stay on track and in control as they navigate major life transitions. Cody also holds the Certificate in Retirement Strategy and is licensed as a life insurance Advisor with TD Wealth Insurance Services. Cody is a part of CMB Wealth Management – a team of like-minded financial professionals who communicate clearly, think strategically and act decisively. title: Portfolio Manager; Senior Investment Advisor; Curtis began his career in the financial services industry in 2007, working at TD Canada Trust. In 2011, he honed his expertise in wealth management and financial planning when he moved to TD Wealth Financial Planning, forming the foundation for his commitment to client-centric service. In 2019, Curtis joined TD Wealth Private Investment Advice and formed the Marriott Bortis Wealth Management Group. This transition allowed Curtis to further tailor services to meet the evolving needs of his clients. From retirement and estate planning to business succession and philanthropic giving, Curtis works with his clients and TD specialists to develop a financial plan that will help them achieve their financial goals. As a Portfolio Manager, Curtis offers affluent investors an elevated Wealth Management experience through discretionary investing. Curtis obtained a Business Certificate and a Financial Services Diploma through the Saskatchewan Institute of Applied Science and Technology (SIAST). He holds the Chartered Investment Manager (CIM®) and Certified Financial Planner (CFP®) designations. Marriott Bortis Wealth Management Group is part of TD Wealth Private Investment Advice, a division of TD Waterhouse Canada Inc. which is a subsidiary of The Toronto-Dominion Bank.; Putting finances into perspective As small business owners, Nick and Justina make a powerhouse team, supporting each other through ups and downs. As parents, they worry about how potential challenges with the business could impact their family’s future. Nick and Justina teamed up with their TD Wealth advisor to build a personalized financial plan. With a plan in place, they finally saw that achieving their family’s goals while maintaining the business was possible. Find out how the right financial advice helped give them a brighter view of life. brightcove video player transcript Your Goals, Our Priorities We will work together to help you manage, grow, and protect your wealth. Our tailored services are designed to help meet your unique goals and priorities - no matter how complex they are. We'll help you identify your priorities and create a plan to address your specific needs. We can help with:

title: Senior Investment Advisor; Curtis is dedicated to helping high-net-worth families, business owners, and professionals achieve financial growth and security. By fostering trust and open communication, he delivers customized strategies to help enhance net worth, maximize tax efficiency, and protect wealth for future generations. As a Senior Investment Advisor at TD Wealth Private Investment Advice, Curtis brings over a decade of experience and holds the CIM®, PFP®, and FCSI® designations. His expertise focuses on guiding multi-generational families through seamless wealth transfers that align with long-term goals. With a disciplined approach to portfolio management and proactive wealth planning, Curtis helps clients achieve their financial objectives while preserving their legacies. A devoted husband and father to a one-year-old daughter, Curtis values family, security, and creating lasting impact. Guided by these principles, he empowers clients to align their wealth with their vision, fostering meaningful legacies that endure for generations to come.

title: Associate Portfolio Manager; Senior Investment Advisor; I see the whole you As an Investment Advisor, I believe my profession is remarkably simple. I listen to my clients, discover their wants and needs and deliver tailored wealth management strategies designed to help achieve them. So often I meet with families who were recommended a one-size-fits-all solution that left them feeling unsure whether it was suitable or just convenient. For this reason, my client journey begins with getting to know you. What are your goals? What do you value most in life? What do you want your legacy to be? What education can I provide that will help you understand your financial position? Wealth management is more than products. It's about creating a roadmap to help you achieve your vision of success. Our Philosophy Too often we think about wealth like physics (with rules and laws) and not enough like psychology (with emotions and nuance). The true value of wealth is its ability to improve your quality of life. That's why I believe in plans, not products. Success can't be understood with just a set of numbers. Success is when your wealth plan and investment strategies reduce uncertainty and bring comfort. Our Value to You Our approach is built around your life's priorities. As your Investment Advisor, I will work with you to identify your priorities, understand your values and create a unique strategy that helps ensure your wealth is protected and growing. My team is dedicated to monitoring your progress and adjusting to life events as they happen. We work with you, earning your trust and support through consistent, dedicated and specialized service. Our process is designed to deliver a wealth management experience that fits the needs and expectations of each individual client. Ready to experience wealth management as it should be?; TD Wealth Specialists work with your family and, when required, tax and legal advisors, to answer questions about: • Wills, trusts, and estates • Executor and trustee services • Strategies to balance your priorities and charitable goals
persona_summary: As a TD Wealth Investment Advisor in Calgary I’ll work with you to design a unique and personalized investment and wealth plan. Contact me today.

title: Senior Portfolio Manager & Senior Investment Advisor; At TD Wealth, we believe that each client’s needs are truly unique. Our goal is to offer you the relevant, customized wealth advice you deserve - and we can do that only by fully understanding you. That’s why we take the time to understand you, your family and your values. Whether your needs are straightforward or complex, we’re dedicated to delivering tailored, comprehensive, wealth management strategies that are rooted in your goals. We will help ensure you’re on track to achieve the future you envision for yourself and your family. As a Portfolio Manager, my mandate is to help you to preserve and grow your wealth through tailored investment solutions. With over 29 years of financial services and investing experience , I am actively focused on providing comprehensive wealth management solutions to individuals, families, estates & trusts, and charitable and business organizations. I work with a talented group of colleagues and have access to their expertise and the resources of TD Bank Group. My role is to create a fully integrated and comprehensive plan for my clients, by ensuring that the appropriate TD specialists are brought in when required to apply their specialized knowledge to a particular situation. This can range from tax planning and estate planning, to credit and wealth protection needs. I believe that this collaboration is crucial to my clients' evolving needs – from helping with the accumulation of wealth to the preservation and transitioning of their wealth through their life. I hold the Chartered Financial Analyst (CFA) designation and am a member of the CFA Institute as well as the CFA Society Vancouver. I am a past member of the Board of Directors of Ronald McDonald House in Vancouver and actively involved in other interests in the community. When I am not at work, I enjoy spending time with our two girls in their various activities. I also enjoy golf, skiing, travel and walks with our dog. Our family values also include the welfare of all animals, keeping youth active through sport, as well as protecting and preserving the world's oceans.; Putting finances into perspective As small business owners, Nick and Justina make a powerhouse team, supporting each other through ups and downs. As parents, they worry about how potential challenges with the business could impact their family’s future. Nick and Justina teamed up with their TD Wealth advisor to build a personalized financial plan. With a plan in place, they finally saw that achieving their family’s goals while maintaining the business was possible. title: Senior Investment Advisor; At Perpetual Wealth Advisory Group, our goal is to provide a deep and meaningful wealth management experience that is customized to your distinct needs and objectives. We work with high net worth clients throughout Toronto to help them live the lifestyle they want today while helping them achieve their vision of success tomorrow. Affluent investors who are new to Canada have unique needs. Settling into life in a new country comes with a whole host of challenges, from understanding local customs to deciphering the rules that apply to wealth planning and investing, such as legal and accounting procedures, financial practices, business regulations and tax issues. We can help. We understand how difficult transitioning to life here can be. Let us assist with the many facets of your wealth management; that way, you can focus on getting your family settled. While immigrants may have specific requirements, what they have in common with Canadian investors is a desire to help grow and preserve their wealth, to plan for the future, to take care of their aging parents, and to prepare for the needs of their children and grandchildren. We are committed to helping you meet those evolving investment objectives – today, and for generations to come.; Perpetual Wealth Advisory Group is a part of TD Wealth Private Investment Advice, a division of TD Waterhouse Canada Inc. which is a subsidiary of The Toronto-Dominion Bank.
