title: Senior Portfolio Manager; Senior Investment Advisor; As a Senior Portfolio Manager and Senior Investment Advisor with TD Wealth Private Investment Advice, Dan specializes in managing the complex financial affairs and daily investment management for some of the most successful individuals and corporate investment accounts. Dan was born and raised in Kitchener and graduated from University of Guelph. After owning and managing multiple companies, he found his passion was with the stock market. In 2010, he decided he wanted to help others in this endeavor and joined the brokerage industry, managing money for a vast array of clients. Dan holds multiple designations including Chartered Investment Manager (CIM®), as well as the Responsible Investment Specialist. Since 2014, Dan’s approach as an active Portfolio Manager includes an investment approach that is tailored to each client’s unique set of needs. Dan follows a disciplined approach to investing, executes a solid foundation of professionalism matched with a passion for building and maintaining rewarding relationships with clients. Away from the office, Dan enjoys spending time with his wife Jaime, daughter Kensington and son Langdon. He enjoys playing hockey and is a former member of Team Canada's Ultimate Frisbee - though his competitive days are now behind him.; Discretionary, Fee-Based Money Management Dan Yanke is a Senior Portfolio Manager. The Senior Portfolio Manager title is one of the highest qualifications an investment professional can achieve in Canada. It represents years of advanced education and extensive experience advising clients and managing investment portfolios. At TD Wealth Private Investment Advice, Portfolio Managers are held to high standards. They must not only hold industry-specific credentials, but also meet TD Wealth's stringent qualifications. As a Senior Portfolio Manager, Dan is permitted to run client portfolios on a discretionary basis. We do not receive compensation from anyone other than our clients. We believe our existing clients know that we always recommend only investments we believe are the best for them; with the fee-based platform we want our new clients to feel comfortable that we have absolutely no biases when building our model portfolio. Read more about the benefits of Discretionary Investing:

title: Portfolio Manager & Investment Advisor; Your Needs Financial solutions tailored to your evolving needs Growing your wealth. Protecting what matters. Maximizing tax saving opportunities. Leaving a legacy for the next generation. These are the goals of many high net worth investors. While you likely know what you want to achieve, you may not have the professional knowledge or experience to get there. The good news is, my team and I can help. We regularly help affluent investors who find themselves in transition: getting ready to retire, selling a business, going through a divorce, mourning the loss of a loved one, building a net-worth and planning to pass on wealth, tax efficiently, to the next generation. No matter your phase of life, we can help articulate your financial goals and devise a strategic plan for reaching them. You can turn to us for all of your wealth management needs. Our Mission Our mission is to be the trusted advisor of choice for affluent Canadians and their families; developing a robust plan for the future to counter adversity and the uncertainties life brings. Our Process We pride ourselves on understanding you and your priorities. By investing the time to discover what matters most to you and your family – and uncovering your financial blind spots – we can develop strategies to improve decision making and a wealth management plan that is tailored to your unique needs. A disciplined approach Our disciplined asset allocation goes beyond the traditional to focus on your goals through risk-based allocation. Using a rigorous portfolio construction process, we aim to minimize your exposure to market downturns by incorporating innovative new sources of returns that are less reliant on market direction. Putting your interests first As Portfolio Managers, we have have a duty to always act in your best interest with unbiased objectivity. In addition, our team is committed to service excellence, transparency and effective cost control. We are available and responsive; clients regularly turn to us to for straightforward, direct and thoughtful answers to their questions and concerns. In short, we are their go-to resource for every critical financial decision they make – from applying for a mortgage, to buying a new car, to planning for retirement. Offering comprehensive strategies We have access to a broad range of resources and specialists, and can leverage their expertise, when appropriate, to help you meet your evolving needs through goals-based planning.; Putting finances into perspective As small business owners, Nick and Justina make a powerhouse team, supporting each other through ups and downs. In 2022, Darren teamed up with Spencer Clarke to establish The Clarke Gorthy Group, a team built on shared values, strategic insight, and a commitment to personalized service. He holds a Bachelor of Commerce degree in Finance and Economics, the Chartered Investment Manager (CIM®) designation, and has completed Level I of the Chartered Financial Analyst (CFA®) program. Retirement Planning Retirement is a goal that nearly everyone strives for. However, many have not fully thought through what their retirement will actually look like from a financial perspective. We can help with this. Estimating what you will need during retirement will involve a blend of personal reflection and number-crunching. If you’re between five to ten years away from retirement, now is the time to sit down with us and review your planning. We can help you estimate your spending and withdrawal patterns over the span of your retirement as well as facilitate your switch from asset accumulation to asset utilization, if applicable. It’s important to look at constructing a flexible, tax-efficient cash flow to pay your fixed expenses, while having a clear sense of your discretionary spending.

title: Portfolio Manager & Investment Advisor; As a Portfolio Manager for TD Wealth Private Investment Advice, David and his team work with high net worth clients to identify their investment and wealth goals and build a strategy to help achieve those goals. Using discretionary portfolio management, we handle the day to day management of client portfolios and provide clients with regular performance reviews. Additionally, we have access to TD specialists, who can provide clients with comprehensive services including retirement, estate, insurance and business succession planning strategies. Discretionary Portfolio Management is the delegation of the day-to-day investment decisions to a professional investment manager, who operates within guidelines and parameters established with the client. We are stewards who guide clients to make well informed decisions: - How to use the capital markets to achieve short and long-term financial goals - Understand asset class characteristics and risk-return trade-offs - Develop and adhere to a clear and appropriate long-term investment policy - Prepare for swings in the markets and keep emotions and biases in check Background and Experience David has over 17 years experience in the financial services industry and over 15 years experience with TD Wealth Private Investment Advice. David has demonstrated a commitment to continuing education. He is a CFA® charterholder, and also holds the Canadian Investment Manager (CIM) designation. David Graduated from Carleton University with a B.A. (High Honours) Economics, Minor in Business, Concentration in Finance. Outside of work, David enjoys golf, hockey, football and music. David lives with his wife and two children in Burlington.; Putting finances into perspective As small business owners, Nick and Justina make a powerhouse team, supporting each other through ups and downs. He will collaborate closely with you to create an integrated group of strategies that work together to help you achieve one central goal — yours. David has perspective only gained through advising and managing client investments through multiple market cycles. This insight has proven to be invaluable. Using his effective communication style, this assists clients balance emotions that may at times be involved with investing, helping them toward longer term goals. Recognizing that your situation is unique and can be unpredictable, David uses a customized approach that will evolve with you over time. Your strategy will incorporate the major elements of your ﬁnancial life, engaging TD specialists who can assist you with – day-to-day cash ﬂow, investment solutions, tax and estate planning, charitable giving, private banking and much more. As your priorities and goals evolve, David will stay up-to-date with your needs and help ensure you're on track to achieve the future you envision for yourself. David will help you preserve and grow your wealth through his tailored investment solutions. He delivers proactive and personal advice, working closely with you to make key decisions about your portfolio in line with your goals. title: Portfolio Manager & Investment Advisor; At the core of our work together lies the shared goal of building your net worth and realizing your vision for the future. Together, we'll devise innovative strategies tailored to your unique circumstances, adopting credit and investment solutions to propel your financial growth. Moreover, by implementing tax-efficient strategies in collaboration with your tax advisor, we'll structure your portfolio to minimize tax exposure, working to ensure that your hard-earned wealth remains accessible when you need it most. Additionally, we're dedicated to helping safeguard what matters most to you, offering comprehensive risk management solutions and guidance in trusts and estates by TD specialists to navigate life's uncertainties with confidence. Finally, as you contemplate your legacy, we stand ready to assist in crafting a blueprint that reflects your values and priorities, helping optimize the transfer of your wealth and leaving a lasting impact for generations to come. Diversify and Thrive: My portfolio management service specializes in strategically reducing Canadian market exposure while increasing global market investments to help enhance portfolio resilience and maximize growth opportunities. With a keen focus on mitigating country-specific risks and capitalizing on diverse global markets, I craft tailored investment strategies to help optimize returns and minimize volatility. By expanding your investment horizons beyond Canada's borders, we aim to unlock access to untapped markets, sectors, and industries, offering greater potential for long-term growth and wealth preservation. work with us to embrace global opportunities and build a more robust, internationally diversified investment portfolio. As a Portfolio Manager with TD Wealth Private Investment Advice, the team and I work with families, businesses and organizations to identify their investment and wealth goals and build a strategy to help achieve those goals. Using discretionary portfolio management, we oversee the day-to-day management of investment portfolios and provide regular client reviews. Additionally, we have access to the expertise of TD specialists, who can provide clients with comprehensive services including retirement, estate, insurance and business succession planning strategies. This collaboration is crucial to our client's evolving needs from the accumulation of wealth to the preservation and transitioning of their wealth through every stage of their life. My role is to create a fully integrated and comprehensive plan, let's connect and identify which strategies and solutions match your current lifestyle and needs. title: Senior Investment Advisor; With over 20 years of industry experience our purpose has always remained the same. We believe in developing long-term relationships with our clients and their families. This is the essence of what gives us purpose and it's how we will strive to continue to earn your trust and business day-after-day. Investment Philosophy Our portfolios are guided by an investment philosophy based on understanding your goals, disciplined planning, insightful advice and effective risk management. This philosophy helps us with our goal of ensuring strong and stable growth of your assets in a wide range of conditions. We strive to innovate and look forward, invest like an owner, embrace human behavior, mitigate outside and inside risks, pursue real returns and work to provide quality advice, regardless of market cycles. Clients We work with individuals, families and organizations with invest-able assets over one million dollars of whom have wide ranging, often complex financial needs. As our clients' needs change and evolve over time so do the services and solutions we offer. Whether you are building your career or business, or shifting into retirement, our insightful counsel, disciplined planning and effective risk management can help to make you more confident in your decisions, and more focused on your future. When we asked a few of our clients what they think of our services and overall satisfaction level they mentioned the following: "Over the past 25 years I have worked collaboratively with Derek Avey in establishing a sound investment portfolio which has performed well, even during challenging times. Among his many strengths was/is his ability to clearly communicate and guide me to be a little more conservative in my investment strategy. This proved to be sound advice. I have achieved well above average returns with a modest degree of defensive protection against negative market swings. As I head into retirement, I will continue to utilize Derek's expertise in providing a strategy for maintaining principal and providing a predictable income. Thank you, Derek for many years of commitment, and for educating me along the way!" - Dr. Tobin D. & Lisa D. Quote above as of May 31, 2022. title: Investment Advisor; The most recent addition to our team, Derek, offers 20 years of distinguished leadership experience highlighted by his positions in both corporate head office and client-facing front office environments. In 2005, Derek pursued his undergraduate degree at Sheridan College where he earned an Ontario College Advanced Diploma in Business Administration, specializing in Finance. He then continued to enrich his education, obtaining a Bachelor of Commerce from Ryerson University in 2009. Throughout his career, Derek's authenticity has remained a constant asset, underpinned by his genuine desire to understand what matters most to every individual. This approach has fostered a unique sense of trust and loyalty among clients and colleagues alike. In his transition to his role as an Investment Advisor, Derek continues to keep open communication at the forefront of his craft, striving to build long-lasting relationships with each one of his clients. By working in tandem with a team of specialists within TD Bank Group, Derek addresses the full scope of investment and wealth needs including retirement/financial planning, wealth protection/insurance strategies, estate planning, trust services and charitable giving. Derek doesn't slow down outside the office. As a happily married father of two, he finds himself on his toes keeping up with his kids and their everyday activities. From martial arts to youth hockey, you can find Derek on the mat, or at the rink, helping out as a volunteer coach.

title: Investment Advisor; Associate Portfolio Manager; Devon and his team work with individuals and families to grow and preserve their wealth through integrated, comprehensive, and thoughtful wealth solutions. They focus on building genuine relationships, taking the time to listen to and understand their clients' needs and unique goals, and tailoring strategies designed to help them achieve what's important to them. Devon believes strong risk-management is fundamentally at the core of wealth management, and their team's approach reflects this belief. He and his team are committed to being dedicated, informed, and reliable stewards of their clients’ wealth. Devon comes from a technical background where, prior to joining TD, he served as Chief Operating Officer for a public energy company. His prior career relied heavily on the integration of technical data with the broader business and economic goals of a corporation within a highly competitive and dynamic market. His first-hand experience working with investors, corporate boards, investment analysts, and major financial institutions has given him unique insights into the companies and markets he and his team invest in. Following the successful sale of the company, Devon took the opportunity to transition this experience to an arena where his love of capital markets and risk analysis could be married with his desire to provide a fundamental service to individuals and families. Devon holds the Chartered Investment Manager (CIM®) designation, is an Investment Advisor and Associate Portfolio Manager, and is also a Life Insurance Advisor with TD Wealth Insurance Services. When not at work, Devon and his wife enjoy being active and exploring the mountains with their two daughters, always with their springer spaniel (Lemon) in tow. Devon spent numerous years as a member of the volunteer organizing committee for the annual Calgary Marathon coordinated by the Run Calgary organization. title: Associate Portfolio Manager; Senior Investment Advisor; Eric Bergerud is an Associate Portfolio Manager & Senior Investment Advisor with TD Wealth Private Investment Advice in Lloydminster. Eric joined TD in July of 2003 after graduating from Lakeland College with a Bachelor of Applied Financial Services Degree. Eric has since spent his entire career establishing himself as a knowledgeable advisor with TD Wealth. Eric grew up on a grain farm near Edgerton, AB and remains deeply connected to his roots. He enjoys helping the family during harvest and throughout the year. He understands the unique financial needs of families in rural communities and tailors his advice to suit their goals. Eric holds the esteemed designations of Chartered Investment Manager (CIM), Fellow of the Canadian Securities Institute (FCSI), and Certified Financial Planner (CFP). In 2023, Eric was appointed to the position of Associate Portfolio Manager, allowing him to convert his practice to a Privately Managed Discretionary Portfolio. Eric and his wife, Tanys are proud parents of two sons, Carson and Cohen. Together, they actively support the boys' pursuits of hockey, baseball, golf and lacrosse. Eric enjoys fly fishing, spending time with family at their lake cabin, and helping on the family farm. Eric's talents also include carpentry, mechanics and even classical piano.; Certified Financial Planner

title: Davis Wealth Management Team Eric Davis Senior Investment Advisor; Senior Portfolio Manager; Eric has climbed Kilimanjaro, ran the Boston Marathon and completed the grueling Ironman. Eric was born and raised in Kamloops and leads a very active life with his wife Erin and their two daughters; Grace & London. title: Investment Advisor; Being in the financial industry since 2000, my team and I believe that each client’s needs are truly unique. Our goal is to offer clients relevant, customized wealth advice they deserve - and we can do that only by fully understanding them. That’s why we take the time to understand you, your family and your values. Whether your needs are straightforward or complex, we’re dedicated to delivering tailored, comprehensive, wealth management strategies that are rooted in your goals. We will stay in tune with your needs and help ensure you’re on track to achieve the future you envision for yourself. By taking the time to truly understand your unique circumstances and what's important to you and your family, we can assist you in defining your goals and determine a suitable plan to help you realize them. I believe strongly in collaboration with my clients to ensure a solid foundation for working together. This is fostered through active listening and ongoing communication and begins with a deep discovery about you and what you hope to accomplish. This becomes the blueprint for your personal financial priorities, and as your life changes and these priorities evolve over time, so does your Wealth Plan. Executing a well-planned, risk managed investment strategy that is resistant to market volatility is at the heart of helping our clients attain their long-term financial goals. My commitment to you is to be transparent, honest and to work hard in helping you achieve your vision for your future, gaining the financial confidence to live your best life now and the rewarding life you're looking forward to in retirement. Women in Financial Markets Traditionally the Financial Industry, and in particular the role of Investment Advisor, has been predominantly held by men. Recently however, there has been a tremendous shift in women being recognized and appreciated for bringing a new female perspective to the investment and financial advice landscape. I am fortunate to be working with a truly progressive employer who values and promotes gender equality across all lines of business. TD is an industry leader in this respect. This shift is also being seen with women increasingly taking the lead concerning family finances and investment decision making. Affluent, successful women professionals, executives, entrepreneurs and business owners are growing in vast numbers and have unique needs. I feel I'm particularly aligned with and sensitive towards these needs. Furthermore, many mature women in retirement find themselves in unfamiliar circumstances, through divorce or the loss of a spouse, where they are now the sole financial decision makers. This can be a difficult adjustment, one which I am confident I can provide the support needed for this transition. About Me I believe maintaining a high level of education is very important in this ever-changing environment. After receiving my Bachelor of Business Administration degree, with a major in Finance and minor in Portfolio Management, from Acadia University, I obtained the following certifications and designation: Canadian Securities Course, Conducts and Practices Handbook, Wealth Management Essentials and Certified Financial Planner designation. I grew up in a large Cape Breton family and currently reside in Bedford. When I'm not in the office, I cherish spending time with our three boys, Jesse, Jayden and Noah. All three boys are active in sports, largely playing competitive hockey. Personally, I enjoy running and golf in the summer months and skiing in the winter months. I also love to read, cook and garden in my spare time. My own retirement dream is to do more of these things with my family. In planning my retirement, it allows me to relate and appreciate helping my clients steer towards their retirement dreams.; TD Wealth Specialists work with your family and, when required, tax and legal advisors, to answer questions about: • Wills, trusts, and estates • Executor and trustee services • Strategies to balance your priorities and charitable goals; Empowering Polly to achieve financial success When Polly moved to Canada, she was determined to build a great life for her family. Years of hard work and resilience paved the way for success, but when faced with the unthinkable, Polly was left to start again, leaving her with feelings of uncertainty. Find out how with the help of her TD Wealth advisor and a personalized financial plan Polly was able to take charge of her family’s financial future. brightcove video player transcript Nick & Justina – Business owners teaming up with TD Wealth Putting finances into perspective As small business owners, Nick and Justina make a powerhouse team, supporting each other through ups and downs. As parents, they worry about how potential challenges with the business could impact their family’s future. Nick and Justina teamed up with their TD Wealth advisor to build a personalized financial plan. With a plan in place, they finally saw that achieving their family’s goals while maintaining the business was possible. Find out how the right financial advice helped give them a brighter view of life. brightcove video player transcript Tailored Solutions Our solutions can help people meet their unique needs and make them feel more confident in their financial future. Women and Investing Women and investing Wealth is about much more than just numbers and figures. It’s about having the power to do what’s right for you and your family, the freedom to fulfill your dreams, the flexibility to invest in your business and the assurance that you’re prepared for life’s ups and downs. Our aim is to protect and grow your wealth and help you make informed decisions throughout your life.

title: Senior Investment Advisor; Senior Portfolio Manager; The Davies Wealth Management Group provides comprehensive investment and estate planning solutions to affluent families, corporations and charities in collaboration with TD specialists. With a focus on discretionary investment management, The Davies Wealth Management Group will work with you to build your unique plan. A road map showing what is needed to help you transition into retirement, to help generate the income you require in retirement, and to pass on your assets to the next generation. Together we will build comprehensive solutions that match your investment and estate needs. At The Davies Wealth Management Group we build highly tax efficient solutions using bonds, GICs, stocks, and options. We offer discretionary portfolio management services, this means you can have as little or as much involvement in the day to day operation of you portfolio as you would like. As a client of The Davies Wealth Management Group, you will have access to a team of TD Specialists at your disposal who can provide you with expertise in the fields of banking, tax, investments, estate planning and insurance, as well as a team of analysts that can provide investment strategy and stock research. The Davies Wealth Management Group is led by Gary Davies. Gary has over 20 years of experience in the discretionary investment management and brokerage business and is a Life Insurance Advisor with TD Wealth Insurance Services. Gary holds a Bachelor of Science Degree from the University of Western Ontario, and a Masters of Business Administration from York University. Gary graduated with the Award of Excellence from the Chartered Investment Managers Course and is Fellow of the Canadian Securities Institute. The Davies Wealth Management Group consists of; Gary Davies, Senior Portfolio Manager and Senior Investment Advisor, Nav Sidhu, Client Service Associate and Amy Malhotra, Client Relationship Associate. title: Investment Advisor; Geoff Chen is an Investment Advisor with TD Wealth Private Investment Advice, working with high-net-worth individuals, families, and business owners to help manage and grow their wealth through disciplined investment management and integrated financial advice. Geoff takes a comprehensive approach to portfolio management, combining investment strategy with thoughtful consideration of tax efficiency, estate planning strategies, and long-term wealth preservation. He works closely with clients to develop investment solutions aligned with their financial goals, risk tolerance, and multi-generational priorities. Before joining TD Wealth Private Investment Advice as an Investment Advisor, Geoff practiced as a tax professional at an international accounting firm, where he advised corporations, family enterprises, trusts, and affluent individuals on complex tax planning and structuring matters. This background provides him with a distinctive perspective when constructing investment strategies, allowing him to consider how investment decisions interact with taxation, wealth transfer, and legacy planning. Geoff holds the Chartered Professional Accountant (CPA, CA) designation and earned a Master of Laws (LL.M.) in Taxation from the University of British Columbia’s Peter A. Allard School of Law. He is also holds the Trust and Estate Practitioner (TEP), Family Enterprise Advisor (FEA), and Chartered Investment Manager (CIM®), reflecting his multidisciplinary expertise across investments, tax, and estate planning strategies. Today, Geoff focuses on helping clients make confident investment decisions while coordinating with TD Wealth specialists to deliver comprehensive wealth solutions tailored to evolving family and financial needs.; TD Wealth Specialists work with your family and, when required, tax and legal advisors, to answer questions about: • Wills, trusts, and estates • Executor and trustee services • Strategies to balance your priorities and charitable goals

title: Investment Advisor; Portfolio Manager; For over 25 years Geoff has been helping his clients in his role as an Investment Advisor; the past 19 years at TD Wealth, after previously working for another major Canadian investment firm from 1990 to 1995. At TD Wealth Private Investment Advice we provide professional, custom-tailored investment advice for clients with complex financial needs. We help clients identify their financial and investment planning needs and structure their portfolios to help them to preserve and grow their wealth. We have two very unique areas of specialization: 1) Risk-adjusted tax-efficient investing : It is not only about the top line performance, it is also about how much risk was taken to generate that return, and how much is left after the tax-man gets their piece. 2) Alternative Strategies : There are other ways to invest beyond the traditional strategy of buying and holding stocks, bonds and mutual funds. True diversification is only possible once we explore the opportunities to earn positive returns in many different markets, in both rising and falling markets . Some areas to consider in this alternative space include hedge funds, managed future funds, and precious metals. The main goal in our relationship with our clients is, at the end of the day, or decade, is to help them to achieve financial comfort. We really do believe that providing added value is the goal of each of our daily activities.; TD Wealth Specialists work with your family and, when required, tax and legal advisors, to answer questions about: • Wills, trusts, and estates • Executor and trustee services • Strategies to balance your priorities and charitable goals

title: Senior Investment Advisor; I knew from a young age that I was destined for the financial industry. Growing up with a father who was a stockbroker and mining engineer, our family dinner discussions often revolved around local gold stocks, the price of gold, the market, dividends and inflation. Intrigued by it all, I began working alongside my father and soaked up as much as I could. When I was old enough, I took my Canadian Securities Course and was on my way. My father taught me many valuable lessons, but one that is forever ingrained in my mind is ‘your word is your bond’. It’s a lesson I carry with me, pass along to my family and team and try to live up to in every client interaction. It is important for me to develop trusting relationships with the people in my personal and professional life. In the early stages of my career I knew I wanted to do more than just mine stocks. I wanted to help simplify the complexities of wealth management, so my clients felt more confident in achieving their financial and retirement goals. Becoming an Investment Advisor who specializes in retirement income has proven to be so fulfilling because I get to do just that. For over 35 years, I’ve helped clients achieve their vision for their retirement and legacy. Hank Wissenz and I founded RiverKeeper Wealth Management. We’re an experienced team of specialists dedicated to helping our clients define and achieve their goals for the present and future. We are there for each step of the retirement planning process and ensure you have the tools and knowledge to succeed.; TD Wealth Specialists work with your family and, when required, tax and legal advisors, to answer questions about: • Wills, trusts, and estates • Executor and trustee services • Strategies to balance your priorities and charitable goals

title: Senior Investment Advisor; Money always meant more than just dollars and cents in our house. For my second birthday, my Dad gave me a pink ceramic piggy bank with gold writing inscribed on the bottom. I didn’t know it then, but those early moments — hearing the loonies clink inside, dumping them out to count what I’d saved — were my first lessons in the peace of mind and flexibility that money could create. I never planned to follow in my Dad’s professional footsteps. But during a Finance lecture during my second year at Queen’s University, something clicked. The concept of investing to grow your money fascinated me — and I realized it might be exactly what my Dad had been doing all along. A few weeks later, over Reading Week, I sat in on my first client meetings with him. I have been hooked ever since. Naturally a planner and unapologetically goal oriented, I love the wealth advisory business. I see the business as the missing puzzle piece that links my pink, ceramic piggy bank to being able to design a life that reflects your values. Since joining TD Wealth in 2014, I’ve been helping clients think holistically about their wealth — beyond simply investment management. I feel that money should be respected, but not feared; saved responsibly, but not hoarded; spent wisely, and with joy. I have witnessed first-hand the powerful combination of outside-the-box thinking and a dedicated saving and investing practice. It is what led my husband and me to purchase a small recreational property in Muskoka in our mid-20s. It’s now our year-round home and the backdrop for the slower, nature-filled life we love. I hold an MBA in Investment Management, the CFA® designation, and I'm a licensed Life Insurance Advisor with TD Wealth Insurance Services. I leverage these tools to engage in thoughtful dialogue with my clients, helping them feel confident about their financial lives so that money can feel empowering, rather than something that causes stress. When I’m not working with clients, I enjoy volunteering with ABC Money Matters to promote financial literacy for youth and new Canadians. I’m also a certified yoga instructor and spend as much time outdoors with my husband and daughter as I can — paddling around the lake in our cedar-strip canoe, hiking with our Golden Retriever, and skiing in the Blue Mountains.; TD Wealth Specialists work with your family and, when required, tax and legal advisors, to answer questions about: • Wills, trusts, and estates • Executor and trustee services • Strategies to balance your priorities and charitable goals; Empowering Polly to achieve financial success When Polly moved to Canada, she was determined to build a great life for her family. Years of hard work and resilience paved the way for success, but when faced with the unthinkable, Polly was left to start again, leaving her with feelings of uncertainty. title: Senior Investment Advisor; Born and raised in Ottawa, Gord graduated from Carleton University in 1992. In that same year he started his career in financial services at TD Greenline Investor Services. In 1995 he became a Full-Service Investment Advisor at BMO Nesbitt Burns and in 2003 he was appointed a Vice-President of Bank of Montreal. Gord enjoys working with his clients to help achieve their individual financial goals and offers both non-discretionary and privately managed programs depending on the situation. Focus is always on high quality investments with positive momentum based criteria. Regular contact and a close relationship with all clients has been a hallmark of Gord's practice since the beginning. In 2015 Gord decided what was best for his practice was to move to TD Wealth Private Investment Advice. In 2016 he joined John Bahen, VP and Investment Advisor, and formed Momentum Wealth Management within TD Wealth Private Investment Advice. Gord has always been a sports enthusiast. He played football at Carleton, and continues to play hockey; however, he now takes greater pleasure in watching and coaching his two young sons who play hockey and soccer. Along with his wife Yolanda, he spends much of his spare time at an arena or field somewhere in Ottawa. Gord also supports charitable organizations such as the Juvenile Diabetes Society, Alzheimer Society, and the Ottawa humane Society.

title: Senior Portfolio Manager; Senior Investment Advisor; Grant Ackerman graduated from the University of Victoria Bachelor of Commerce program with Distinction in 2003. Throughout his career in financial services he has achieved a number of the industry's highest accreditation. He is a Canadian Securities Institute’s Fellow of CSI (FSCI), Certified Financial Planner (CFP®), and a founding member of the CSI’s Certified International Wealth Manager (CIWM) program. In exchange for clients’ trust, Grant provides a comprehensive suite of custom-tailored investment management and wealth planning services. Unlike traditional advisory practices, Grant intentionally maintains a small number of key relationships – this allows him to get to know his clients better and deliver a high degree of personalized service, which he believes, translates into better advice. Grant prides himself on building relationships that last, taking the time his clients need and giving careful consideration to the material facts. Above all else, he respects the wealth you have accumulated and is committed to helping to keep your assets secure.; At Ackerman Private Wealth, we act as investment council and trusted advisors for a variety of businesses and individuals with over $1,000,000 in investable assets.

title: Portfolio Manager; Senior Investment Advisor; Greg and his team assist high net-worth families to build and maintain wealth in order to create financial fulfillment through a long-term approach to wealth management. Our primary goal is to identify and understand our clients’ needs while providing tailored financial solutions and experienced opinions to help them make informed decisions. Our expectation is to be proactive in servicing and to always maintain the highest level of professionalism and integrity. We believe that each client's needs and goals are truly unique. Our goal is to offer you the relevant, custom wealth advice you deserve-and we can do that only by fully understanding you. Using our distinctive approach, we seek to view your life through your eyes. With a deep understanding of your priorities, we then build a strategy rooted in your goals. Greg holds the Chartered Investment Manager (CIM®) designation and manages his clients' wealth as a Portfolio Manager. Trevelyan Wealth Management can offer both discretionary portfolio management and non-discretionary portfolios. Greg is an extremely proud 'family man'. Married to his beautiful wife Kim, they have a son and daughter, Grayson and Reese. They spend their time watching their kids participate in activities, being active, golfing, and taking care of their dog Wrigley. title: Associate Portfolio Manager; Senior Investment Advisor; Heidi Yandt began her career with TD in 2006 and has been providing financial advice to investors in the Kitchener-Waterloo area for more than a decade. She has completed a three year diploma in Financial Planning and holds the Certified Financial Planner (CFP®) and Chartered Investment Manager (CIM®) designations. Drawing on her extensive wealth planning experience, Heidi builds and maintains strong client relationships based on trust, transparency and clear communication. Heidi works with Robert Sager and Blair Fingland to create customized, comprehensive wealth strategies to help clients fulfill their unique financial vision. Heidi takes the time to understand each client's situation before creating the roadmap which can help them to achieve their financial goals. She combines her experience and skills with the team and the breadth of resources available through TD, in order to meet her goal of providing an exceptional client experience. Warm and approachable, Heidi believes that managing wealth is much more than managing money, which is why she takes a holistic approach focused on personalized, professional advice. Whether transitioning into retirement, planning for a major purchase, protecting your assets or leaving a legacy, her big-picture view helps translate life goals into financial reality. Heidi lives in Waterloo with her husband Nathan and young daughter and together they enjoy a busy, active lifestyle. Born and raised in the area, Heidi maintains deep ties to the community.
persona_summary: As a TD Wealth Investment Advisor in Waterloo I’ll work with you to design a unique and personalized investment and wealth plan. Contact me today.

title: Senior Investment Advisor; About Hilary Hilary joined TD in May 2000, starting out as an Investment Representative with TD Direct Investing (formerly, TD Waterhouse Discount Brokerage) before moving to TD Wealth Financial Planning in 2003 as a Financial Planner. In 2021, Hilary joined TD Wealth Private Investment Advice as a Senior Investment Advisor to assist affluent individuals and families to achieve their lifetime goals by creating customized investment portfolios that help preserve and create wealth. Hilary's goal is to create long term meaningful relationships with his clients, and be with them every step of the way. Hilary currently holds the Certified Financial Planner (CFP®), Fellow of Canadian Securities Institute (FCSI®), and Chartered Investment Manager (CIM®) designations. In his spare time Hilary enjoy playing soccer and is also a hockey fan. He hopes to witness the Oilers win another Stanley Cup one day! Hilary is happily married to his wife Cathy and have two energetic kids, Chloe and Hadrian, who keep them moving at all times. Discovering and planning for what truly matters to you Hilary provides comprehensive wealth and investment management solutions to a select group of personal and institutional clients. title: Senior Portfolio Manager; Senior Investment Advisor; I received my B.A. in Economics from IJVIC in 1993, and joined Burns Fry shortly after graduation. I moved to Toronto in 1995 and subsequently joined TD Wealth in 1997. In addition to holding the Canadian Investment Manager designation and completing the Canadian Options Course, I obtained my Certified Market Technician designation in 2001, being only the 13th Canadian to hold the designation at that time. I am also a Life Insurance Advisor with TD Wealth Insurance Services. Over the past 25 years, I have grown Farrell Wealth Advisory Group to provide financial advice to 135 families, with assets under management in excess of 450 million dollars as of March 31, 2022. Our clients have diverse backgrounds and financial objectives, but what they have in common is that they expect a high level of value. We are committed to delivering that value with the four-pillar approach at TD Wealth: Build Net Worth, Implement Tax Efficient Strategies, Protect What Matters, and Leave A Legacy. By taking this approach we have a proven track record of helping clients achieve their goals throughout their financial lifecycle. When I am not at work, I enjoy a variety of different sports activities including: gym, Brazilian Jiujitsu, golf. Farrell Wealth Advisory Group is a part of TD Wealth Private Investment Advice, a division of TD Waterhouse Canada Inc. which is a subsidiary of The Toronto-Dominion Bank.; TD Wealth Specialists work with your family and, when required, tax and legal advisors, to answer questions about: • Wills, trusts, and estates • Executor and trustee services • Strategies to balance your priorities and charitable goals

title: Senior Investment Advisor; About Me A student of the wealth management industry and an advisor for the past 15 years, I've seen firsthand, the benefits of working with a knowledgeable investment advisor and the damage caused by not having one. This has shaped who I am and who I want to be as an advisor, ensuring my clients are well-educated and clearly understand the 'what' and the 'why' of wealth management. About my team At the Hart Advisory Group we realize that Wealth management goes miles beyond investment advice and money management. Acting as your "Chief Financial Officer" our team creates and reviews the various elements of your wealth management to help ensure that the success you have earned today will be there tomorrow. Our comprehensive approach encompasses investment solutions and engages TD Specialists when appropriate who provide expertise in taxation, insurance and estate planning. Our practice is built on the pillars of trust, integrity, transparency and accountability. Focused on multigenerational families, pre/post retirees, business owners and executives, we support our clients in all areas of their financial life; helping them make informed decisions based on a strong understanding of where they currently are and where they ultimately want to be. Our clients believe money is meant to be enjoyed. They are looking for the professional guidance as they want more time to travel, run their business, and pursue interests other than day to day investing. By working together, we can help minimize the stress of investing and the complexities that come with managing one's wealth. Our process starts with a thorough discovery meeting. By taking the time to uncover the meticulous details of your desires and what they mean to you, we will have a clear understanding of what's most important to you. Once your wealth goals and objectives are established, we'll create your customized wealth plan, employing the extensive wealth management resources of TD. This will ensure all areas of significance are protected from uncertainty. As our relationship develops, we will continually update and stay up to speed on any changes that life brings, possibly exploring new solutions that may become more relevant. We will work hard to exceed your expectations of what an advisor relationship can be. Together, we will help you achieve your vision of success. A personalized solution built on what's important to you: Learn Together we will work with you to determine important factors such as your objectives and time frames, your risk tolerance, and your need for capital growth and preservation. We will also consider your personal preferences in how our working relationship will proceed. Create Once we have an understanding of your goals and preferences, we will design a personalized investment strategy that takes into account your return expectations, income requirements, risk tolerance, time horizon and any other unique investment preferences. Our strategy will also help ensure that your portfolio is built with overall tax minimization in mind. Build Your investment strategy will be implemented through a custom-designed investment portfolio. We can provide you with personalized investment accounts or through access to third-party investment managers. Review We’ll work with you to monitor your progress on your path to success. We will review your portfolio with you on a regular basis, and will adjust your strategy when necessary to help keep you on track; it will be our responsibility to keep your portfolio in line with your evolving needs and the changing market conditions. We will also identify opportunities to help build and protect your wealth as your needs evolve through value-added financial, estate and insurance planning services provided by TD specialists.; TD Wealth Specialists work with your family and, when required, tax and legal advisors, to answer questions about: • Wills, trusts, and estates • Executor and trustee services • Strategies to balance your priorities and charitable goals; Empowering Polly to achieve financial success When Polly moved to Canada, she was determined to build a great life for her family. title: Align Private Wealth Management Comfort + Trust At Align Private Wealth Management, we believe true success comes from a unified approach. Led by Tim Roscoe , Matthew Harpwood and Nino Fasulo , our team of dedicated wealth professionals works together to ensure you’re connected to each of us, not just one advisor. We operate as a family, and our goal is to make you feel like part of it—supported, understood, and valued every step of the way. With over 30 years of combined experience, we help clients pursue their long-term lifestyle and legacy goals through a simple yet comprehensive wealth planning approach. Whether your priorities include retirement, investment and income planning, wealth preservation, insurance planning, tax-efficient strategies, estate planning, business succession, or philanthropy, our entire team collaborates closely with TD specialists to provide seamless support in every area. When you work with us, you’re gaining a team that’s truly invested in your success. Meet the Team Our Mission Our mission is to be the trusted advisor for all aspects of your life. We work hard to simplify our clients' financial lives, optimize their portfolios, and ensure they always remain on track with the path we create together. We work together with our clients, through each chapter of their lives, helping to ensure we are always on the same page and not falling behind. We strive to make all aspects of finance easily understandable. Learn More In-depth discovery Our Knowledge We offer our knowledge and experience to help you achieve your potential. We want you to feel comfortable talking to us about your dreams, as well as life changes along the way. Unlike many advisory firms, our team works with a limited number of individuals and business owners. This enables us to engage in a deep discovery process with our clients, offering a personalized and long-term approach to wealth management.; Align Private Wealth Management believes that working in a team environment is the cornerstone to serving clients efficiently and effectively. Rather than having a single advisor, you are serviced by a team of professionals that are available and ready to help anytime. Our teamwork improves productivity and brings diverse perspectives to each approach.

title: Portfolio Manager; Senior Investment Advisor; Although born and raised in Beamsville, Jason’s roots trace back to the breathtaking landscapes of Cape Breton Island, Nova Scotia—home to stunning coastal views and world famous seafood. He frequently visits family there and strives to bring the warmth, kindness, and hospitality of Canada’s East Coast into every client relationship. Jason pursued his post-secondary education at Brock University in St. Catharines before obtaining his Canadian Securities licensing after starting at TD in 2014. Since then, Jason has earned his Chartered Investment Manager designation and achieved his Portfolio Manager title. One of Jason’s greatest professional passions is listening to his clients’ unique stories. By understanding individual goals, values, and aspirations, he is committed to helping clients navigate life’s financial milestones—whether it’s purchasing a first home, planning for retirement, transitioning a farm or business, or preparing to pass wealth to the next generation. Now settled in St. Catharines with his wife and their lively two-year-old daughter, Isabella, Jason always enjoys exploring the region’s dynamic food scene. Weekends often involve discovering new restaurants and experiencing Niagara’s renowned wineries in every season. Isabella keeps them on their toes with her endless energy—she loves to dance, tumble, and show off her budding gymnastics skills! A lifelong athlete, Jason has been playing competitive hockey since childhood. He played Junior A hockey for the Streetsville Derbies before joining both the St. Catharines Falcons and the Thorold Blackhawks. At just 16, he made history as the youngest Assistant Captain in Canada. In addition to his love for sports, Jason has always been passionate about music. He plays the guitar and, years ago, was even the lead singer of a band! While his rockstar days may be behind him, music is still an important part of his life, and he enjoys playing whenever he gets the chance. Beyond team sports, Jason is an avid golfer who takes every opportunity to hit the links on sunny days—always on the lookout for ways to improve his handicap!

Living and working abroad, Jason gained perspective on the different ways people think money and approach their financial lives. He believes the keys to sound wealth management advice are high standards, critical thinking and mutual respect. His calm and pragmatic approach has proven beneficial at work and at home with a busy family. Jason graduated from the University of Western Ontario with a degree in Economics. In addition, he holds the Certified Financial Planner (CFP®), Chartered Investment Manager (CIM®), Fellow of the Canadian Securities Institute (FCSI®) and Financial Management Advisor (FMA) designations. Jason excels in a team environment, adapts quickly to unforeseen circumstances and is an approachable leader, all skills enhanced by years of experience in competitive sports. The cornerstone of the business is a one-on-one relationship with each client, based on trust, communication and a detailed understanding of their needs. Born and raised in Northwestern Ontario, Jason brings over 16 years of experience to his role as Portfolio Manager. Jason’s industry experience includes Corporate and First Nations banking with the Northwestern Ontario TD Commercial Banking Team along with mergers & acquisitions with GMP Securities in Toronto. Jason has previously chaired the audit committee of a publicly traded company listed on the TSX Venture Exchange and BVL in Peru and he was previously an advisor to a local publicly traded company listed on the TSX Venture Exchange. He holds a Commerce degree from Lakehead University (2004) and earned his Chartered Financial Analyst designation in 2009. He and his wife, along with their twin boys, enjoy fishing and hunting in their hometown of Thunder Bay. title: Associate Portfolio Manager; Senior Investment Advisor; Jay Kolebaba, CIM®, CFP®, B.Mgt With over 18 years of experience at TD Wealth, Jay Kolebaba is a seasoned Associate Portfolio Manager and Senior Investment Advisor who brings a disciplined, client-focused approach to wealth management. Holding both the Charted investment Manager (CIM®) and Certified Financial Planner designations (CFP®), he combines advanced investment expertise with holistic financial planning to help clients navigate complex financial landscapes and achieve their long-term goals. Jay specializes in building customized investment portfolios tailored to each client's unique risk profile, values and objectives. He works closely with high-net-worth individuals, families and business owners to deliver integrated strategies that encompass retirement planning, tax efficiency, estate planning and wealth preservation, engaging TD specialists where appropriate. A key focus of Jay's practice is multi-generational wealth planning – helping to ensure that wealth is effectively transferred, managed, and protected across generations. By facilitating family conversations around legacy, financial literacy and succession, Jay helps clients create enduring financial legacies that align with their values. With his commitment to transparency, sound advice and proactive service Jay builds lasting relationships rooted in trust and performance. Whether markets are rising or volatile, he remains focused on helping clients make informed decisions and stay aligned with their financial vision. When he's not working, Jay loves to garden, and he enjoys traveling and making memories with his wife and daughters. title: Senior Portfolio Manager & Senior Investment Advisor; Jeet Dhillon is a Senior Portfolio Manager & Senior Investment Advisor with TD Wealth Private Investment Advice and has over 25 years of investment industry experience, including investment management, portfolio analysis and product management. She is responsible for the design and delivery of distinctive investment management solutions and services to private clients, corporations, individual pension plans and trusts. Jeet's primary role is to provide investment counsel to her clients, specifically to develop and implement investment strategies tailored to meet their individual needs. She has the skills required and also draws upon the vast resources available from TD Bank Group to provide her clients with the highest level of service and support in attaining their personal objectives. She creates personalized long-term financial strategies, managing the optimal mix of services for portfolio growth, asset protection and tax efficiency. Jeet also helps her clients to develop fully integrated wealth management solutions by working with TD specialists who have expertise in a variety of wealth planning areas such as trust and estate planning. Prior to her current position, Jeet worked as Manager, Strategic Initiatives, assisting Senior Portfolio Managers with research and management of high-net-worth client portfolios while also spearheading strategic business initiatives for TD Wealth Private Investment Advice. The latter included a focus on the training of investment professionals and development of tools and resources for investment and wealth planning for high net worth clients. Jeet's previous responsibilities also included that of Product Manager for TD Mutual Funds (2000 to 2004), Training Consultant with Canada Trust Investment Management Group (1998 to 2000) and Financial Advisor with Canada Trust (1995 to 1998). Jeet is a Chartered Financial Analyst (CFA) Charterholder and a member of the CFA Institute and the Toronto CFA Society. She graduated from the University of Calgary with a Bachelor of Commerce degree and from Simon Fraser University with a Masters in Business Administration (MBA).; Empowering Polly to achieve financial success When Polly moved to Canada, she was determined to build a great life for her family. title: Portfolio Manager; Investment Advisor; Who Am I? SHORT ANSWER: Jeffrey Jakobsen MEDIUM ANSWER: Read My Bio About Jeff Started Young : Worked on the floor Toronto Stock Exchange at 16 Got Lots of Education : Earned degrees in Public Affairs & Management and Sociology-Anthropology from Carleton University Have A Lot of Experience : Portfolio Manager & Investment Advisor | RBC Dominion Securities (12 years) Senior Investment Advisor, Canaccord Capital (10 years), Business Manager, Wheaton Group (4 years) I'm A Dad : I have two young sons, with whom I try very hard to keep up with on the ski hill and many other sporting activities Make Time to Give Back : Previously was Co-Chair, ‘Eye-Appeal’, the annual major giving event for the Canadian National Institute for the Blind, and was also Founder/Co-Chair/Sponsor of the annual 'Paul Kwari Memorial Golf Tournament', an annual fundraiser for The Heart & Stroke Foundation of Canada LONG ANSWER : My Approach I've got a pretty personal and comfortable approach towards client relationships. Cultivating real client connections is important to me ( i.e. annoying habits of your kids, amazing professional achievements, craziest vacation stories, family events and drama, die-hard team loyalties - Go Leafs! etc. ). That’s why I work with you in the ways that work best for you: IN-REAL-LIFE ( Gozen is my 'go-to' lunch meeting spot - but am always open to suggestions) By PHONE & EMAIL (Because it’s with me 24/7) Chatting over VIDEO (You can 100% be business on top and pajamas on the bottom) This allows for the management of your assets in ways that will help achieve your financial goals. I aim to offer different perspectives to all client interactions, resulting in a full-picture plan for your financial future.

title: Portfolio Manager & Investment Advisor; As a Portfolio Manager for the Corcoran Cham Group within TD Wealth Private Investment Advice, we are committed to building long-term relationships with our clients based on trust and integrity. Our clients are primarily a select group of retirees or people looking to retire within 10 years, who among other things, aspire to a work-optional lifestyle. We've developed and refined a disciplined process, supported by the expertise of TD Wealth and TD Asset Management, to put all the pieces of the puzzle together into a wealth strategy. Our planning process aims to plan for the expected, as well as the unexpected. Discovering What Makes You Unique You have meaningful goals and we can help you reach them. Each person's needs are truly unique and our goal is to offer you the relevant, customized wealth advice you deserve accomplished by getting to the heart of what matters most to you. That's why we take a unique approach to understanding you, your family and your values. Our discovery process is driven by behavioral finance theory because we understand that decisions related to wealth are not purely logical, as traditional financial theory implies. By revealing the likely existence of biases in every financial decision, behavioral finance aims to allow each person to make informed financial decisions, while being aware of the factors that might influence them. This information will tell us how we can work best with you and what the next steps are in creating your strategy – one that aligns what you have to what you want it to do. Designed for Life Armed with a deep understanding of your priorities and values, we'll build a team of TD specialists centred around you. And, as your needs evolve, your wealth strategy will evolve with you. We take our relationship seriously – that means we'll be in touch with you on an ongoing basis so we can provide you with the information you need for a successful financial future. And when you need advice, we'll be there with a breadth of knowledge and expertise, along with the personalized attention you deserve. The TD Advantage Investment management is one of our key strengths and the cornerstone of every wealth strategy. Our investment philosophy is rigorous, disciplined and comprehensive, with a balanced approach to wealth preservation and growth. We draw support from the same high-calibre methods used by TD Asset Management with pension funds and foundations to bring an exclusive pension-style investment offer to our clients. While each investment mix is born from a client's personal wealth strategy, the approach behind those investments is highly structured - one that places an emphasis on preserving capital while aiming to deliver consistent and stable returns.; Putting finances into perspective As small business owners, Nick and Justina make a powerhouse team, supporting each other through ups and downs. title: Senior Investment Advisor; In the 25 years working with pension managers, advisors and investors in the financial industry, I gained invaluable insights on what are important to my clients. I believe my clients deserve measureable CLARITY on defining their goals and we work together collaboratively in creating the achievable PLAN to help them get there. Why I Do What I Do My clients need advice on their retirement and wealth planning more than ever before. The changing market requires changing insights. The recent low interest rate environment and market volatility have created tremendous challenges for pre-retirees and retirees. Imagine taking a life-long road trip but faced with navigating the foggy paths every day. With my process, approach and deep resources at TD, along with the support from my clients, I truly believe I can help my clients discover what are important to them and their families, and create a PLAN to help them reach their goal. My Values to My Clients I manage my clients' QUIET WEALTH through personalized wealth planning. Quiet Wealth is more than just money. My clients should be able to enjoy what they want, when they want and how they want. My Process With the 11 Wealth Planning considerations, our engaging Life Discovery is the first step in creating clarity of how all aspects of our life are inter-related. After all, Life is full of many ‘ifs’. Clients I Work With Pre-retirees and Retirees - Through the important phases of Life Transitions, my clients are likely faced with these questions – 1. Can I retire? 2. How much income do I need and where my cash flow comes from? 3. For business owners, what is the business succession plan? 4. How about leaving a Legacy to the next generations? 5. Would one consider Charitable Giving? Medical Professionals Investment strategies with assets in Holding Co, Operating Co., Investment Co. and Family Trusts. With the deep resources at TD Wealth, I work my clients to effectively reduce any gaps between taxes, investment and wealth planning. My Family I am fortunate to have found my soul mate and wife Karen when we were in Oklahoma. Together, we have two beautiful children Aidan and Jenna who are almost 16 and 14 years of age. They play a lot of ice hockey. Almost every day, you can find us in local hockey rinks. When my family are still at sleep in the mornings of weekends, I enjoy my road cycling with my buddies very early in the mornings.; TD Wealth Specialists work with your family and, when required, tax and legal advisors, to answer questions about: • Wills, trusts, and estates • Executor and trustee services • Strategies to balance your priorities and charitable goals; Empowering Polly to achieve financial success When Polly moved to Canada, she was determined to build a great life for her family. title: Senior Investment Advisor; Senior Portfolio Manager; As a Senior Portfolio Manager at TD Wealth Private Investment Advice, I look to provide investment strategies and informed advice for you and your family for generations to come. With a thorough understanding of your financial goals, I can offer comprehensive customized financial solutions, supported by the resources of one of Canada's largest and most respected financial institutions. Since I am also licensed as a Life Insurance Advisor with TD Wealth Insurance Services, I can also offer tailored wealth protection strategies to help you and your family achieve your financial goals. As you know, “mass market” investment advice is not likely to reflect your unique goals and financial situation. I believe that developing a one-on-one relationship with you is the only way I can be sure of providing meaningful and effective guidance. My goal is to gain your loyalty and trust by providing custom-tailored advice that helps you to invest with confidence. I pride myself on delivering exceptional service and advice on income flow in retirement, tax minimization and the benefits of charitable giving. I am a graduate of York University, with a Bachelor of Science Degree and have been a proud employee of TD Bank Group since 2003. Contact me today to learn more about the benefits of TD Wealth Private Investment Advice. You can be confident I share your goal of enhancing your financial success.; For more information please refer to our Team site Gardner Di Cesare Wealth Advisory Group . Gardner Di Cesare Wealth Advisory Group consists of Jessica Gardner, Senior Investment Advisor and Senior Portfolio Manager, Sam Di Cesare, Senior Investment Advisor and Senior Portfolio Manager and Jane Gaziano, Client Service Associate. Gardner Di Cesare Wealth Advisory Group is part of TD Wealth Private Investment Advice, a division of TD Waterhouse Canada Inc. which is a subsidiary of The Toronto-Dominion Bank.

title: Your Goals, Our Priorities Jessie Sidhu Senior Portfolio Manager; I have been with TD Wealth Private Investment Advice since 2004, and I have over 25 years of experience in the financial services industry. Jillian Bryan is a Senior Portfolio Manager and Senior Investment advisor at TD Wealth Private Investment Advice with nearly two decades of experience helping Canadians navigate markets, retirement, and complex financial decisions with clarity and care. She combines deep technical expertise with a disciplined, risk-aware approach that prioritizes capital preservation, tax efficiency, and long-term stability. Her thought leadership, featured in outlets such as The Globe and Mail and CTV News, reflects an ability to translate market volatility, estate planning, and retirement strategy into practical, understandable guidance. Jillian’s philosophy is rooted in respect for clients’ hard-earned money: she tailors investment strategies to individual needs, collaborates closely with TD specialists, communicates frequently, and ensures clients are actively involved and informed. For the risk-averse, the entrepreneur or the later-stage investor, she offers something rare—measured confidence, proven judgment, and a commitment to acting wisely on their behalf, not just growing wealth, but protecting it with purpose.

title: Senior Portfolio Manager & Senior Investment Advisor; As a Portfolio Manager with TD Wealth Private Investment Advice, I am dedicated to providing customized investment management solutions to high net worth individuals, families, charities, estates & trusts, and business organizations. I pride myself on providing the personal attention you would expect from a boutique investment firm, while giving you access to the breadth and depth of resources of a global powerhouse. Welcome to the TD advantage! TD Wealth Private Investment Advice's integrated wealth management strategy revolves around much more than just your investment portfolio. It is built on four key pillars: Building Your Net Worth Implementing Tax Efficient Strategies Protecting What Matters Most Leaving a Legacy Clients have complete access to the expertise and resources of TD professionals. We will have the appropriate specialists brought to the table, apply their specialized knowledge to your situation, and work together to create an integrated and comprehensive plan for you. Our process actively seeks to prepare you for the accumulation, preservation and transitioning of your wealth through each stage of life. Our investment philosophy centers on preserving capital, while growing it prudently. It is TD Wealth Private Investment Advices' disciplined, team-based investment approach, combined with a strong investment track record, and ability to offer customized portfolios that differentiates our service from many of our competitors. On a personal note, with over 20 years of analytical and advisory experience within the financial industry, it has become imperatively clear that the true key to ensuring clients’ financial success is through a comprehensive understanding of their unique needs and circumstances. There is no "one size fits all" or "rule of thumb" when it comes to developing a disciplined financial strategy. I am a Chartered Financial Analyst (CFA) charterholder, and a member of the CFA Toronto Society. I have an Honours BA in Economics from York University, with a specialization in Financial Analysis.

title: Investment Advisor; Achieving your financial goals isn't a box to check on a list, it's a life-long process. Being smart with your money means being able to live well, to retire confidently, and to transfer your wealth to the next generation. It means collaborating with a team of well-qualified professionals, who will conduct a searching analysis, apply their expertise, and develop a thorough understanding of your position and your potential. Only then can we feel confident in crafting a comfortable plan together, that considers all of the aspects of your family's present, in order to shape its successful future. That is why we maintain that our ultimate role is to help you to achieve your financial goals. The Approach to our process begins by first asking the right questions about you and your family so that we can understand where you are today financially. Second, we want to understand what your goals are for the future. Third, we perform a thorough analysis so that we can provide you with an objective assessment of your goals and confirm which ones are the most achievable. Are they all realistic? What are your priorities? The next step is to explore what actions we need take to realize those goals successfully, and to ask you how your feel about those actions. The most cost-efficient and high-value way to invest means that we are dedicated to respecting your money. To achieve that, we follow these principles: Helping you with more than your money. Our approach to wealth management is a holistic one. We know that requires a disciplined and process oriented approach not just to investing, but also to: planning your retirement planning, managing your risk outside of the portfolio, transferring your wealth to the next generation, and avoiding "death taxes" through effective planning, and ensuring that your Will and Powers of Attorney are up to date. Long-term diversified investment strategies that are built through a process of planning and research are at the core of being smart with your money. Making sure you Keep on track is vital to any financial plan. Through regular and meaningful communication are we able to support you in your effort to maintain the plan. Regular reporting, in depth check-ins and comprehensive annual reviews where you contribute to a three-part agenda are an important part of the process that we use to give your the best chance of achieving your financial goals. We examine life changes, your opinions of our service to you, and your satisfaction with your investments. We then update your plan and service requirements, where necessary. Seeking professional advice will enable you to succeed in rising above the noise and misinformation that inundates investors and markets. Although I enjoy serving a diverse clientele of families who benefit from broad experience and a strategic approach to wealth management, I also enjoy advising small and medium businesses, educational institutions, and the foundations which support them. The lessons I learn from my clients are important to me, and I apply them to everyone's benefit, where possible. My career began over 30 years ago on the bond desk of a major dealer, and over time, I eventually made my way to pension services at another firm. Almost 20 years ago, I joined TD Asset Management and eventually led a team of Investment Specialists. In 2003 and 2004, TD gave me leave to serve with the Canadian Army in Afghanistan (I was a Major in the active Army Reserve, and finished with 42 years of service in Canada and many parts of the world). After service in Afghanistan, I came back to TD and made my way back to the role of Investment Advisor, which I thoroughly enjoy! In addition to my various financial designations, I hold a degree in Latin American Studies with a concentration in Developmental Economics (B.A.) from University of Toronto, and a Master of Laws (LL.M.) in Commercial Law - litigation, which I earned in England. I have also graduated from U of T with programmes in Business, Human Resources Management, and Alternate Dispute Resolution, and from the United Nations OCHA programme conducted in Buenos Aires by the UN. My ongoing involvement in the University of Toronto has included serving on Governing Council, where I was the Vice-Chair of the University Affairs Board, and Chaired the Boundless Campaign for Woodsworth College. I also served for many years in the role of Board Member and Treasurer for Academics Without Borders, St. John Ambulance Council For Ontario and have been involved in the governance of many other organizations.; TD Wealth Specialists work with your family and, when required, tax and legal advisors, to answer questions about: • Wills, trusts, and estates • Executor and trustee services • Strategies to balance your priorities and charitable goals; Empowering Polly to achieve financial success When Polly moved to Canada, she was determined to build a great life for her family. title: Investment Advisor; As an Investment Advisor, Jonathan's mandate is to help you preserve and grow your wealth though tailored investment solutions. Dedication to exceptional client experiences and innovative financial strategies are the foundations of our business. He specializes in drawing on his institutional level experience and deep academic knowledge of portfolio construction to design investment solutions inspired by the approach of some of the world's largest pension plans and private investors. Jonathan will deliver proactive and personal advice, working closely with you to make key decisions about your portfolio that are in line with your goals. Jonathan worked in several roles at TD for almost a decade before joining the team – most recently, at TD Securities Inc., gaining invaluable experience trading a rotating range of asset classes on behalf of the bank and its clients. Jonathan garnered broad-based exposure to the best of the institutional side of the industry, advising pension plans, central banks and large-scale asset managers on topics from macro-economic trends to trade ideas and execution. Prior to his role at TD Securities, Jonathan worked at TD Asset Management, the institutional investment management division of TD Bank. With direct contact to some of the world’s leading portfolio managers, analysts and investment strategists, he provided market outlook commentary and investment strategy advice to clients on behalf of the firm. Jonathan holds an MBA from the Rotman School of Management at the University of Toronto with a major in Finance, specializing in Risk Management and Financial Engineering. Jonathan has earned the Chartered Investment Manager (CIM®) designation, is a Chartered Financial Analyst® (CFA®) Level II candidate, and is licensed in options and derivatives by the Investment Industry Regulatory Organization of Canada (IIROC). Jonathan also holds an undergraduate degree from the University of Western Ontario.
