title: Associate Portfolio Manager; Senior Investment Advisor; Wealth management is all about marrying the right financial elements to achieve your goals. As a seasoned Investment Advisor with over a decade of experience, Jonathan Grant leads the Grant Wealth Management Group, delivering a holistic wealth planning approach to individuals, business owners, business professionals, and their families. Your journey with Jonathan begins with an in-depth discovery process designed to help his team understand your financial goals. Jonathan engages a team of TD Specialists to provide advice on all areas of wealth planning including investments, retirement, insurance, tax, and estate planning strategies. As a holder of the Chartered Investment Manager designation, backed by a Bachelor of Commerce degree in Finance and a diploma in Business Development, Jonathan will help create a comprehensive and customized plan for you and your family that allows you to accumulate, preserve, and transition your wealth with confidence. Whether you are an investor looking for long-term growth, or an individual seeking to plan for retirement, Jonathan's wealth management approach ensures that every client receives the highest level of service coupled with sound, objective investment advice. Jonathan works where he lives. He was born and raised in Orillia and has roots that run several generations deep in the area. Together with his wife Vanessa, sons Cohen and Caleb, and daughter Victoria, he is proud to call the "Sunshine City" his home. Jonathan actively participates in his community as an athlete, a member of First Baptist Church, and fundraising for the Habitat for Humanity golf tournament. He also currently serves as Treasurer and is on the Board of the Kingsview Sponsorship Program, and helps organize the charity's annual golf tournament fundraiser. title: Investment Advisor; Growing up in Winnipeg I learned from a young age the importance of community and how each and every one of us has their own unique story to tell. Through my early days of volunteering and throughout my educational journey, I developed a passion for working with all people which led me to my true calling; listening, guiding and advising people to help them focus on living and enjoying what is most important to them. I have spent over 25 years in the financial services industry as an advisor and senior leader within the wealth management business. The purpose of my current practice is to support the financial well-being and wealth goals of all my clients. I take an inclusive approach with a focus on helping affluent women, business owners and families achieve what matters most to them. I believe in creating authentic, valued and trusted relationships through advising and fostering clients with the tools necessary to help my clients reach their financial goals. These goals are much more attainable and empowering when there is a clearly defined direction. Some may think it is the money and numbers on a spreadsheet that is the goal, but I believe it's the emotionally driven experiences in life that mean the most. Money is simply a means to make it happen. Experiences are the differences you can make in your family, community, or charity. I will work together with you to define these experiences and create a customized wealth plan to help make them happen. This is why I call my process "Experience First Planning." Supporting the community is important. Me and my family are strongly connected to the community, volunteering with several local charitable organizations. I have a passion for the Arts; from opera to ballet, theatre, dance and the visual arts - I believe each of these art forms bring our community together with one voice. I also believe in a healthy body, mind, and spirit. Through exercise I partake in mindfulness meditation, enjoying golf in the summer and ringette gets me through the long Winnipeg winters. The most important experiences are spending time with my husband, two sons, our little dog Jet and our close friends and family.; I have a Bachelor of Commerce Degree and Master of Business Administration (MBA) from Dalhousie University. I hold the Certified Financial Planner (CFP) designations from FP Canada, obtain the membership of the Society of Estate & Trust Practitioners with the (TEP) designation, and also hold my Certified Executor Advisor (CEA) designation from the Canadian Institute of Certified Executor Advisors (CICEA).

title: Senior Portfolio Manager; Senior Investment Advisor; At the heart of what I do is a remarkable purpose to create investment plans that help clients avoid the many pitfalls of investing and make smart decisions with their money. My approach follows a simple process. I get to know my clients and their families which constitute high net worth business owners, professionals, corporations, trusts and estates. Knowing my clients well allows me to better understand their Financial and Retirement goals and build a plan to achieve them. Because these goals change over time we review their situation at least once a year. I then develop Investment Policies and Financial Plans that are tailor made to the client. Following these policies and plans I build and manage diversified investment portfolios using a disciplined investment strategy. I work with TD specialists and tax and legal advisors to help my clients organize the important financial planning areas of their lives.; As a Senior Portfolio Manager and Senior Investment Advisor, I manage investments & help build Wealth Plans for high net worth families. This includes professionals, business owners, corporations, trusts and estates.

title: Portfolio Manager & Investment Advisor; As a Portfolio Manager & Investment Advisor with TD Wealth Private Investment Advice, I provide discretionary investment counseling solutions and services to private and institutional clients. I began my career as a Senior Financial Planner for a major financial institution; specializing in creating tax efficient portfolios for high net worth business owners. Five years later, I was recruited by one of Canada's largest pension investment management firms to work as an analyst. My previous role focused on high yield dividend portfolios for institutional clients. With over 20 years of financial services and investment experience working closely with individuals and families, estates & trusts, corporations and charitable organizations, I can offer my client: Ongoing discovery Timely Reporting Comprehensive portfolio reviews tailored to you A transparent approach to fees A relationship manager supported by a team focusing on helping you achieve your goals The offering is supported by the same high caliber investment methods and rigor used by TD Asset Management with its institutional clients such as pension funds and foundations.

title: Senior Investment Advisor; “We want you to have the most thorough counseling throughout the entire process to provide the most effective solutions, to help you to preserve your capital and to achieve your financial goals.“ ~ Kathryn Del Greco, Senior Investment Advisor; At Del Greco Wealth Management, we believe that an open and ongoing dialogue is key to the success of every relationship. Before we propose any solution or make any recommendation, we will hold in-depth discussions with you and, if you wish, your family members and your other professional advisors. We are committed to providing trusted advice you can rely on.; Before we propose any solution or make any recommendation, we will hold in-depth discussions with you and, if you wish, your family members and your other professional advisors. At the beginning of our relationship, these discussions allow us to gain a thorough understanding of not just your immediate financial goals, but also the long-term aspirations that you and your family share. In addition, our conversations are an opportunity for you to learn about how we work and what you can expect from us. Investment strategies that help to guard your assets from economic, political and investment risk must be combined with an approach that considers the possibility of unexpected health issues, the impact of tax, the future of your business, your transition to retirement, and your family’s legacy. Del Greco Wealth Management have developed a proven wealth management process designed to simplify the complex set of decisions with delivery of relevant, pro-active investment advice that you face when developing a comprehensive wealth management strategy.

title: Associate Portfolio Manager; Senior Investment Advisor; A financial professional for over 15 years, Kathryn joined TD Wealth in October 2010 bringing her passion for holistic wealth management and helping clients achieve a successful financial future. Kathryn knew from an early age she wanted to be an advisor, following in her father's footsteps. Kathryn's knowledge, experience and commitment have developed deep long-lasting relationships with her valued clients. Kathryn and her team strive to help individuals and their families focus on living and enjoy what matters most to them. Through a disciplined portfolio management process and prudent planning, Kathryn works closely to identify clients' unique goals and values, while keeping abreast with the ever-changing market environment. Kathryn believes her clients should have options, so they can navigate the good, the bad, and the unexpected that life brings and be confident in the financial decisions they make and build a legacy they can be proud of. Kathryn holds a Bachelor of Commerce degree (B.Comm.) in Finance from the University of Alberta and studied abroad in Economics at the University of Edinburgh, Scotland and the Philipps University of Marburg, Germany on international exchanges. Kathryn holds the Certified Financial Planner (CFP®) and Chartered Investment Manager (CIM®) designations. She also holds the Certificate in Retirement Strategy issued by the Canadian Securities Institute. Kathryn enjoys hiking in the Rocky Mountains with her family and travelling off the beaten path. She has volunteered with the Special Olympics and Calgary Drop-In Centre.; Legacy Wealth Advisory Group is a part of TD Wealth Private Investment Advice, a division of TD Waterhouse Canada Inc. which is a subsidiary of The Toronto-Dominion Bank.

title: Portfolio Manager & Investment Advisor; With over 25 years of professional and investment experience, I am actively focused on delivering comprehensive and extensive wealth management strategies to clients that promote a robust and deep financial well-being. I am dedicated to the importance of a financial plan and working with clients to anchor their personal financial plans around our four important pillars; Building Net Worth, Implementing Tax- Efficient Strategies, Protecting What Matters and Leaving a Legacy. I will draw upon an expansive network of TD colleagues and specialists to enhance our services available and proactively connect to review your goals and objectives regularly. I hold my Certified Financial Planner (CFP®) designation as well as my Chartered Investment Manager (CIM®) designation and I am an honours graduate from the University of Western Ontario and the University of Ottawa. Outside of work I am passionate about my community involvement, and I volunteer with FP Canada and their exam team for upcoming CFP® candidates. As a Portfolio Manager & Investment Advisor, I provide wealth and portfolio management to clients and a high level of detailed personalized service. Previous to joining TD Wealth Private Investment Advice, I was a Senior Financial Planner for seven years with TD Wealth Financial Planning. title: Senior Investment Advisor; At TD Wealth, we believe that each client’s needs are truly unique. Our goal is to offer you the relevant, customized wealth advice you deserve - and we can do that only by fully understanding you. That’s why we take the time to understand you, your family and your values. Whether your needs are straightforward or complex, we’re dedicated to delivering tailored, comprehensive, wealth management strategies that are rooted in your goals. We will stay in tune with your needs and help ensure you’re on track to achieve the future you envision for yourself. As a TD Wealth Branch Manager, my mandate is to help you preserve and grow your wealth through our tailored investment solutions. I lead a diverse and inclusive team of Investment Advisors charged with seeking to exceed clients’ needs for asset accumulation, preservation and growth at Toronto Summit 10. Our investment philosophy is based on understanding your goals, disciplined planning, insightful advice and effective risk management. This philosophy helps us manage risk and navigate an ever-changing investment landscape. I have been providing my clients with tailored wealth management solutions since 1997, joining TD's management team in 2009. When I’m not engaging with clients, I am actively-involved in a wide range of charitable and community organizations. As the mother of two daughters, I have a special place in my heart for groups that support women and girls: for the last 25+ years, I've supported two children though Plan Canada; I've been a Girl Guide leader and served for many years as president of a non-profit daycare. I continue to fundraise for Sick Kids, the Canadian Women's Foundation and various groups working in Regent Park. Most recently, I became an enthusiastic supporter of Soulpepper Theatre's "Top Women" program, and I continue to be involved with two groups that serve my immediate community: 100 Women Who Care and Heart to Hand. title: Senior Investment Advisor; Meet Kris: Your Trusted Advisor With over two decades of experience in the financial industry, Kris is passionate about helping clients reach their financial goals through tailored financial plans. Kris’ career began in 2005 after graduating from a specialized investment management program. Since then, he has assisted over 500 families in achieving their financial dreams. He holds several designations, including Chartered Investment Manager (CIM®), Financial Management Advisor (FMA), Certified Financial Planner (CFP®), and Chartered International Wealth Manager (CIWM). Kris is a natural problem-solver, viewing wealth management as a series of financial challenges to be addressed. Whether you’re aiming to retire before 60, looking to minimize your tax liabilities, or seeking the best ways to secure your family’s future, Kris is here to guide you. Kris specializes in investment management, income protection, tax management strategies, education funding, estate planning, business succession, and tax-efficient charitable giving strategies. Collaborations with specialists who bring additional expertise in areas such as tax and estate planning, insurance and corporate tax structures is a value add that can pay dividends in your long term plan. This team approach ensures that every aspect of your financial well-being is meticulously managed. Outside of his professional life, Kris is a devoted husband and father. He resides in Truro with his wife, Naomie, their two children, Quinten and Nora, and their big puppy, Fergie. title: LSBB Family Office Our mission is to provide our clients with tailored Investment and Wealth Planning, Portfolio Management Advice, Estate Planning Strategies in collaboration with other TD Specialists and other services. We help our clients navigate through their investment decisions, identify risks that may impact their portfolios and educate them on financial strategies. Our Specialists About Our Team transcript Our History Founded in 1993, LSBB Family Office is one of Canada’s leading wealth management teams, with over $5 billion in assets under administration.* Our team of professionals offers over 100 years of combined wealth management experience to draw from and several members of our team hold various designations, accreditations and degrees including: CFP® - Certified Financial Planner CIM® – Chartered Investment Manager CFA® - Chartered Financial Analyst FMA – Financial Management Advisor FCSI® - Fellow Canadian Securities Institute LL.B. – Bachelor of Laws *$5 billion in assets under management as of April 5, 2023 Contact Us The heart of our practice Standing at the heart of our practice is the one-on-one relationship we build with each client. That relationship is based on, and driven by, a strong level of personal trust, communication and understanding. It covers discretionary and non-discretionary investment planning and lifestyle protection strategies Real estate and education funding Retirement strategic counsel Inter-generational wealth transfer Legacy creation We believe that all are inter-connected and no effective total wealth plan can afford to ignore them. Through our longstanding relationships with accountants, lawyers, estate planning and other professionals, we are positioned to help connect our clients with specialized advice on virtually every aspect of their financial and wealth planning needs. Learn About Our Value Proposition The value that LSBB Family Office brings to our client relationships Our goal is to provide our clients with the highest level of personalized client service. Our mission is to use our extensive experience and resources to deliver the highest quality wealth and investment advice to help our clients achieve their financial goals. title: Senior Investment Advisor; Senior Portfolio Manager; For more than a decade, Lance Scott has been developing a comprehensive suite of investment and wealth management strategies to serve his clients. His expertise has evolved into a specialization around business owners, executives, and the personal and financial components of the retirement transition. Lance has been in the investment industry for over a decade. He is a graduate of the University of Guelph (BComm), where he majored in Management Economics and Finance, and he has earned some of the highest professional designations available, in the Canadian financial industry including Fellow of Canadian Securities Institute (FCSI®), Certified Financial Planner (CFP®) and Chartered Investment Manager (CIM®). Lance and his wife Stephanie have three sons, Grayson, Edison and Elliot. He is an avid sportsman who plays hockey, golf and slo-pitch. A member of the Ingersoll Rotary Club, he is also part of the coaching team for Dorchester Minor Hockey.; Retirement means something different for everyone. ____ Retirement, in the conventional sense of the word, bears little resemblance to the financial and personal transition that owners and executives navigate later in their careers. The move from working to non working is rarely clear cut and it typically involves financial complexities that require the expertise of specialists. Your advisory relationship should save you time. ____ When working with an advisory team, we believe there should be an ease of doing business. This comes from years of experience with owners and executives, but it’s also the result of extra steps we take to help ensure the experience fits into our clients’ busy lives as a kind of one stop solution. Transparency enhances trust. ____ We believe it’s vital that you see the value of your investments, you understand what goes into the recommendations we make, and you always know where you stand with respect to your goals. That’s why we provide clear documentation and reporting at every stage. Good advice simplifies. ____ One of our objectives is to help simplify your financial life. It’s about taking care of time consuming tasks, but also providing a process to get your entire financial household organized and to maintain clarity through intuitive progress reviews.

Laura spends her personal time cheering on her son Luke as he plays his favorite sports, baseball and basketball and walking her two doodles, Caramel and Stormy. title: Lawrence Lee Senior Portfolio Manager; Senior Investment Advisor; At LEE Wealth Advisory Group we believe an open and ongoing dialogue is key to the success of every relationship. Before we propose any solution or make any recommendation, we will hold in depth discussions with you and, if you wish, your family members and your other professional advisors. These discussions allow us to gain a thorough understanding of not just your immediate financial goals, but also the long term aspirations you and your family share. LEE Wealth Advisory Group uses a proven wealth management process designed to simplify the building of your financial future. Relevant, pro active investment advice is a foundation of any wealth management strategy. Our clients expect and receive exceptionally personalized wealth and investment advisory services. Like you, they expect competitive investment returns where security, and the prudent management of risk, is fundamental. Above all, they are looking for a plan. We act for high net worth individuals and their families, holding companies, small business owners, trusts and charitable foundations. We are committed to finding the right investment solutions, confronting challenges along the way and in the end exceeding your expectations. Ultimately, what we do comes down to a simple, old fashioned fact of life. Lawrence began his career in the financial services business in 1995. He oversees the creation of investment and wealth plans and asset allocation models, derived from clients’ stated goals and objectives. Lawrence spends considerable time ensuring that client’s investment portfolios are appropriate to their specific financial needs, stage in life, and risk tolerance. Using the strong resources of TD Securities as well as third party research, Lawrence also devotes much time to analyzing market trends. Lawrence believes that his reputation for excellence has been earned from the quality of his client relationships which are based on mutual respect and trust and an ongoing effort to understand the clients’ needs and objectives. In addition to providing investment advice, Lawrence focuses on insurance, tax and estate issues to help ensure that his client’s wealth is managed in a tax effective manner to meet his objective of minimizing tax for future generations. Lawrence graduated from Ryerson University with a Bachelor of Commerce Degree in Accounting. He joined TD Wealth in 2000 and has been working in an advisory capacity since 2004. Previous to that, he has held positions with TD Direct Investing on the Presidents Desk servicing high net worth clients. He also worked on the mutual fund, fixed income and Wealth Support specialty desks where he was supporting financial planners’ clients asset allocation and portfolio rebalance. Lawrence has been working with high net worth clients and their families for more than 20 years. Lawrence has been awarded the prestigious designation of Fellow of Canadian Securities Institute FCSI®. Recognized as the highest honor in the financial services industry, the FCSI® is given only to industry professionals whose superior training and experience exemplify excellence. His other designations included Chartered Investment Manager (CIM®), which enables him to counsel individuals and organizations on complex wealth management issues beyond the scope of basic investment plans. Through his CIM® designation, Lawrence has gained expertise in servicing affluent clients and their unique needs. Lawrence is a Life Insurance Advisor through TD Wealth Insurance Services. When not at the office, Lawrence enjoys his leisure time with his wife and two young boys. He also enjoys vacations, his children's activities and watching sports.; TD Wealth Specialists work with your family and, when required, tax and legal advisors, to answer questions about: • Wills, trusts, and estates • Executor and trustee services • Strategies to balance your priorities and charitable goals

title: Senior Investment Advisor; Directly after completing my university studies, I entered the financial services industry in 1998. Early on in my career, it was apparent I had a passion for helping families plan for their future well-being. I have a deep-seeded desire to help others succeed. I genuinely enjoy getting to know each client on an individual level, understanding their dreams and goals, so I can craft meaningful, custom wealth plans to help them achieve their aspirations for the future. As a Senior Investment Advisor at Ainslie & Burrows Private Wealth Management Group at TD Wealth Private Investment Advice, I can provide the full-service opportunities my clients deserve. I have been with TD for over 23 years. Advising high net worth clients on their investments within a well-developed plan is my specialty and has been my focus for the last 18 years. Each client is unique, which makes every day different. I love that aspect of my job; it keeps it interesting and personal. I am truly grateful for the connections and relationships I've made throughout my career thus far and appreciate our clients' trust in our process and advice. Credentials Certified Financial Planner (CFP)® designation - considered the standard for the financial planning profession worldwide. Professionals with this designation have demonstrated the knowledge, skills, experience and ethics to examine their clients’ entire financial picture, at the highest level of complexity required of the profession, and work with their clients to build a financial plan they are confident in. Certificate in Retirement Strategy – a focused program on strategies for retirement planning: goals-based investing expertise, wealth conversion, tax strategies and structures, sustainable withdrawal rates and wealth protection. Studied Honours Bachelor of Business Administration from Brock University 23+ years of industry experience Family & community On the personal side, I was born in England but moved to Canada at an early age. I have lived in the Niagara Region ever since. I am so grateful for my parents and my upbringing. I watched them work extremely hard and persevere through many challenges to keep a roof over our heads. My strong family values and work ethic were inherited from them. I am incredibly blessed to have married my best friend, and we now have a beautiful family of our own. We have four active children, 2 boys and 2 girls that bring us a tremendous amount of joy. Our children are involved in basketball, soccer, volleyball and golf. Being able to watch them grow has been priceless. I am involved in the community in many ways, with most of the time spent coaching soccer and sponsoring youth sports. Providing sponsorship to ease the financial burden of today's sports on families is something I feel is very important in creating a culture of unity and belief. I recently made the change to coaching a girls soccer team in Niagara that participates in the Ontario Player Development League – and I am enjoying every minute.

title: Portfolio Manager & Investment Advisor; I subscribe to the principle of total wealth management and look at the lives and values of my clients comprehensively. Attentive, accessible, and easy to talk to - my approach to our relationship and your wealth management builds understanding, provides clarity, cements trust, improves accuracy, and aims to get results. Private wealth investment management is a premium level of wealth management designed to free you from the day-to-day details of managing your wealth. It is an advisor-managed account where you delegate responsibility for day-to-day investment decisions to an accredited portfolio manager. I am particularly experienced at helping physicians and their families navigate, grow, and preserve their wealth, however I have demonstrated expertise guiding people from all kinds of backgrounds through life's complications and challenges. Be it starting or transitioning a business, life changes such as expanding your family or going through divorce, or milestones such as downsizing or retirement. My commitment is to provide clarity during complexity and smooth sailing during turbulence, A steady hand on the steering wheel keeping your plan on track while you focus on other important aspects of life. Please reach out today - it would be my pleasure and privilege to be with you on the path ahead.

title: Senior Portfolio Manager & Senior Investment Advisor; As a Senior Portfolio Manager with TD Wealth, I specialize in providing comprehensive wealth management services to high-net-worth individuals, foundations, not-for-profit organizations, and trusts. Our clientele includes senior executives (CEOs, CFOs), legal and medical professionals, entrepreneurs, business owners, lottery winners, beneficiaries of large inheritances, and trustees. At TD Wealth, we are committed to gaining a deep understanding of each client’s unique priorities and financial objectives. This enables us to create tailored investment strategies that align with their individual goals. By leveraging applied behavioral finance, we identify potential financial blind spots and work with clients to improve decision-making and optimize outcomes. Our services are underpinned by the same rigorous methodologies that TD Asset Management applies when managing assets for pension funds and foundations. We aim to deliver superior risk-adjusted returns while providing comprehensive wealth strategies focused on building net worth, implementing tax-efficient solutions, safeguarding assets, and establishing a lasting legacy.

title: Portfolio Manager; Senior Investment Advisor; Choosing the right investments has become a challenge in recent times. Faced with a growing number of investment options, a very challenging market environment, and ever-changing tax laws, clients need skilled assistance to make the right choices. Proper management of their investments requires careful research and continual monitoring. As an Investment Advisor, I am dedicated to the enhancement and preservation of individual and institutional investment assets. My integrated wealth management process begins by collaborating with my clients. My goal is to help my clients and their institution develop integrated, comprehensive and customized financial solutions. Some examples of wealth management solutions include: Maximize after-tax income now and provide an estate equal to the original capital with the insured annuity strategy. Use an individual investment shelter strategy to protect extra assets from tax. Have enough critical illness insurance to stop loss and protect assets. Pay less tax and leave more with the corporate investment shelter strategy. Let your life insurance pay your taxes through an asset protection plan strategy. Through the decisions we make together, a wealth management strategy evolves to take on a distinctly individual shape, reflecting your investment objectives and aspirations. My philosophy is to practice total return investing using a balanced approach through the use of pension-style managed money, with a focus on tax efficiency. Most of my clients look for an investment strategy that includes yield-first capital preservation and reasonable growth. I welcome an opportunity to speak with you.; TD Wealth Specialists work with your family and, when required, tax and legal advisors, to answer questions about: • Wills, trusts, and estates • Executor and trustee services • Strategies to balance your priorities and charitable goals

title: Senior Investment Advisor; Over the last 25 years, Marc has built a solid reputation in the financial field. As one of the founding members of Larente Baksh & Associates, he takes pride in the sense of leadership he brings to bring to this team. The group is one of the few to have passed the 1 billion under management threshold within Canada. In leading the investment committee of the group, his mandate is to set the investment guidelines followed by all the group's portfolio managers. His philosophy is simple and effective: optimize the risk/return of the portfolios. This is done by choosing exclusively investment grade instruments put on the market by companies who, at the time of purchase, have a solid balance sheet and an impeccable track record. His prime concern is always safeguarding our client's capital. Specializations: • Investment strategies geared towards income • Sectorial asset allocation • Macro-Economic analysis He currently sits on the board at the Montreal Children's Hospital foundation. He enjoys giving much of his time to organizations which help improve sick children's quality of life. He is also very involved in fundraising initiatives for many organizations in Montreal including ones for the St. Mary's and St. Justine hospitals and Place des Arts. By his side through everything he does is his family. He has two children, Nick and Emma, that he is very proud of. As well as his beautiful and caring wife of over 20 years, Heidi.

title: Portfolio Manager; Senior Investment Advisor; Mark has been an Investment Advisor with TD Wealth Private Investment Advice for the past half decade. He is primarily charged with performing investment research, financial planning, insurance strategies, and building relationships with affluent clients. Mark is also an integral part of the team’s investment committee, providing research and insight on investment decisions. Prior to serving affluent individuals, families and business owners, Mark worked as an audit professional for one of the Big Four accounting firms. He earned a Bachelor of Commerce degree from McGill University and holds his Certified Financial Planner (CFP®) designation. Mark holds a Chartered Financial Analyst (CFA®) designation, a globally recognized designation that attests to the competence and integrity of investment professionals who have earned the right to use it. When not in the office, Mark enjoys spending time with his family and close friends or scanning the treeline in search of his golf ball.

title: Senior Portfolio Manager & Senior Investment Advisor; With over 25 years of financial services and investment experience, I am actively focused on providing comprehensive wealth management solutions to individuals and families, estates & trusts, and charitable and business organizations. As a Portfolio Manager with TD Wealth Private Investment Advice, I provide a high level of personalized service for my clients. I work with a talented group of TD specialists and have complete access to their expertise and the resources of TD Wealth and TD Bank Group. My role is to create a fully integrated and comprehensive wealth plan for my clients, by having the appropriate TD specialists brought in when required, to apply their specialized knowledge to a particular situation. This can range from investment management, to estate planning, and to credit and insurance needs. This collaboration is crucial to my client’s evolving needs from the accumulation of wealth to the preservation and transitioning of their wealth through every stage of their life. I am a graduate of Ryerson University with a Bachelor of Business Management, and hold the Chartered Financial Analyst (CFA) designation. I am a member of the CFA Institute, as well as a member and Past-President of the Ottawa CFA Society. I hold the Personal Financial Planner Designation and I have also completed other industry courses such as the Certificate in Retirement Strategy. I am a Life Insurance Advisor with TD Wealth Insurance Services. Outside of work, I enjoy spending time with my wife and two children, enjoying tennis, cycling and skiing, and I volunteer as a board member for a local not-for-profit organization.; Putting finances into perspective As small business owners, Nick and Justina make a powerhouse team, supporting each other through ups and downs. title: Senior Portfolio Manager; At Wrobel Wealth Advisory Group WWAG, our practice uniquely focuses on helping “peak earners” and retirees effectively and efficiently plan for their future. Our deliberate, consultative and respectful approach to your Wealth is driven by a deep understanding of you and your financial needs. Our goal is to ensure you meet these needs in the most cost and tax efficient manner possible so you can keep more. As a client of the group, Mark, his team and other TD specialists have the expertise to assist you with: Customized portfolio design and asset allocation Make sure your portfolio is a reflection of your needs Tax efficient income generation Keep more for yourself Tax minimization strategies Pay less to CRA Comprehensive Estate planning strategies to help preserve your Wealth including: Trust Services: Protect your estate and your heirs from undue taxes and unforeseen events Will Review Service: Ensure your heirs get what you want them to get Insurance Strategies: Reduce estate taxes so your heirs keep more Charitable Giving Strategies: Fund your most important causes tax efficiently Family business transitioning Make sure your family's needs are considered no matter who’s in charge Executive Stock Monetization Diversify your assets to help you to reduce risk Our client base is built on referrals. We believe our success is based on an unyielding commitment to integrity and transparency, coupled with an unparalleled dedication to best-in-class advice and service. Whether you are just thinking ahead, have had a significant life event, or are simply yearning for a more tailored approach to your wealth, call or email us today for a second opinion so that we can help you to preserve and build upon your financial future. title: Senior Portfolio Manager; Senior Investment Advisor; Marley began his career with TD Wealth in 2006 and is a Senior Portfolio Manager and Senior Investment Advisor. He is deeply committed to lifelong learning and continually expands his knowledge to better serve and guide his clients in a constantly changing financial landscape. He also believes in empowering clients through education, helping them gain confidence in every financial decision they make. An early interest in investing and a natural talent for mathematics led him to pursue formal studies in Financial Management and Accounting at BCIT. He has since complemented his education with the Financial Management Advisor (FMA), Certified International Wealth Manager (CIWM), and Chartered Investment Manager (CIM®) designations, credentials that support his role as a Senior Portfolio Manager. As such, he works closely with the team to design, execute, and monitor customized investment strategies, always with a comprehensive wealth planning approach at the core of the practice. Beyond portfolio management, he channels his love of writing into a quarterly newsletter that keeps clients informed and engaged on the team's current views of the financial environment. Rooted in a rich blend of cultures, Marley proudly honours his Jamaican heritage from his father’s side and his Polish-Ukrainian roots from his mother’s. His mother’s story, in particular, shaped his outlook on life — she grew up as one of many siblings on a hard-working farm in Pine River, a tiny northern Manitoba town known for its long winters and rugged spirit. As soon as she was old enough, she traded the bitter cold and fields for the sunshine and ocean breezes, finally settling in Victoria where Marley was born. Outside of the office you'll typically find Marley playing any combination of sports when the sun shines and on the top of a ski hill when the snow falls. That same adventurous spirit has transcended into a desire to understand new cultures and he; his wife, son and daughter strive to travel somewhere in the world they've never been, at least once a year. He values quality time with his family above all else — a perspective that guides his commitment to helping clients plan for what truly matters most in their own lives.

title: Masanobu Hayashi Senior Investment Advisor; As your dedicated investment advisor, I strive to provide an exceptional client experience utilizing my 25+ years of industry experience along with the professional knowledge I have acquired through obtaining the Certified Financial Planner designation. The first step in building client relationships is to understand the needs and goals of the client. With the client's goals defined, I then create a personalized financial plan and make recommendations for the portfolio to support the plan. I am committed to stay connected with my clients in order to be able to address their changing needs and address market changes by providing relevant and timely communications. An annual progress review helps to ensure that clients can stay on track and can help them to meet their goals and discover any new and evolving financial priorities. I also help clients develop integrated wealth management solutions by engaging TD specialists as needed. TD specialists can assist with taxation, financial protection for the family, estate planning, and private banking services. title: Investment Advisor; Matthew Cleveland is an Investment Advisor with TD Wealth Private Investment Advice, based in Ottawa. He utilizes a client-first approach grounded in trust, clarity, and straightforward communication—helping clients make confident decisions so their wealth plan supports the life they want to live. His priority is building long-term relationships through a deep understanding of what matters most to you and your family. Matthew believes wealth planning works best when it reflects your goals, responsibilities, and values, so your financial strategy complements your life, not the other way around. With over 20 years of experience at TD, Matthew brings a seasoned perspective shaped by consistency, discipline, and dedication. The concept of Kaizen, or continuous improvement, is central to his professional philosophy, guiding an ongoing process of refining strategies as markets evolve, priorities shift, and life changes. Matthew takes a comprehensive approach to wealth management, integrating investment management and wealth planning with tax efficient strategies and a multi-generational approach, designed to help preserve and grow family wealth over time. title: Senior Investment Advisor; As a Senior Investment Advisor, with 17 years of experience at TD, my mandate is to help you preserve and grow your wealth though tailored investment solutions. Dedication to exceptional client experiences and innovative financial strategies are the foundations of our business. I will deliver proactive and personal advice, working closely with you to make key decisions about your portfolio that are in line with your goals. Born and raised in Calgary, I possess a deep understanding of the nuances of living, working, and raising a family in Calgary. I'm a husband and father of three children (2 boys, 1 girl). I'm actively involved in our community as a passionate hockey fan. I enjoy playing, but also spend my time as a volunteer coach with our local hockey association, the NorthWest Warriors. Outside of TD, you can find me at the hockey rink, the dance studio, the golf course or anywhere else that keeps our family active. I started my career at TD in 2007 and have been working closely with clients on a one-on-one basis for nearly two decades. title: Portfolio Manager; Investment Advisor; Background Matthew has been working in the financial services industry since 2009; over that time, he has developed a disciplined, systematic investment process specifically designed to help high net worth families and businesses accumulate and protect their wealth. Through extensive experience and research, Matt has learned that by investing in companies that not only pay dividends, but consistently grow their dividends, clients are able to enhance their assets over time while also increasing their long-term sustainable cash flow. After obtaining an undergraduate degree in Business at the University of Guelph, Matthew went on to complete additional coursework and currently holds the Chartered Financial Analyst (CFA®) designation. He is licensed to use a wide range of investment products to help clients meet their goals. Matthew is part of a select group of Portfolio Managers who are able to provide access to the Privately Managed Program, TD Wealth’s premier discretionary investment management offering. He is also a Life Insurance Advisor with TD Wealth Insurance Services. Outside of work, Matthew can be found with his wife and growing children. A firm believer in the importance of giving back to the community, Matthew and his wife are active in their kid's activities and local community. HighPoint Family Wealth Management is a part of TD Wealth Private Investment Advice, a division of TD Waterhouse Canada Inc. which is a subsidiary of The Toronto-Dominion Bank.; TD Wealth Specialists work with your family and, when required, tax and legal advisors, to answer questions about: • Wills, trusts, and estates • Executor and trustee services • Strategies to balance your priorities and charitable goals

title: Portfolio Manager; Born and raised in Ottawa, Matt graduated with a Bachelor of Commerce (Finance) degree from the University of Ottawa. Soon after, he began his financial services career with TD Direct Investing as an Investment Representative. Most recently, he spent five years at MD Management as a Senior Financial Consultant, providing investment advice and financial planning services to physicians and their families. Having always wanted to become a full-service Portfolio Manager, Matt took the opportunity in March of 2017 to join TD Wealth Private Investment Advice and the Momentum Wealth Management team. Matt's investment offering focuses on selecting high quality value investments with strong accounting fundamentals, as well as the implementation of tax efficient and globally diversified portfolios. In order to better align his clients' financial goals with their investment portfolio, Matt believes in creating a customized wealth plan for each client. In collaboration with TD specialists, these tailored plans focus on the various areas of wealth management such as retirement analysis, tax efficiency, business succession strategies, private corporations, trusts, charitable giving strategies, estate planning, and legacy building. Outside of work, Matt loves spending time with his family. He also enjoys various sports, particularly hockey, golf, and rock climbing.

title: Senior Investment Advisor; With over 20 years of experience in wealth management, Matt helps individuals, families, and business owners navigate the complexities of building, protecting, and transitioning wealth. He works closely with clients nearing retirement, already retired, or actively building toward long-term financial goals. Matt provides personalized advice in areas such as retirement planning, investment management, income protection, tax-efficient strategies, estate and legacy planning, education funding, business succession, and charitable giving. When appropriate, he collaborates with TD specialists to deliver well-rounded, integrated solutions. Grounded, calm, and down to earth, Matt is passionate about helping clients set clear goals, make thoughtful decisions, and stay focused through changing markets. He’s committed to building lasting relationships and creating plans that evolve as life does. Matt holds the Certified Financial Planner (CFP®) and Chartered Investment Manager (CIM®) designations, along with a Financial Services and Planning Diploma from Medicine Hat College. He also studied Computer Information Systems at DeVry University. Outside the office, Matt stays active with endurance training and trail ultramarathons, embracing the same discipline and long-term mindset he encourages in his clients. He’s also a hands-on dad to two amazing kids—Tessa, an extremely driven competitive dancer, and Tucker, who enjoys fencing, skateboarding, and bringing his creative imagination to life. As a family, they love traveling, spending time outdoors in the summer, and skiing during the winter. At home, Matt usually has a project or two on the go—whether it’s something hands-on, techy, or just a new challenge to figure out. If you’re ready to build a stronger financial future with advice tailored to your goals, Matt would be happy to connect.

title: Senior Investment Advisor; Senior Portfolio Manager; Whether he’s challenging himself through high-intensity workouts, hiking along Gaff Point, supporting causes that are meaningful to him and his clients, playing a round of golf, or playing fetch with his golden retriever, Charlie, Michael approaches everything he does with intention and care. That same focus is at the core of how he supports clients—through detailed, personalized wealth plans designed to grow, protect, and preserve their wealth over time. Since 1996, Michael has worked closely with individuals, families, and business owners to help them navigate the complexities of their financial lives with clarity and confidence. He holds a Bachelor of Commerce from Saint Mary’s University, along with the Chartered Investment Manager (CIM®), Certified Financial Planner (CFP®), and Financial Management Advisor (FMA) designations. As a Portfolio Manager, he is licensed to provide discretionary investment management, tailoring decisions to align with each client’s long-term goals and risk profile. Michael is also deeply involved in his community, often supporting charitable organizations on behalf of his clients or in recognition of meaningful moments in their lives. He currently serves on the finance committee for the Health Services Foundation of the South Shore and provides financial support to a variety of causes including wildlife protection, education, the environment, hospice care, and community health—reflecting his belief in giving back in meaningful and lasting ways.

title: Senior Portfolio Manager & Senior Investment Advisor; With over 30 years of investment experience, I am actively focused on providing comprehensive wealth management solutions to individuals and families, estates & trusts, and charitable and business organizations. As a Senior Portfolio Manager with TD Wealth Private Investment Advice, my practice is based on trust and with the prudent stewardship that is essential to striving to deliver exceptional client service. I work with a talented group of TD specialists and have complete access to their expertise and the resources of TD Bank Group. My role is to create a fully integrated and comprehensive plan for my clients, by ensuring that the appropriate TD specialists are brought in when required, to apply their specialized knowledge to a particular situation. This can range from investment management, to estate planning, and to credit and insurance needs. This relationship is crucial to my client's evolving needs from the accumulation of wealth to the preservation and transitioning of their wealth through every stage of their life. In my past experience, I have been called upon by the Ontario Superior Court of Justice to provide Witness Testimony regarding Portfolio Management. I obtained the Canadian Investment Manager (CIM) designation in 1997 and I am a licensed Life Insurance Advisor with TD Wealth Insurance Services. I am a honours graduate of Seneca College's Business Administration program.

title: Investment Advisor; At TD Wealth, we stay in tune with your needs and help ensure you're on track to achieve the future you envision for yourself. As your needs and priorities evolve, your wealth strategy will evolve with you. Through regular contact, we routinely assess your investment portfolio and goals, ensuring you are introduced to the right specialists at the right time and that your investment portfolio is aligned to your vision of success. As your Investment Advisor I first and foremost pride myself on my investment expertise. In addition, I act as your relationship manager connecting you and your family to a core team of TD Specialists with experience in everything from estate & trust planning and philanthropy, to business succession, private banking, tax planning, and charitable giving. Together, we will work to help you achieve your stated goals. Since 2002 I have been active in the financial services industry in various progressive roles. Since joining TD in 2012 I have held the roles of Regional Vice President, Investment Advisor, and in 2017 I joined the TD Wealth Leadership Team as Branch Manager of the Windsor office. In 2001 I graduated with an Honours Bachelor of Commerce Degree from Queen's University and in 2008 I earned my MBA designation with distinction from the Schulich School of Business, York University. My wife and I currently live in the Windsor area and we have three very active boys. title: Senior Portfolio Manager; Senior Investment Advisor; As an Investment Advisor at TD Wealth Private Investment Advice, High Net Worth Individuals and Families are my specialty. By focusing on the affluent I am intimately familiar with their unique needs and the most appropriate solutions available. Whether its tax or estate planning, business succession or planning for retirement, TD Wealth Private Investment Advice brings you a network of resources that specializes in solving challenges unique to this class of investor. Getting to Know You We start the process by getting to know you better. Discussing your needs, wishes, and plans for both your money and your family. Information Gathering Creating a Goal Based plan means more than just learning about your finances. With every decision and recommendation we consider your complete life plan. Customized Plan Each portfolio is customized to your specific needs and wishes documented in your Investment Policy Statement (IPS). From building a retirement portfolio to creating a life income plan, your plan is tailored made to you. Maintenance / Communication Plan Your IPS outlines the foundation of your portfolio and our communication plan. Your communication plan outlines the frequency of our meetings, if you wish to make changes to your plan or we recommend changes. title: Senior Investment Advisor; Discovering and planning for what truly matters to you TD Wealth Private Wealth Management offers wealth and investment management solutions to a select group of personal and institutional clients. Our specialists have extensive experience working with high-net-worth and ultra-high-net-worth Canadian families and understand their distinct needs – but one size doesn’t fit all. We specialize in working with clients who understand the value of tailored service and advice. What we do We start by engaging in a balanced discovery conversation. This process harnesses the cutting-edge field of behavioural finance, so that we can better understand your Wealth Personality; what influences your wealth decisions and what matters most to you. We engage in a unique and collaborative consultation to fully understand your financial needs, priorities and goals. Family, business and experience are all considered. With a deep understanding of your priorities, a lead advisor connects you with a core team of TD specialists with expertise in everything from investment, estate and trust planning and philanthropy, to business succession and tax planning. Through our discovery process we’ll connect you to the right relationship manager, who based on your specific needs, will build a team of specialists around you to help achieve your vision of success. A wealth strategy that changes as you do As your needs evolve, so will the services and solutions we can provide. We'll be in touch with you on an ongoing basis to provide you with advice and information relevant to your unique financial journey. And when you need advice, we'll be there with breadth of our expertise and the personalized attention you deserve. title: Senior Investment Advisor; Based in Oakville, Michael has been providing comprehensive wealth management advice and solutions to affluent families and business alike for over 17 years. title: Michael Holford Investment Advisor; Your wealth team for life. We are a wealth team that cares and we will strive to prove it to you day after day. You’ve done a great job amassing capital, and we owe it to you to help you to protect and enhance it. Drawing upon our conservative approach and the expansive network of TD specialists, we help you to protect and grow your assets by focusing on risk minimization and downside protection. With our combined financial experience of over 50 years, we’ve learned that most investors value two major themes: Preservation of Capital is more important than the pursuit of gain, and Clients are generally not as brave as some advisors think they are. In short, we can help you live more comfortably today, and enjoy greater success over the long term by designing conservative, disciplined and structured wealth strategies that are designed to be simple to understand and follow. title: Calgary Branch Michael Thakkar Senior Investment Advisor; Senior Portfolio Manager; Michael bought his first stock when he was sixteen years old, and instantly fell in love with the markets. After completing his MBA in Finance from the University of British Columbia and working in the Canadian Diplomatic Service as Vice Consul at the Consulate General in Milan, Italy, Michael entered the Wealth Management business in 2000. Since that time, Michael has been a wealth steward for the families he works with, always with a commitment to help them define and achieve their financial goals. Michael's approach is rooted in the four pillars of wealth management at TD Wealth: building net worth through careful portfolio construction; implementing tax efficient strategies; protecting what matters; and leaving a legacy. Michael's career in the industry is deeply anchored to two passions. The first is that his trusted client relationships are a sacred privilege and something to be guarded and cultivated. And the second is his love of the markets. Michael is constantly reading, studying, and seeking to understand domestic and global markets - and he uses that knowledge to help create success for his clients in their wealth strategies. Michael holds the Chartered Investment Manager (CIM®) designation and is licensed as a Portfolio Manager. As a result he can offer both discretionary portfolio management along with traditional brokerage models to his clients. Michael is also a Life Insurance Advisor through TD Wealth Insurance Services and by engaging TD specialists he can offer his clients access to a full suite of wealth products such as will and estate planning, banking and credit services, and investment planning. Michael is married to an amazing woman Clara, an Anglican Priest who is currently working on her PhD. He has two adult daughters that are the pride of his life. Michael is committed to giving back to the community through charitable causes and sport. Michael currently sits on the Board of Trustees for the Bethany Care Society and he has volunteered with refugee relief in Calgary. Michael was also the past President of the Association of Shotokan Karate and was a member of the Canadian Ski Patrol. Michael also enjoys playing his guitar, and golfing, hiking and camping in the beautiful Alberta Rockies. The Ballendine Thakkar Group is a part of TD Wealth Private Investment Advice, a division of TD Waterhouse Canada Inc. which is a subsidiary of The Toronto-Dominion Bank.; TD Wealth Specialists work with your family and, when required, tax and legal advisors, to answer questions about: • Wills, trusts, and estates • Executor and trustee services • Strategies to balance your priorities and charitable goals

title: Senior Portfolio Manager; Senior Investment Advisor; As a Senior Portfolio Manager and Senior Investment Advisor with TD Wealth Private Investment Advice, Michael specializes in managing the complex financial affairs and daily investment management for some of the most successful individuals, corporate investment accounts and Trusts. Michael was born and raised in Ottawa, and began his career there in 1991, holding management positions at a major Canadian bank. In 1995, Michael moved to Midland, Ontario to advance his career and follow his passion for investment management. Since 2005, Michael’s approach as an active Portfolio Manager includes an investment approach that is tailored to each client’s unique set of needs. Michael follows a disciplined approach to investing, executes a solid foundation of professionalism matched with a passion for building and maintaining rewarding relationships with clients. Within TD Wealth Private Investment Advice, Michael and his team, the Thor Wealth Management Group, have been providing their clients with sound investment advice for over 30 years, and currently manage in excess of $659 million of client assets as of July 31st, 2023. When asked what he is most proud of, he says that "It is the long-term client relationship and earning our clients' deepest trust that dates back to when I first moved to Midland in 1995." Passionate about providing exceptional service and customized wealth solutions, Michael works closely with clients to create highly-tailored personalized wealth plans to help grow and protect their wealth. Continued industry education is a top priority for Michael as he holds the Fellow of Canadian Securities Institute (FCSI®), Professional Financial Planner (PFP), Canadian Investment Manager (CIM), and Financial Management Advisor (FMA) designations, allowing him to become a Portfolio Manager. As a Portfolio Manager, Michael can provide discretionary portfolio management service to his clients and take care of the day-to-day decisions of his clients' investment portfolios, so that his clients can focus on whatever they enjoy. Outside of work, Michael enjoys spending time with his family, wife Sarah and 3 children.

title: Senior Portfolio Manager & Senior Investment Advisor; My TD journey started in 2004 with TD Canada Trust where I discovered I had a passion for helping clients make smart financial decisions. After building a strong foundational understanding of personal banking and investments, I made the decision to specialize in wealth management and began my career with TD Wealth Private Investment Counsel in 2009. In 2026, our practice migrated to TD Wealth Private Investment Advice, where we continue to offer discretionary wealth management services to high net worth clients. As a Senior Portfolio Manager & Senior Investment Advisor, I am focused on structuring customized investment strategies designed around my clients' specific goals. I am a strong believer that an effective strategy begins with a plan and I welcome the opportunity to truly understand my clients. Their current circumstances, who matters most, their goals, their dreams, their concerns, their fears, and what they envision for their future. From there, I develop a customized Wealth Plan, leveraging TD specialists to fine tune complex strategies when needed. Change is inevitable, and wealth management is no exception. As a commitment to my clients, I am continuously looking for ways to stay current and sharpen my skills. In addition to regularly attending external conferences and seminars, I have worked diligently to earn a number of highly respected industry designations. I am a CFA charterholder which is awarded by the CFA Institute, and I also hold the Certified Financial Planner designation awarded by the Financial Planning Standards Council, and the Chartered Investment Manager designation awarded by the Canadian Securities Institute. title: Heritage Wealth Management Group Navigating your financial journe We are a family-based advisory group that assists individuals and families in managing the dynamics and complexities of their wealth with discipline and long-term strategic thinking. We believe every exciting journey requires a plan – your financial journey does as well. We begin with establishing a clear vision of what is important to you, then work together to create strategies that will help make that vision a reality. Whether it’s reaching goals for a comfortable retirement, planning strategies for a tax-smart estate that transfers wealth seamlessly to loved ones, or leaving a meaningful legacy for future generations, our goal is to guide you to make wise decisions on your financial journey. transcript Our clients are entrepreneurs, professionals, public servants and retirees – people who have worked hard for their savings and appreciate our commitment to conservative and tailored investment strategies. Joshua Ralph , Investment Advisor, leads our team and has been providing wealth advice for nearly two decades. An exceptional client experience is the cornerstone of Joshua’s business and he strives to be consistently attentive to clients’ ongoing needs. Knowledgeable and approachable, Joshua and his team will work closely with you and TD specialists to develop a full suite of holistic wealth strategies for the long-term, while attending to near-term needs efficiently and thoroughly. As a family-based team (Joshua and Susan are husband and wife, Sasha is Susan’s daughter), we believe we are uniquely positioned to understand our clients’ family relationships. Where appropriate, we take a multi-generational approach to wealth management and aim to be an advisory team the entire family can rely on. As our name suggests, preserving a family’s heritage of lasting wealth is our priority. Learn More Here Heritage Wealth Management Group is a part of TD Wealth Private Investment Advice, a division of TD Waterhouse Canada Inc. which is a subsidiary of The Toronto-Dominion Bank.

title: Portfolio Manager; Senior Investment Advisor; As the founder of the Medicine Hat Wealth Group, Neil has become a prominent wealth manager in Southeastern Alberta. In addition to advising those nearing or in retirement, Neil assists small business owners with their specialized needs such as transitioning the ownership of their business tax-effectively. To help clients manage the many aspects of their financial planning, Neil has obtained the Certified Financial Planner (CFP®), Chartered Investment Manager (CIM®), Certified International Wealth Manager (CIWM) and Fellow of Canadian Securities Institute (FCSI®) designations. Through the CIWM designation, Neil has a deep understanding of the impacts of US tax codes and resulting estate issues. As a Portfolio Manager, Neil is qualified to offer discretionary portfolio management, freeing you from having to make daily investment decisions, along with many other potential benefits. Areas of advice offered include investment management, income protection, tax management strategies, education funding, estate planning, business succession, and tax-efficient charitable giving strategies, engaging TD specialists where needed. Married (Kari) with two daughters (Karli & Reesa), Neil loves to spend his free time golfing, running and travelling to unique interesting spots around the globe with his family and friends. To discuss how I can help you build a strong and secure financial future for you and your family, please contact me.

title: Portfolio Manager; Passion with a Purpose For nearly 20 years we have been providing professional investment advice and integrated wealth planning to business owners, incorporated professionals, executives and affluent retirees. Over the years, we developed and refined a process to address their financial needs and challenges – we call it Wealth Optimizer . Wealth Optimizer is a checklist manifesto we use to help determine what is important to you and and how best to structure your financial life for success. Our mission Our mission is to work with you to help simplify, plan and strategically invest for a better tomorrow. We do not believe in a one-size fits all approach. We believe you are unique, and that your financial goals are important and relevant. We believe you and your family deserve access to professional, unbiased advice, on how to plan and invest successfully in today’s markets. Our aim is to work with you on this essential journey, to be there when you need us, to be thinking of you at every turn, increasing our commitment to you and your family along the way. Advice you can trust Neil holds the highly sought after Chartered Financial Analyst (CFA) and Chartered Market Technician (CMT) designations. Less than one-percent of Canadian Advisors possess these distinguished accreditations placing him in an elite group of advisors. His research has been published on Bay and Wall Street and he has authored over 250 articles on investing, retirement planning and wealth management for Sun Media. Neil is a licensed Portfolio Manager, Investment Advisor & Insurance Advisor with TD Wealth Insurance Services Inc.; Murray Wealth Advisory Group is a part of TD Wealth Private Investment Advice, a division of TD Waterhouse Canada Inc. which is a subsidiary of The Toronto-Dominion Bank.

title: Senior Portfolio Manager & Senior Investment Advisor; Genuine Stewardship… Entrusting us with your financial affairs is a responsibility we don’t take lightly. Your Portfolio Manager has a duty to act in your best interest. We are committed to service excellence, transparency and cost effective management of your portfolio. What we do…. As a Senior Portfolio Manager with TD Wealth Private Investment Advice, Nevada's primary role is to provide counsel to his clients, specifically to develop and implement investment strategies tailored to help meet their individual needs. He is fully integrated within TD Wealth to provide comprehensive advice for clients by ensuring the appropriate TD specialists are brought in to apply their expertise. Through our unique discovery process Nevada's key objectives in his role are to help clients build net worth, implement investment portfolios that incorporate tax-efficient strategies, reduce risks by protecting what matters to his clients and engaging TD specialists who can help clients to structure an estate plan so that they can, if they choose to, leave a legacy that aligns to their values. Nevada Mohammed is a Senior Portfolio Manager with TD Wealth Private Investment Advice which specializes in discretionary investment portfolio management. Nevada began his career in Investment Banking as a Vice-President, Trading Foreign Exchange with TD Securities from 1992-1997. In 1997, he moved to London, England where he was a Vice President & Discretionary Portfolio Manager with Lloyds Private Bank and Vice-President with Coutts & Co. In his most recent role before returning to TD in Vancouver, Nevada was a Director for Citi Institutional Client Group N.A., overseeing all investment business for Citi Private Bank in Western Canada. Nevada has over 25 years of investment experience. Nevada attended university on academic scholarship and holds a bachelor of Business Administration degree with majors in Finance and Economic. He is a Chartered Financial Analyst (CFA) Chareterholder and a member in good standing with the United Kingdom Society of Investment Professional (UKSIP) and the Vancouver and London CFA Societies. Nevada lives in Vancouver, has been married for 20 years and has one child. In his spare time he enjoys art, popular music, snowboarding and travel.; Putting finances into perspective As small business owners, Nick and Justina make a powerhouse team, supporting each other through ups and downs. Nick has over 12 years' experience in the financial industry, helping individuals, families, and businesses meet their financial goals. Nick holds the Chartered Investment Manager (CIM®) and Fellow of the Canadian Securities Institute (FCSI®) designations, bringing to the team advanced knowledge in wealth management and investment planning. He works exclusively with the high-net worth demographic, curating individual investment solutions for each of his clients. Nick takes a holistic approach to investing, focusing on the goals of the client and the 'big picture'. He uses his strong network of specialists across the wealth management and financial planning fields to help ensure his clients are always getting the best, well-rounded financial advice. title: Québec City Branch Olivier Quintal Investment Advisor; Olivier Quintal is an Investment Advisor at TD Wealth Private Investment Advice. He holds a Bachelor of Business Administration with a specialization in finance and taxation from the University of Sherbrooke, as well as the Financial Planner designation awarded by the Institut québécois de planification financière His practice is built on a conviction: the most effective financial decisions are those that account for the full picture. Portfolio management, financial planning and taxation are not three separate disciplines. They form a whole. That is the intersection where Olivier works, building strategies that integrate every dimension of his clients' wealth: personal, corporate, estate and tax. This approach demands rigorous analysis and deep understanding of often complex situations. Olivier draws on quantitative portfolio management tools and advanced tax expertise so that every decision fits within a coherent plan, tailored to each client's reality and built to endure over time. He works in close collaboration with Jean-François Roberge, Senior Investment Advisor with over 25 years of experience in the securities industry. Together, they offer both strategic and technical coverage, serving clients whose wealth situation demands more than a standard response.; Investment Advisor

title: Senior Portfolio Manager; Senior Investment Advisor; Omar believes that the cornerstone of wealth planning is recognizing that everyone’s financial life and personal situation is unique. He collaborates closely with clients to ensure they receive advice tailored specifically to their needs. This is why he views the discovery process as a vital step – getting to know people, their families or the structure of a corporation or foundation is key to truly understanding the scope of their goals. Omar holds the Certified Financial Planner (CFP®) and Chartered Investment Manager (CIM®) designations. He also holds the Certificate in Retirement Strategy. He believes in a comprehensive model that covers the many different aspects of your financial life, from your investment portfolio to your retirement income and your estate plan, to your kids’ education. Omar believes in the value of sound investment advice and his professional life is embodied by the long‑term client relationships he’s built based on trust and communication. Omar is an avid runner and has competed in several marathons over the years. He is driven by the discipline the sport requires and the spirit of the races he regularly competes in. Recognizing the power of competition and the importance of giving back, he has also run as a guide runner for visually impaired runners in the city. Northlake Wealth Management is part of TD Wealth Private Investment Advice, a division of TD Waterhouse Canada Inc. which is a subsidiary of The Toronto-Dominion Bank.

title: Sonoda Family Wealth Advisors Our Family Helping Your Family We are a family wealth management team at TD Wealth Private Investment Advice dedicated to helping our clients achieve their life-long dreams by utilizing a comprehensive approach to progressive investment, financial and retirement planning. As stewards of our clients' life savings, we appreciate the importance of dispensing prudent and personalized advice in all matters relating to the creation and retention of their wealth. Our distinction of excellence at Sonoda Family Wealth Advisors begins with a multi-talented family practice that is founded upon over five decades of combined financial and wealth advisory experience. Our goal is to simplify the wealth management process by discovering and understanding what really matters to our clients. We begin by asking specific questions, thereby gaining a deep understanding of what is important in terms of family and the future. We focus on helping them and their family navigate through the often complex task of making investment decisions. This commitment is an on-going process that involves regular monitoring and check-ups and helps mitigate portfolio risk by staying true to a long-term plan and ensuring that life-goals are on track as planned. Who We Are Sonoda Family Wealth Advisors consists of Brian W. Sonoda and sons, Adam and Jason. We believe we have the experience, talent and commitment to serve our clients' needs with professionalism, integrity and knowledge. Collectively, we aim to use our expertise to be able to address the multi-generational needs of families at various stages in their lives. We are dedicated to upholding a well-managed practice, we afford each client the time and resources to provide them with a personalized one-to-one approach in the management of their wealth.; Sonoda Family Wealth Advisors is a part of TD Wealth Private Investment Advice, a division of TD Waterhouse Canada Inc. which is a subsidiary of The Toronto-Dominion Bank.
