title: The Martin Advisory Group We are one of the largest discretionary portfolio management groups at TD Wealth Private Investment Advice in Canada, based on assets under management as of April 30, 2022. We serve business owners and affluent investors and their families since 1994. We provide comprehensive service, personal wealth advice, placing our clients and their goals at the centre of everything we do. Our long-term commitment enables our wealth services to grow and adapt with our clients, their families and their businesses as they move through the different phases of their lives. Over the years, we've assisted many wealthy families and business owners who have entrusted their day-to-day investment decisions to us by helping them navigate their unique financial landscape. Our client-centric approach enables us to help focus on their goals by responding swiftly when opportunities and risks arise. As of December 2, 2024, The Martin Advisory Group is managing over $1 billion in assets. Introduction of two new team members; Mr. Kevin Quach and Mr. Guillaume Paradis!; transcript Testimonials When I sold my family-owned business in 2010, I needed to invest the proceeds of the sale. I split the funds between two advisors initially, and then a year ago I transferred everything to Charles’ management. He has deep theoretical knowledge, he treats my money like it is his own, he gets sound results, but most of all he has a plan. He knows what he wants to achieve and how. But that isn’t the best thing about Charles. His best quality, in my opinion, is his integrity and his most powerful asset is his team. Isabelle, Marc, Julian and Emilie set the bar very high when it comes to client service. They go above and beyond the scope of administrative tasks to make our life easier, and they do it with a smile. They always make us feel valued.; Charles is a forward-thinking advisor with a strong set of values. I know that he has invested his own money as he invests my retirement savings, and that matters to me. Charles works with a kind, reliable, very dedicated team that always provides great service. I also like the interface of TD’s client website, and appreciate having the option of checking in on my investments online as well.; I felt Charles was the right guy when I met him, and he hasn’t proven me wrong. Over more than a decade together he has helped me work out a plan to shift from owning my dental practice into enjoying an active retirement with my wife. He has achieved good returns for us through all kinds of markets, has shifted our portfolio as our lives have changed, and has created income projections to carry us through our next chapter. He’s there for every stage. Charles has also become more than an advisor to us over the years – he is someone I consider a friend.

title: Senior Portfolio Manager; It’s more than numbers. It’s a lifestyle. P.J. wants you to rethink the wealth management process in a way that uncovers your ideal. As Senior Portfolio Manager, P.J. encourages you to imagine the possibilities. After all, your story is more than just numbers. It’s about relationships, aspirations, and complexity. In addition to holding the Certified International Wealth Manager (CIWM), Certified Financial Planner (CFP®) and Chartered Investment Manager (CIM®) designations, P.J. obtained an Honours Degree in Business Administration Co-op with a concentration in Economics from the University of Windsor, Canada in conjunction with the University of Derby, England, as well as a Certificate in Retirement Strategy. His drive for continuous learning is what allows him to envision the distinct needs and goals that makes each client unique. Currently, P.J. is working on his own story with his beautiful wife and young family. title: About Pantea With over two decades in wealth management— more than half of this time being at TD Wealth—Pantea has become a reliable advisor to doctors, dentists, lawyers, and business owners who entrust her with protecting and growing what they have worked so hard to build. Her holistic approach means every detail is considered, from tax-efficient strategies to the smooth transitions of wealth across generations. She is mindful that your time is precious, your responsibilities immense, and your vision unique.; Senior Investment Advisor; In Pantea, you find more than an advisor—you find a financial professional who walks beside you, sharing both the weight of responsibility and the joy of accomplishment. Her mission is simple but important: to help you live your life with clarity, purpose, and financial confidence, knowing your wealth is in the hands of someone who truly cares. Beginning from the very first meeting, Pantea listens with unwavering attentiveness, seeking to understand not only your financial situation but your life story—your ambitions, your challenges, and the legacy you wish to leave. She recognizes that behind every portfolio lies a lifetime of effort, sacrifice, and dreams for the future. That’s why she takes the time to create tailored strategies that reflect who you are and what matters most to you. Experience what it means to have your financial aspirations nurtured with expertise and heart. Connect with Pantea Ghooparanloo at Pantéa & Associates Wealth Management with TD Wealth Private Investment Advice to help your legacy flourish for generations.; I have been benefiting from the services of having Ms. Pantea Ghooparanloo as a financial planner since 2013. I highly recommend Ms. Ghooparanloo to anyone seeking a strategic, personalized, and effective approach to financial planning.

title: Senior Portfolio Manager; Senior Investment Advisor; With over 23 year of investing experience, Paul has developed a disciplined, systematic investment process designed to help High Net Worth families and businesses strategically accumulate, preserve and protect their wealth with passion and a dedicated team to provide exceptional client service. Through extensive experience and research, Paul has found that by focusing on companies that not only pay dividends but consistently grow their dividends, clients can potentially grow their assets over time, while also increasing their long-term sustainable cash-flow. In addition, Paul also takes a holistic approach with his clients, drawing on all the resources that TD Specialists have to offer clients, including Private Banking, Trust and Estate Planning, and Risk Management. As a holder of the Certified Financial Planner (CFP®) designation, Paul is able to assist clients plan for life's transitions. He also holds the Chartered Investment Manager (CIM®) designation and as Portfolio Manager, he is able to provide discretionary investment management, through TD Wealth's Privately Managed Program. He actively manages portfolios on behalf of clients who prefer not to be part of the day to day operation of their portfolio; always with their risk tolerance and investment objectives in mind. When not focused on clients, Paul is an avid cyclist, triathlete and skier and likes to spend time with his wife and growing children, spending winters skiing and spending time in Collingwood and at the family cottage.

title: Portfolio Manager; Senior Investment Advisor; A financial services professional since 1997, Paul has been providing comprehensive wealth management advice to individuals and their families, as well as corporate investment services, for the last 24 years and has acquired a vast depth of experience. Committed to offering total wealth management to his clients, Paul is continually upgrading his professional knowledge in many areas of financial and investment management. He holds a Chartered Investment Manager (CIM®) designation and is a Fellow of the Canadian Securities Institute. Paul acts as an Associate Portfolio Manager and Senior Investment Advisor for his clients. Both his academic and professional backgrounds have laid the foundation for his investment expertise. He graduated from the University of Ottawa with a Bachelor of Commerce degree and earned his MBA from Concordia University in Montreal and l'Université de Montpellier in France. Bilingual, born and raised in the Ottawa region, Paul calls Ottawa home. Outside the office, Paul is an avid sports enthusiast. He loves soccer, cross-country skiing and scuba diving. He also enjoys weekends at the cottage with his wife, Shereen, his daughter Chloé, and his son Zach.; Lifetime Wealth Advisory Group is a part of TD Wealth Private Investment Advice, a division of TD Waterhouse Canada Inc. which is a subsidiary of The Toronto-Dominion Bank.

title: Senior Investment Advisor; Paul has an uncompromising determination to provide personalized investment strategies to help you achieve long-term financial security. He believes in capital preservation as a cornerstone to his investment philosophy, building plans that are flexible enough to respond to short-term changes yet disciplined to provide the opportunity for greater returns over the long-term. Paul also believes in the importance of having a "life stage" approach to support you across different life stages. Paul has moved to Canada from Hong Kong at the age of 14. After graduating with a B.A. Economics from Simon Fraser University in 1991, Paul became an Account Manager in the Personal Financial Services department of an international bank. Given his success in building strong and trusted client relationships, Paul became Vice-President and Investment Advisor at a major brokerage firm. title: Senior Investment Advisor; My wealth management career began on Bay Street on the floor of the Toronto Stock Exchange. From there I was recruited to work with high-value clients at Merrill Lynch where I learned best-practices from some of the most successful advisory teams in the industry. Now, with over 25 years of experience, I lead my own team of wealth specialists at Morse Wealth with TD Wealth Private Investment Advice. Taking a holistic approach to supporting clients grow their wealth Our integrated approach to wealth management goes beyond just investment management. We help our clients across Canada synchronize their entire financial life. Along with professional and timely service, our clients have a team of accredited and experienced specialists behind them. We invest the time to build authentic relationships with each person, so we can understand their short and long term goals. It is important that our clients know that their financial decisions are in the hands of a team they know and trust. Our team would love to support you in helping you build, preserve and transition your legacy. Connect with us at (705) 330-0036, 1(866) 215-7070 or paul.morse@td.com to hear how we can help. Relationships built on ethics, trust and the importance of community Outside of the wealth management industry, I’ve had the benefit of being a business owner myself. I provided specialized consulting for NHL teams and government agencies. Through these experiences, I established our reputation as the go-to advisory team for active and retired business owners within the regions we serve. Relationships are at the core of what we do and our team is committed to providing personalized care at each step in the wealth planning and activation process. On a more personal note, I’ve raised two incredible kids with my wife Marie. I was given the opportunity to expand the presence of TD Wealth Private Investment Advice within the Simcoe, Muskoka and Haliburton regions which brought us to this area. We are big supporters of the communities where we work, live and play and like to give back by helping local organizations focused on health, wellness and environmental stewardship. We have grown to love the local area and enjoy being outdoors with our two Scottish Terriers, Gus and Eddy.

As a former athlete and entrepreneur in the personal wellness industry, Peter remains passionate about health and exercise and is an avid cyclist, water-skier, hiker, and golfer.

title: Senior Portfolio Manager & Senior Investment Advisor; Your Needs Financial solutions tailored to your evolving needs Growing your wealth. Protecting what matters. Maximizing tax saving opportunities. Leaving a legacy for the next generation. These are the goals of many high net worth investors. While you likely know what you want to achieve, you may not have the professional knowledge or experience to get there. The good news is, my team and I can help. We regularly help affluent investors who find themselves in transition: getting ready to retire, selling a business, going through a divorce, mourning the loss of a loved one, building a net-worth and planning to pass on wealth, tax efficiently, to the next generation. No matter your phase of life, we can help articulate your financial goals and devise a strategic plan for reaching them. You can turn to us for all of your wealth management needs. Our Mission Our mission is to be the trusted advisor of choice for affluent Canadians and their families; developing a robust plan for the future to counter adversity and the uncertainties life brings. Our Process We pride ourselves on understanding you and your priorities. By investing the time to discover what matters most to you and your family – and uncovering your financial blind spots – we can develop strategies to improve decision making and a wealth management plan that is tailored to your unique needs. A disciplined approach As part of TD Wealth Private Investment Advice, our investment offering is supported by the same high-calibre methods, strategies and rigour used to counsel Canada’s largest pension funds and foundations. Our disciplined asset allocation goes beyond the traditional to focus on your goals through risk-based allocation. Using a rigorous portfolio construction process, we aim to minimize your exposure to market downturns by incorporating innovative new sources of returns that are less reliant on market direction. Putting your interests first As Portfolio Managers, we have have a duty to always act in your best interest with unbiased objectivity. In addition, our team is committed to service excellence, transparency and effective cost control. We are available and responsive; clients regularly turn to us to for straightforward, direct and thoughtful answers to their questions and concerns. In short, we are their go-to resource for every critical financial decision they make – from applying for a mortgage, to buying a new car, to planning for retirement. Offering comprehensive strategies We have access to a broad range of resources and specialists, and can leverage their expertise, when appropriate, to help you meet your evolving needs through goals-based planning.; Putting finances into perspective As small business owners, Nick and Justina make a powerhouse team, supporting each other through ups and downs. title: Investment Advisor; TD Wealth Private Investment Advice is a premier full-service brokerage ideal for investors who want a one-on-one relationship with a dedicated and professional Investment Advisor. You will receive comprehensive and personalized investment advice while staying involved in the key decisions about your portfolio. We build strong relationships by listening to your needs, sharing information, recommending investment opportunities and maintaining ongoing contact. All this ensures that your investment strategy remains flexible enough to move with you through each stage of your life. Helping you develop and manage your investment portfolio is just the beginning of what we offer. By collaborating with TD specialists, we can call on all the resources needed to help you develop fully integrated wealth management solutions. This can encompass retirement planning, estate planning, tax management, and many other key areas of your financial future. I hold a bachelor's degree from one of the top Chinese universities, Fudan University, and an MBA degree from one of the top Canadian universities, University of Toronto. I came from Shanghai, China. For several years, I was running my own chemicals manufacturing company after working for a German Chemicals firm for a while. Later on, I was also involved in the real estate properties development and international trading business. I came to Canada in 2007 to pursue my MBA and started working for TD right after. Prior to TD Wealth, I worked at TD Securities with a focus on risk management of global equity derivatives and fixed income products. I hold the Chartered Financial Analyst (CFA), and Financial Risk Manager (FRM) designations. What I believe No plan is a plan to fail. Investment is simple, but not easy. Price is what you pay, value is what you get. (Warren Buffett) We make a living by what we get, but we make a life by what we give. title: Senior Portfolio Manager; Senior Investment Advisor; As a Portfolio Manager with TD Wealth Private Investment Advice, Riad invests for his clients with the goal of achieving the best risk-adjusted rate of return, with risk management also being the cornerstone of his investment philosophy. Riad has a very defined process of managing money. In addition to adhering to a strict discipline of investing in high quality dividend growth companies, Riad also takes advantage of market volatility, seasonality and market-moving events. Riad also has access to additional third-party research, which he pays for himself, in order to assist him in making informed portfolio management decisions. Riad constantly strives to be the best at what he does. Riad is a Senior Portfolio Manager and Senior Investment Advisor with TD Wealth Private Investment Advice. Riad is a member of the Portfolio Manager Advisory Committee (PMAC) at TD Wealth since its formation, the goal of which is to work with senior management to review, enhance and deliver best practices for Portfolio Managers at TD Wealth. Riad is also proud of the fact that he was the first Investment Advisor to become a Portfolio Manager in the Edmonton office of TD Wealth Private Investment Advice, again, driven by his need to continuously improve the service he provides to his clients. Those who know Riad know he works very hard and long hours to not only stay on top of the markets but to also anticipate industry leading trends. He is also a member of the Investment Committee of the Edmonton Community Foundation, entrusted with managing a portfolio approaching $1 billion in investments to benefit charities, students, and community initiatives across Edmonton and surrounding areas. Riad holds a Masters Degree in Investment Management, a Bachelor of Science Degree with Specialization in Mathematics and Finance and also has the following designations: Chartered Investment Manager (CIM®), Certified Financial Planner (CFP®), and the Fellow of Canadian Securities Institute (FCSI®). In addition to these designations, Riad also has an options trading license. He had also taught Investment Courses at NAIT (the Northern Alberta Institute of Technology).; Some chartered accountants, lawyers and doctors that do work for large corporations may be prohibited from investing in those corporations. For example, chartered accountants who work for national accounting firms that audit publicly traded companies or doctors who participate in drug trials for pharmaceutical companies that are publicly traded. In these instances, these clients cannot invest in these companies for compliance and conflict of interest reasons. As a Portfolio Manager, Riad has the capability to manage portfolios for professionals like this while avoiding the restricted companies, which for some accountants can cover many companies.

To be successful, you must have a solid plan in place that addresses all aspects of your personal and financial life. My role is to help you articulate your thoughts and feelings about money into a plan that reflects where you want to go in life. Being engaged in the process and educated on your options leads to better decision making. There has never been more choice when it comes to investment and insurance products and new ones are being created every week. Investing and managing wealth is a detailed process with many moving parts; investments, insurance, estate planning, pensions, taxation, wills, and more. Working with a professional investment advisor and other TD specialists will help to clarify your goals, introduce you to new ideas, and avoid potential pitfalls that may throw many well-intentioned plans off track. Knowing that you have someone beside you helping and guiding your decisions will allow you to sleep at night knowing that you have done everything to grow, protect and transfer your wealth. title: Senior Portfolio Manager; Senior Investment Advisor; Richard works with successful families, small business owners, and medical professionals navigating the challenges of wealth, helping them build financial security, create meaningful legacies, and live life on their own terms through long-term, diversified strategies tailored to their values and unique financial circumstances. Holding the Chartered Investment Manager (CIM), Certified Financial Planner (CFP), and Fellow of the Canadian Securities Institute (FCSI) designations, Richard brings over 30 years of wealth management expertise to every client relationship. Prior to joining TD in 2004, Rob held roles with Mutual Life, Merrill Lynch Canada, CIBC Wood Gundy and CT Financial Assurance. Rob lives in the KW area with his wife Erika and their three young sons. As a family, they love to travel and enjoy an active lifestyle in the community.

title: Senior Portfolio Manager; Senior Investment Advisor; Specialization Rod’s specialization is those clients nearing and in retirement with extensive experience working with widows, widowers and those planning a retirement for one. These clients often require thoughtful retirement and estate planning tailored to their specific needs and tax circumstances. As a Portfolio Manager, Rod offers his clients discretionary management of conservative growth and income portfolios. For this comprehensive wealth management, Rod's minimum portfolio size is $1,000,000 per client household. Professional Background Rod graduated, with distinction, from the University of Victoria with a Bachelor of Commerce degree in 1996. Soon after graduation, he began his financial services career at a leading Canadian chartered bank, and became an Investment Advisor in 2000. He holds two prestigious designations available to Canadian Investment Advisors. They are the Fellow of the Canadian Securities Institute (FCSI) and Certified International Wealth Manager (CIWM). The FCSI designation recognizes individuals who bring a rare combination of education, ethical training and experience to their firm and their clients’ businesses. The Certified International Wealth Manager (CIWM) is comprehensive program to serve the unique needs of affluent Canadians through; Advanced Investment Strategies, Advanced Retirement Management Strategies, and Advanced Estate Planning and Trust Strategies. Rod works in concert with a team of specialists within TD Bank Group who specialize in wealth protection and insurance solutions, estate planning and trust services and charitable giving strategies. He also works seamlessly with his client's other professionals outside of TD. Personal Background When not in the office, Rod enjoys regular exercise, most often competing in kettlebell lifting and taking part in various classes at his gym. As a passionate motorcyclist, and when the time permits it, he enjoys touring the west coast of Canada and the U.S.A. Perhaps most of all, he relishes the company of his old dachshund, Hugo.

title: Senior Portfolio Manager; Senior Investment Advisor; Imagine the heights you could reach when you draw upon the growth, stability and expertise of TD Wealth Private Investment Advice, an integral part of TD Bank Group. When you engage with us, you gain the confidence of knowing the services you receive are supported by the significant resources of TD, with over $1.3 trillion in assets on October 31, 2018 and over 25 million TD customers around the globe. We’re committed to understanding your needs and providing you with exceptional investment solutions through every stage of your life. That’s why we have developed a range of managed investment solutions – including TD Privately Managed Portfolios – that put your investments in the hands of professionals so you can devote your time to what really matters to you. With TD Privately Managed Portfolios, not only am I your Investment Advisor but I am also your Portfolio Manager, responsible for building and managing your investment portfolio, as well as making all the day-to-day investment decisions. Whether you choose me as your Investment Advisor or your Portfolio Manager, you can benefit from a lasting relationship with someone who understands your needs, shares your vision, and offers you a full range of solutions. I will work closely with you to discover, define and prioritize your core values, and together we will create your personal investment and wealth plan. I will also take an integrated approach to develop your customized plan by bringing in other TD specialists, as required, to address your unique circumstances. Finally, it is our commitment to follow-up with you on an ongoing basis as we strive to deliver an exceptional client experience. Talk to me today – we’re ready to help you manage, preserve, and transition your wealth on your terms. About Roel Olay: I am an Investment Advisor and Portfolio Manager with TD Wealth Private Investment Advice and a Life Insurance Advisor with TD Wealth Insurance Services Inc. I manage diversified investment portfolios and advise individuals and families by helping them manage their wealth and make smart financial decisions. Since 1989, I have held numerous progressive roles with TD Bank Group including stints with TD Canada Trust and TD Asset Management. I am a graduate of Toronto’s St. Michael’s Choir School and I have a BA degree in Political Science from King’s University College, Western University. I am a Fellow of the Canadian Securities Institute and have earned the Chartered Investment Manager and Financial Management Advisor designations. In my spare time, I sit on the Board of Directors of the MCS Chorus – Mississauga Choral Society and sing with the St. Michael's Choir School Alumni Association Choir. Each tailored strategy considers the client’s full scope of investment, wealth and retirement needs, including wealth protection and insurance solutions, estate planning and trust services, and charitable giving strategies. When appropriate, Roy liaises with his clients’ other professional advisors and introduces TD specialists to help ensure that every detail of his clients’ financial picture is understood and addressed. Roy has served as member and chair of TD’s National Advisory Council. He has earned his Portfolio Manager (PM) and Chartered Investment Manager (CIM®) designations, and is a Fellow of the Canadian Securities Institute (FCSI®). He is currently working toward his High Net Worth Wealth Advisor designation. Roy holds an Economics degree from York University.; Christensen Wealth Advisory Group is a part of TD Wealth Private Investment Advice, a division of TD Waterhouse Canada Inc. which is a subsidiary of The Toronto-Dominion Bank.

title: Senior Portfolio Manager; Senior Investment Advisor; After over 36 years in the financial services industry, Russell still wakes up every day with passion and purpose. He quarterbacks the planning and execution of his client's VSI Wealth Plans and draws on his tax planning background from his time spent working at a top tier international accounting firm. As a portfolio manager, he also oversees the construction and execution of his client's investment strategies. Russell graduated from the University of British Columbia with a business degree in Finance. He has always had a deep fascination with investments and the stock market and is always learning more each and every day. Russell holds the Chartered Professional Accountant (CPA, CA) designation as well as the Certified Financial Planner (CFP®), Chartered Investment Manager (CIM®), Fellow of the Canadian Securities Institute (FCSI®) and Certified International Wealth Manager (CIWM) designations. He is also a Life Insurance Advisor with TD Wealth Insurance Services. Russell has been providing financial services to his clients since 1989. Russell is a fourth generation Vancouverite. His great grandfather came to Vancouver in the late 1800's to help build Canada's national railway. Every Saturday morning, Russell enjoys playing ball hockey with his old high school and university friends and he stays fit by visiting his trainer twice a week. Russell periodically still enjoys playing the keyboard with his old band and enjoys new experiences and travelling with his wife and teenage daughter.

title: Senior Portfolio Manager & Senior Investment Advisor; Our team of eight dedicated professionals work together to help you achieve your financial goals. Myself and Chris Mantzoutsos, CFA (Senior Portfolio Manager & Senior Investment Advisor) lead the portfolio management aspects of our practice along with Jordan Fowler-Graham. Our five Administrative Associates - Matilda Capasso, Deborah Heezen, Marina Galeano-Bracero, Yulia Shorokhova, and Grace Brem - support our clients alongside us. With a combined 75+ years in the wealth management business, we have the experience and perspective that allows us to offer our clients sound advice and a steady hand. Our team approach ensures continuity and seamless service while working with our clients. We strive to gain a full understanding of their unique needs, circumstances and specific long-term goals. We will then develop and implement a cohesive and dynamic wealth management plan to achieve those goals throughout their lifetime. Our goal is to provide clients with genuine stewardship, knowing that their wealth is being managed prudently and with their best interests in mind. Our clients gain the freedom to pursue other priorities while having comfort knowing that there is a team of disciplined wealth management professionals working for them - including professional and experienced TD specialists covering banking, estate planning, financial planning and insurance - who are engaged to help ensure that all of their financial needs are addressed. I have earned the Chartered Financial Analyst (CFA) and Chartered Investment Manager (CIM®) designations. I am a member of the CFA Institute, the Toronto CFA Society, and the Golden Key International Honour Society. I am also a member of the Investment Committee of the Humber River Hospital Foundation, helping to steward the Foundation's investment strategy. Fulfilling my role as an advisor, I may ask tough questions and highlight gaps and opportunities my clients may not be aware of. As needs arise, I will liaise with internal TD specialists to bring their expertise and solutions to the table, while always being on hand to navigate those discussions with my clients. Once a formal plan is agreed upon, we strategically execute, tweaking the plan as needed. title: Sam Makdessian Associate Portfolio Manager & Investment Advisor; Sam Makdessian, CFA, CFP® Associate Portfolio Manager, TD Wealth Private Investment Advice (PIA) In the role of Associate Portfolio Manager with TD Wealth Private Investment Advice (PIA), I take pride in delivering a high level of personalized service to high net worth individuals, families, small businesses, trusts, and corporate clientele. Our service offering includes portfolio construction and investment solutions, implementation, continual monitoring and timely reporting. When appropriate, I engage TD specialists who can provide expertise on estate planning, business succession planning, insurance and tax planning. I believe that a "full-service" offering best serves my clients' evolving and complex needs at every stage, and through every life event. TD Private Investment Advice is one of Canada's largest private client money management firms managing over $38 billion in assets (as at Nov 2022). Leveraging the global resources of TD Bank Group, and working closely with a talented group of professionals, I assist my clients build net worth, implement tax-efficient strategies, protect what matters, and leave a legacy. A graduate of the Ted Rogers School of Business Management (major in Finance, minor in Accounting), I received the Certified Financial Planner (CFP®) designation in 2020 and am a Chartered Financial Analyst (CFA®) charterholder as of 2019. I enjoy travelling with my wife Ivana, and actively participating in the Armenian-Canadian cultural community.; High Net Worth Clients and Families What matters to you? Our unparalleled commitment is key to helping you meet your unique goals and objectives. We engage in a deep dialogue to uncover what is truly most important to you, your family and your future. title: Portfolio Manager; Senior Investment Advisor; TD Wealth Private Investment Advice is one of Canada’s premier full-service brokerage firms. Our service is designed for those investors who are looking for professional and personalized investment advice while staying involved in all investment decisions. As a Senior Investment Advisor at TD Wealth, my number one objective is to provide my clients with financial confidence through a holistic wealth management solution that will meet all their current and future financial needs. I bring a highly skilled approach to financial management which centers on the fine balance between preserving capital and growing it responsibly. I am committed to providing exceptional service to each of my clients. The cornerstone of my business is to establish a one on one relationship that is based on trust, communication and a detailed understanding of my clients needs. Also as a client of TD Wealth Private Investment Advice, you will have complete access to all of the expertise and resources of TD Wealth and TD Bank Group. By working in collaboration I will ensure that the appropriate TD specialists are brought in when required, to apply their specialized knowledge to your situation. This team of professionals will work together to ensure the seamless management of all aspects pertaining to your wealth from your investment portfolio, to estate planning, to your credit and insurance needs. A combination of experience and educational background make me uniquely qualified to provide my clients with sound financial advice. Having received both my Master of Business Administration Degree and the Chartered Financial Analyst designation, I am acutely aware of the opportunities and challenges of the constantly evolving financial industry. My interest in finance had its start in 1990, when I entered the Schulich School of Business at York University. After completing my MBA in 1992, I continued to upgrade my education through the Canadian Securities Institute. I completed the following courses: Canadian Securities, Conduct & Practices, Derivatives Fundamentals, Canadian Options, Futures Licensing and Professional Financial Planning Course. In 1999 I started the Chartered Financial Analyst program, receiving my charter in 2001.; TD Wealth Specialists work with your family and, when required, tax and legal advisors, to answer questions about: • Wills, trusts, and estates • Executor and trustee services • Strategies to balance your priorities and charitable goals

title: Portfolio Manager & Investment Advisor; About Me I help high net worth families and organizations plan and achieve their financial goals by constructing a tailored portfolio. I believe in a deep and thorough discovery process to understand what is most important to our clients and make recommendations by balancing our clients’ needs against their behavioural biases. I have been with TD Bank Group for 10 years and have been working directly with high net worth clients since joining TD Wealth in 2014. I work in partnership with Jeet Dhillon, Senior Portfolio Manager, building long-term relationships with individuals, families, corporations, trusts, endowments and foundations. Providing discretionary investment advice our team takes a holistic approach to managing wealth by developing a comprehensive understanding of your overall financial position. We believe your investment portfolio is a piece of your overall wealth plan and it is our responsibility to identify the gaps. A part of our service comprises of our extended team of wealth professionals at TD Wealth who can provide you with their expertise in their respective areas including, estate planning, business succession, insurance, tax and philanthropic giving. Together, we cover each aspect of your wealth to help ensure that your wealth is being managed prudently and professionally. Our Philosophy Our clients' needs and goals are deeply personal. The investment and wealth plan that will help them achieve those goals must be as distinct as they are. We are equipped to provide tailored advice to help build the future they want — and we can only do that by truly understanding what matters most to them. Our Clients Affluent families, professionals, business owners, family estates and trusts, institutions and charitable organizations. They choose us for our experience in anticipating the complex challenges of growing and protecting wealth, and responding with thoughtful solutions that consider tax implications, family dynamics, and other priorities. Our Discovery Process Armed with a deep understanding of your priorities and values, I'll build a team of TD specialists centered around you. And, as your needs evolve, your wealth strategy will evolve with you. I take our relationship with you seriously – that means we'll be in touch with you on an ongoing basis so we can provide you with the information you need for a successful financial future. And when you need advice, we'll be there with a breadth of knowledge and expertise, along with the personalized attention you deserve. Helping You Achieve Your Vision Of Success Our goal is to offer you the relevant, customized wealth advice you deserve - and we can do that only by fully understanding you. That's why we take a unique approach to understanding you, your family and your values. Whether your needs are straightforward or complex, we're dedicated to delivering tailored, comprehensive, wealth management strategies that are rooted in your goals. We will stay in tune with your needs and help ensure you're on track to achieve the future you envision for yourself. As your dedicated relationship manager, I will stay in tune with your needs and help ensure you're on track to achieve the future you envision for yourself. title: Portfolio Manager; Senior Investment Advisor; Mission statement: My mission is to provide honest and transparent fee-based wealth management services to professionals and small business owners. I help my clients achieve their long-term financial goals and by ensuring that their interests always come first. Who am I? What I do? I am a Portfolio Manager and Senior Investment Advisor at TD Wealth Private Investment Advice and I am also a Chartered Financial Analyst (CFA®) charterholder. After working as a medical doctor (obstetrics and gynecology) for 22 years, I decided to follow my passion for investment management. I brought significant soft skills from my work in the medical field – identifying issues, analyzing situations, deciding on the best course of action, setting up protocols to deal with occasional emergency situations and taking appropriate action in a timely manner without being hindered by emotions, in the best interest of the client. I understand the importance of having a disciplined approach for wealth management in general and investment management in particular. I work closely with my clients to identify their financial goals, and then I assist in establishing a process for achieving those goals. While my clients deal with other important things in their lives, I keep tabs on those goals to ensure that the process continues to be executed with discipline. Long term success of any plan requires review of the progress. I ensure that we conduct periodic reviews, and adjust the plan as necessary. In special circumstances, I bring in TD specialists who offer advice on specific situations such as, · Tax mitigation · Business succession · Charitable giving · Insurance and estate planning. As a lifelong student of markets, I have designed a very disciplined investment management process that goes beyond asset allocation. While constructing the portfolio, I customize the portfolio for each individual client based on their risk profile and return requirement. As an investment professional, I understand the importance of risk management. Diversification is an important component to reduce portfolio risk. In addition to creating diversification through traditional asset classes, sectors, geographies and currencies, I also use strategies such as reversion to mean, growth/value/momentum factors, trend following and options contracts where warranted, to diversify the portfolio and manage risk. I have lived through it myself and therefore fully understand the life of a busy professional. I believe that sound knowledge, integrity and trustworthiness are of paramount importance, whether it is financial or medical advice. Having confidence of entrusting their wealth in capable hands, in a disciplined process which encompasses investment management, retirement planning and estate planning is what my clients told me they desire, that way, they can spend their time on things they like the most. Outside of the office, I enjoy reading and being in trails, lakes and mountains.; TD Wealth Specialists work with your family and, when required, tax and legal advisors, to answer questions about: • Wills, trusts, and estates • Executor and trustee services • Strategies to balance your priorities and charitable goals

title: Senior Investment Advisor; Senior Portfolio Manager; Scott focuses his time in helping clients meet their financial goals, thus helping them enjoy their life today and pursuit of their goals for tomorrow. By understanding what truly matters to his clients he can provide them with a full suite of customized wealth management services as well as engage other TD specialists to address more specific needs. Scott's dedication to an exceptional client experience and innovative strategies form the foundation of his business. Born and raised on Vancouver Island, Scott graduated from the University of Victoria with a Bachelor of Commerce Degree in 1999. Upon graduation, he pursued a career in the investment industry with Island Savings Credit Union and Credential Securities before joining TD Wealth in 2011. Scott holds the Chartered Investment Manager (CIM®), Certified Financial Planner (CFP®), Certified International Wealth Manager (CIWM) designations along with being a Fellow of the Canadian Securities Institute (FCSI®) and earning the title of Portfolio Manager. In 2006 Scott was honored to be awarded top 40 under 40 for Vancouver Island. Away from the office, Scott enjoys spending time with his lovely wife Meghan and daughter Taylor. After a competitive Junior and College golf career, he enjoys playing the occasional recreational round. Scott is passionate about volunteering and supporting local charities and events that are most meaningful to his family and clients.

title: Investment Advisor; Working with long-time business associate and friend Michael Kelly, we ensure a fundamental approach based on building meaningful and lasting relationships with our clients. Located in Toronto, we provide a comprehensive suite of wealth management services. Collaboratively, and with a well-aligned ethical and morally grounded philosophy, we help to guide our clients through the complex and ever-changing world of investments, tax and estate planning. Providing innovative financial strategies and exceptional client experiences are the hallmarks of our business. With an external view to the Investment Advisor industry for many years, I believe that wealth can be better managed with a keen focus on best-in-class, fee-conscious, big-picture, investment decisions.; With more than 20 years’ experience in industry, I earned the Chartered Investment Manager (CIM ® ) designation in 2016, and I am a Certified Retirement Specialist. I began my career in retail banking with a major Canadian financial institution, before joining TD in 1999, where I gained extensive experience with a series of progressive roles including working on the international trading desk for TD Direct Investing. In 2002, I was appointed manager of Business Development with TD’s Direct Investing Group. I joined TD Wealth in 2005, and spent a decade working exclusively with high net-worth families quarterbacking family office relationships with TD's Portfolio Managers, Will and Estate Planners, and Business Succession specialists. I hold a Bachelor of Arts (Honours) in Environmental and Resource Management.; TD Wealth Specialists work with your family and, when required, tax and legal advisors, to answer questions about: • Wills, trusts, and estates • Executor and trustee services • Strategies to balance your priorities and charitable goals

title: Helping you make informed decisions to shape the future you envision for yourself and your family or business. Sean D Thomas Senior Portfolio Manager; Senior Investment Advisor; Sean has over 25 years of experience behind him and another 20 years of potential ahead of him. He and his team advise high-net worth individuals, families and organizations with a wide range of financial needs. Whether you are building your assets or shifting into retirement, his insightful counsel, disciplined approach and focus on effective risk management can help you make informed decisions to shape the future you envision for yourself and your family or business. Prior to joining TD Wealth Private Investment Advice, Sean spent a year at TD Asset Management, which gave him a respect for research and a love for pouring over numbers. He became an advisor to work more closely with people and help give those numbers tangible meaning. After earning a degree in History and Math at the University of Western Ontario, he later deepened his skills by earning the Chartered Investment Manager (CIM®) designation. His Fellow of Canadian Securities Institute (FCSI®) designation attests to his professional acumen and conduct. Sean serves on the TD Wealth Portfolio Manager Advisory Committee, where he works to help simplify and streamline the discretionary wealth management process for affluent clients. A former triathlete, mountain biker and an avid cyclist, he enjoys relaxing with family and friends, taking in a good book or an exhibit at the Royal Ontario Museum or Art Gallery of Ontario, and attending live concerts.; Senior Portfolio Manager
persona_summary: As a TD Wealth Investment Advisor in Toronto I’ll work with you to design a unique and personalized investment and wealth plan. Contact me today.

client_demographics: Affluent and high net worth clients seeking discretionary portfolio management
title: Portfolio Manager; Senior Investment Advisor; While serving clients over the past 30 years, Sean has developed long-lasting, rewarding relationships through his reliable advice, which is based on psychological and financial research. Feedback from his clients suggests that they appreciate his frank and honest communication. Sean has surrounded himself with a team of highly-efficient individuals so he can concentrate on keeping ahead of economic and market trends, deciding overall market strategy, preparing strategic and tactical recommendations for clients, reviewing individual portfolios and conducting client meetings. Sean joined CIBC in 1988 at 17 years old as a part-time teller and worked full-time in his 20s while attending the University of Windsor to earn his Bachelor of Commerce. He believes that getting work experience at a young age helped forge his success. Sean’s early positions included Financial Services Representative and Commercial Banking Representative. In 1998, Sean moved to TD Wealth Private Investment Advice. He later founded the Lenehan Wealth Management Group (LWMG). In addition to an Investment Advisor, Sean also served as Branch Manager –a position he held for two years while proudly winning Branch of the Year for one of them. In 2020, Sean obtained his Chartered Investment Manager (CIM) designation. This designation, along with leveraging technology, gives Sean the ability to conduct discretionary portfolio management services on behalf of clients. Sean has a love for history, hockey and golf. He grew up in Essex County and currently resides in Belle River with his wife, Sue. Sean is proud dad to four sons: Liam, Aidan, Ashton and Grayson.
persona_summary: As a TD Wealth Investment Advisor in Windsor I’ll work with you to design a unique and personalized investment and wealth plan. Contact me today.

client_demographics: Affluent and high net worth clients seeking discretionary portfolio management
title: Sean Murphy Portfolio Manager & Investment Advisor; Sean is passionate about investing and about helping people to reach their goals. He left his earlier career as a lawyer so that he could pursue these passions in his work. Prior to joining TD Wealth Private Investment Advice, Sean worked as a Tax and Estate Planner with the Wealth Advisory Services team at TD Wealth, where his focus was helping clients to resolve their tax and estate planning issues. In his current role, Sean finds a great deal of satisfaction in helping clients develop and implement holistic wealth management plans that go beyond their investment portfolios. A lifelong Albertan, Sean moved from Wetaskiwin to Edmonton to study engineering at the University of Alberta in 2003. He graduated with a Bachelor of Science in Electrical Engineering in 2008 before continuing his studies at the university in the Faculty of Law that same year. He graduated with his Bachelor of Laws degree in 2011 and was admitted to the Bar in Alberta in 2012 after completing his articles with a firm in Edmonton. He transitioned to inactive status with the Law Society of Alberta after joining TD Wealth Private Investment Advice. Sean holds the Chartered Financial Analyst® (CFA) designation from the CFA Institute. He also holds the Trust and Estate Practitioner (TEP) designation from the Society of Trust and Estate Practitioners (STEP). Sean lives with his wife Natalie, daughter Isla and their two dogs in south Edmonton. Outside of work, he tries to balance out his love for food by staying active and going to the gym. He also enjoys reading, watching movies and following the NFL.; Portfolio Manager & Investment Advisor

title: Senior Investment Advisor; Senior Portfolio Manager; Simple, Sustainable and Effective Wealth Management Plans Finding the right Investment Advisor can be a challenge, and questions abound: Are you on target to meet your financial goals? Are there opportunities you might be missing? Is your financial situation as clear as it can be? Is your wealth plan in line with your personal vision of success? With over 30 years of financial services and investment experience, I’ve built my career helping individuals, business owners, and professionals answer these questions and craft personal, comprehensive, balanced portfolios and wealth management strategies that can generate growth, mitigate risk, and guide them toward greater success. As your Investment Advisor and Portfolio Manager, I strive to offer you my singular insight, a sharper perspective, and a deeper understanding of your wealth using simple, sustainable and effective wealth management and investment plans. It’s all part of an in-depth experience designed to leave you feeling informed, empowered, and excited by what tomorrow could bring.; Discretionary Investing As a discretionary Portfolio Manager, I can provide the convenience, reliability and opportunities only found with discretionary investing. My decisions are supported by up-to-the-minute information from the Portfolio Advice & Investment Research (PAIR) team, and I’ll use that knowledge, along with my decades of experience, to help guide your portfolio and ensure it’s in line with your vision of success. We can manage the money for you, not just with you, working to provide easier access to sudden opportunities, and freedom from daily investment decisions.

title: Associate Portfolio Manager; Senior Investment Advisor; Drawing on deep industry knowledge gained from 28 years in the financial services industry, Shereen strives to provide the highest level of comprehensive portfolio and wealth management services to clients. By addressing the challenges clients face, and addressing them with a well thought out plan of action, Shereen strives to make her clients feel confident that they are firmly in control of their financial affairs. Investment strategy and portfolio management, financial planning, portfolio tax efficiency, income planning, retirement and estate planning strategies - these are the areas of expertise Shereen brings to the relationships she builds with clients. Shereen began her career at Midland Walwyn in 1994 and joined TD in 1997. She holds her Certified Financial Planner (CFP®), Chartered Investment Manager (CIM®) and is a Fellow of the Canadian Securities Institute (FCSI®) designations. Shereen is an Honours Graduate from the University of Western Ontario and holds her Executive MBA from Queens University Smith School of Business. Shereen acts as a Senior Investment Advisor and Associate Portfolio Manager for her clients. Outside of the office, Shereen enjoys spending time with her husband Paul and two children, Chloé and Zachary. She is an active Board member (Vice Chair) supporting the needs of women and children in Ottawa and also volunteers as a Project Advisor for Queen's EMBA Americas program. title: Investment Advisor; Steve Malinas is an Investment Advisor with TD Wealth Private Investment Advice in the Yorkville office. Steve's advisory business specializes in assisting families and business owners in generating tax-efficient investment income and navigating wealth transitions across generations. Regarding your wealth there is no one-size-fits-all solution, but there are emotions, options and trade-offs that need to be considered. Steve uncovers your unique needs through his 4-step structured process; starting with a deep discovery of your personal situation and values, followed-by a custom strategy, implementation, and review of your plan in relation to your wealth goals. With this process and backed by a comprehensive network of TD specialists, Steve has the resources to help you realize your true potential and create an airtight wealth roadmap. Steve graduated from the University of Toronto with a degree in Economics and Sociology. He holds the Chartered Investment Manager (CIM®) designation and a certification in Advanced Investment Advice. title: Portfolio Manager; Investment Advisor; Over the past two decades, Stephen Nelson has dedicated himself to establishing a disciplined and discreet wealth management practice within TD Wealth. His methodical approach to risk management is evident in the portfolios he creates for all his clients. He mitigates risk by applying a combination of uncorrelated strategies, including but not limited to: alternative investment products, options, special situations and long/short strategies. Through years of building relationships with his clients, Stephen has become highly skilled in meeting the specialized needs of high-net-worth entrepreneurs, professional athletes, family foundations, and public company executives. In an effort to ensure that close client relationships are continually fostered, Stephen focuses primarily on families with investable assets in excess of $10 million and utilizes a combination of customized discretionary and non-discretionary investment management strategies along with tax and insurance strategies. In early 2015, Stephen took his wealth management practice to a new level by expanding his team to align with Amyn Juma, Portfolio Manager and Investment Advisor with TD Wealth Private Investment Advice. Stephen now leads a highly talented team of ten and is responsible for over $4 billion in investment assets as of November 2022. As a husband and father of four, Stephen has focused his philanthropic efforts on children’s needs. He has raised over $1,000,000 to date for Holland Bloorview Kids Rehabilitation Hospital Foundation, which is one of Canada’s largest children’s rehabilitation teaching hospital. Stephen has an Economics Degree from the University of Western Ontario and lives with his family in Toronto. The Nelson Group is a part of TD Wealth Private Investment Advice, a division of TD Waterhouse Canada Inc. which is a subsidiary of The Toronto-Dominion Bank.; TD Wealth Specialists work with your family and, when required, tax and legal advisors, to answer questions about: • Wills, trusts, and estates • Executor and trustee services • Strategies to balance your priorities and charitable goals

title: Senior Investment Advisor; Senior Portfolio Manager; Noseworthy Wealth Management is led by Stephen Noseworthy, Senior Portfolio Manager and Senior Investment Advisor at TD Wealth Private Investment Advice. A local to the St. John's region, Stephen understands no two people are the same—each carries unique goals and challenges. He develops long-term relationships with clients and their families to help them achieve their vision for their future. In the end, he wants his clients to feel secure and confident that their wealth is working for them, their families and their legacy. He resides in Middle Cove, Newfoundland with his wife Karen and their two children. He is actively involved in various charities in the St. John’s region with TD Wealth Private Investment Advice and TD Canada Trust. title: Associate Portfolio Manager; Senior Investment Advisor; I believe wealth can create complexity on both a personal and financial level, and that the managing of wealth is a deeply personal experience. We help clients manage various aspects of their wealth by simplifying complexity and building detailed investment plans to help guide them through various stages of life. Depending on your needs we can connect you with specialists across TD, including dedicated private banking services, estate and trust planning, business succession, tax planning and philanthropy. I became an Investment Advisor to build long lasting relationships with clients based on a deep level of competency and trust - for one without the other is meaningless. I have a Master's degree in Engineering from Cornell University and a variety of other designations but in truth I think integrity is more important than education. We endeavor to build world class portfolios for clients in a way that we believe, to the very best of our knowledge, will maximize their returns for a given level of risk. We invest in products or securities where we would (and do) put our own money and our family's money. I work with a wide variety of clients from seniors to business owners to foundations. I'm always willing to chat and offer guidance to anyone, even if their intention is never to become a client. Feel free to reach out.; TD Wealth Specialists work with your family and, when required, tax and legal advisors, to answer questions about: • Wills, trusts, and estates • Executor and trustee services • Strategies to balance your priorities and charitable goals

title: Senior Investment Advisor; Steven specializes in simplifying the investment process for his clients. Through a proven process of focusing on Risk Tolerance and Asset Allocation, Steven strives to make his clients feel at ease by having him at the helm. With a clear map, in the form of an Investment Policy Statement (IPS), Steven will help clients navigate through calm and turbulent markets. By combining a fully transparent fee-based approach with customizable and dynamic portfolios, Steven strives to ensure his clients are well-served in their wealth accumulation stage, through their transition to retirement and in their retirement years. Steven also collaborates with TD specialists in other wealth services, including Financial Security Advisors and Tax and Estate Planners, to help ensure clients' wealth priorities are addressed, whether they be retirement or succession planning, asset protection, education funding, or philanthropic in nature. The goal is to ensure clients stay on course to preserve and grow their wealth in the most tax-efficient manner. Steven and his Team take pride in the service which they deliver and are fully committed to their mission of establishing a relationship built on trust. Once achieved, the goal is for clients to feel comfortable knowing that Steven will accompany them in their wealth journey. Born and raised in Montreal, Steven holds a B.Comm from McGill University and also holds the Fellow of CSI (FCSI®) designation. Steven resides in NDG with his children Adam, Nathaniel and Ariel. He loves to play and watch sports of all kinds and can most often be seen running outdoors, golfing and playing tennis. Helping you achieve your vision of success At TD Wealth, we believe that each client’s needs are truly unique. Our goal is to offer you the relevant, customized wealth advice you deserve - and we can do that only by fully understanding you. That's why we take a unique approach to understanding you, your family and your values. Whether your needs are straightforward or complex, we're dedicated to delivering tailored, comprehensive, wealth management strategies that are rooted in your goals. We will stay in tune with your needs and help ensure you're on track to achieve the future you envision for yourself. Discovery Process The distinct discovery process we use will take you through some behaviour questions and how you really make decisions. And when it's all done, a diagnostic using behavioural finance will take all that information, how we can work best with you and what the next steps are in creating your wealth strategy - prioritized by what matters to you. A wealth strategy which manages the important things like your retirement, your kid's education, your family cottage - not just your money.; TD Wealth Specialists work with your family and, when required, tax and legal advisors, to answer questions about: • Wills, trusts, and estates • Executor and trustee services • Strategies to balance your priorities and charitable goals; We do the heavy lifting - liaising with your other professional advisors to help ensure seamless execution in each area of your financial plan.

title: Senior Investment Advisor; As you achieve your life's goals from years of hard work, you may realize that your financial situation is becoming more complex. When you arrive at this stage of life and need professional assistance with wealth and investment management, we can provide our professional advice and services. In addition to managing your investment portfolios, we offer customized wealth advisory services to high net worth clients in collaboration with TD specialists trained in tax, law, estate, insurance and more. This may include: Planning to optimize your wealth from a business sale Intergenerational wealth transfer strategies Multi-jurisdictional families estate planning Strategies to optimize tax efficiency by allocating investment assets to family trusts, holding companies, registered and non-registered accounts Using tax-sheltered insurance policies Creating strategies for charitable gift-giving to your own family foundations well in advance of the actual gifting Prior to being invited to join TD Wealth Private Investment Advice, Susan was an investment and wealth advisor with RBC Dominion Securities where she won the 2008 Best Practice Advisor by DS Advisory Board. Her 25+ years of experience in various roles as a branch manager/ assistant vice president in a Citigroup affiliate in Asia, and also as a private banker and a senior planner with another Canadian bank, gives her a distinct advantage in developing solid client relationships and providing world-class solutions to the more complex needs of her high net worth clients. Susan has obtained prestigious designations of Chartered Investment Manager (CIM®) and Certified Financial Planner (CFP®) as well as completed her LLQP certification on insurance. She is also a Life Insurance Advisor with TD Wealth Insurance Services. She has a graduate degree in MBA in addition to her Bachelor of Science in Architecture. She can fluently speak and write English, Chinese Mandarin, Chinese Fukienese/ Taiwanese, and Tagalog. To help ensure her clients make sound and informed decisions, Susan is passionate about educating her clients about the various choices of investment and wealth strategies available to them. She takes extra time and care with her clients to prevent them from making unsound short-term decisions based on emotions. title: Investment Advisor; A letter from Sze Yee Ling : I believe investing is never just about numbers — it’s about people, families, and the legacies they hope to build. Early in my career as a tax litigator and planner at a Toronto law firm, I worked closely with high and ultrahigh net worth families navigating complex tax and legal challenges. What I came to understand quickly was this: behind every structure, every corporate reorganization, every trust document, there was a family story — with real hopes, tensions, obligations, and long-term aspirations. If you asked me why I transitioned from law into investment advisory, the answer is simple. I wanted to move from solving isolated legal problems to guiding the bigger financial picture. I wanted to stand beside families not only in moments of complexity, but throughout the full arc of their financial lives. I earned my Juris Doctor from the University of Toronto and built my foundation in tax litigation and planning. Today, as an Investment Advisor at TD Wealth Private Investment Advice, I integrate my past experiences and tax expertise into a comprehensive advisory practice dedicated to high-net-worth families - whether their lives are centred in Canada or span multiple jurisdictions. I design customized portfolios using tax-efficient strategies to optimize after-tax returns and help preserve generational wealth. My approach is grounded in discipline and attention to detail — but equally important is ensuring that every decision reflects your family’s values, long-term goals, and vision for the future. True financial stewardship, in my view, is collaborative. I work closely with family members, trustees, and other professional advisors to simplify complex concepts, educate the next generation, and build lasting confidence. Whether navigating market volatility, structuring a reorganization, or planning a legacy, my role is not simply to advise — but to advocate. Outside of work, I value time spent recharging and staying active. I am fortunate to build a life alongside my loving wife and to raise our two sons together. They remind me every day of what truly matters – time, presence, and building something meaningful together.

title: T.J. Marinelli Senior Investment Advisor; Your financial journey is unique, shaped by your experiences and aspirations. My role as a Senior Investment Advisor at TD Wealth Private Investment Advice is to listen first—understanding where you’ve been and where you want to go. Together, we will clarify your financial goals and build a strategy that aligns with your values, helping to ensure confidence in your future. I provide strategic, informed advice tailored to help you: • Grow your wealth with customized investment solutions • Optimize your finances with tax-efficient strategies • Protect your assets from unforeseen risks • Create a lasting legacy through estate planning and philanthropy Since 2007, I have been helping clients build and protect their wealth with personalized financial strategies. With extensive experience in financial planning, investment management, and tax-efficient solutions, I design custom wealth plans tailored to your life goals. I believe that wealth management is not just about investments—it’s about creating a roadmap for your financial well-being, whether you’re growing your wealth, preparing for retirement, or planning your legacy. My approach goes beyond the numbers: I listen, understand, and provide strategies that empower you to make confident financial decisions. I hold the Certified Financial Planner (CFP®) and Fellow of Canadian Securities Institute (FCSI®) designations, representing the highest standards in financial planning and investment management. I am also a Life Insurance Advisor with TD Wealth Insurance Services. Outside of work, I am passionate about giving back to the community and have supported numerous local and national charitable organizations. When not advising clients, I enjoy traveling, golfing, running, and skiing with my wife, two energetic children, and our golden doodle. Let’s start a conversation about your financial future. Connect with me to explore how a customized wealth strategy can help you achieve your goals.; Marinelli Wealth Advisory Group is a part of TD Wealth Private Investment Advice, a division of TD Waterhouse Canada Inc. which is a subsidiary of The Toronto-Dominion Bank.; Senior Investment Advisor

title: Senior Portfolio Manager & Senior Investment Advisor; BACKGROUND | Tamara Bonn is a Senior Portfolio Manager at TD Wealth Private Investment Advice and co-leads The Bonn Gasic Group Wealth Management alongside her husband, Nikola Gasic. With over 15 years of industry experience, she oversees discretionary portfolios for high-net-worth families, corporations, trusts, and charitable foundations, guiding clients through complex financial decisions with a disciplined, long-term approach. Tamara holds the Chartered Financial Analyst (CFA) designation, widely regarded as the global gold standard in investment management. Further, she holds the Chartered Investment Manager (CIM®) designation and has a Bachelor of Business Administration BBA in Finance and Economics from the SFU Beedie School of Business. Her work centers on building diversified portfolios of equities and fixed income designed to grow and protect wealth while managing risk and tax efficiency across market cycles. She collaborates closely with clients and their professional advisors on multi-generational planning, corporate and trust structures, and long-term wealth stewardship. Tamara lives in Victoria with her family and is the proud mother of two boys. She is also actively involved in the local community.

title: Investment Advisor; Thomas's family originates from Vancouver Island, although Thomas was born in Calgary, Alberta. Growing up Thomas lived and attended school in various countries including Mexico and New Zealand. As a result of living abroad, Thomas gained the value and rewards of travel and experiencing different cultures, with a great appreciation for the various perceptions not typically learned from a textbook. After travelling for several years with his family, Thomas returned to Calgary where he attended the University of Calgary, earning a degree in Economics. Upon graduation, Thomas began his career at RBC Dominion Securities in 2000, and in the Spring of 2010 moved to TD Wealth Private Investment Advice. Over the last 22 years as a Senior Investment Advisor, Thomas has built a process that centres on custom portfolio management and has cultivated a team effective at implementing this approach. Thomas and his team focus on a smaller number of clients, developing core relationships based on trust, communication, and an in-depth understanding of each individual's specific needs. Portfolio management is key, and the solutions the team develops are specific to each client. Thomas and his team value communication and strive to maintain consistent contact with every one of their clients. All aspects of Wealth management including financial planning, estate planning and insurance strategies are handled directly by the team and/or working in collaboration with TD specialists where needed. In addition, Thomas also holds the Chartered Investment Manager (CIM®) designation, has completed the Investment Management and Portfolio Management courses, and is licensed to trade both options and derivatives. These extensive qualifications combined with years of industry experience allow him to effectively assess potential opportunities that arise for his clients and provide knowledgeable insight and advice. Outside of the office, Thomas is an avid supporter of several charitable organizations in his community. Thomas also enjoys time outdoors, camping and boating, with his wife and two children. title: Ottawa Branch Timothy Sullivan Investment Advisor; Imagine a future where your financial success fuels not just your present comfort, but also a lasting legacy for generations to come. I believe it starts with an Investment Advisor who sees beyond investments, understanding the very fabric of your aspirations and the life you've worked so diligently to build. As an Investment Advisor holding the Certified Financial Planner designation and with over 20 years of experience, I've witnessed firsthand the profound impact strategic financial planning can have on families. It's about much more than numbers; it’s about preserving your values, securing your family's future, and ensuring a seamless transition of your wealth. I offer tailored strategies designed for your unique goals. This encompasses comprehensive wealth management, sophisticated tax mitigation, and multi-generational planning to help you achieve your vision and build a legacy that endures. I pride myself on honesty, transparency, and straightforward communication, guiding you with precision every step of the way. Away from the office, I actively support my community by coaching in the Nepean Wildcats girls hockey association, while also serving on the Board of Directors as President at the Rideau View Golf Club. I am invested in community connection, which informs the care I deliver to you. Ultimately, I believe your financial well-being is deeply connected to your overall legacy. I'm committed to helping you achieve both. Let's talk about your vision and craft a plan to help make it a lasting reality. Let's work towards building your future, together.; TD Wealth Specialists work with your family and, when required, tax and legal advisors, to answer questions about: • Wills, trusts, and estates • Executor and trustee services • Strategies to balance your priorities and charitable goals; Empowering Polly to achieve financial success When Polly moved to Canada, she was determined to build a great life for her family. title: Senior Investment Advisor; I provide professional wealth management solutions to business owners, entrepreneurs, busy professionals and high net worth individuals to help them achieve their long term investment goals. As an Investment Advisor I have over 15 years of wealth management experience in the Canadian investment industry, and hold a Chartered Investment Manager (CIM®) designation through the Canadian Securities Institute and Certified Financial Planner (CFP®) designation through the FP Canada. I have worked with some of Canada's most affluent investors and alongside some of the country's most prominent investment professionals. This experience has led me to develop creative strategies to help build wealth with a core focus on capital preservation and risk-adjusted returns. At TD Wealth, I have access to some of the best quality solutions that Canada's largest bank has to offer. In collaboration with a team of TD specialists, we can address the full spectrum of wealth management needs, including investment and insurance solutions, estate and retirement planning, trust services, and charitable giving strategies. I believe building a powerful and structured portfolio goes beyond just picking the right stocks, it is also about building a long term strategy and following a disciplined approach to try to avoid unnecessary risk. title: Senior Investment Advisor; Goals-based wealth and investment advice My mission is to combine prudent investment advice with complete, integrated, thoughtful financial planning. As a Certified Financial Planner (CFP®) designation holder, I have extensive knowledge of goals-based wealth planning, which is driven by your unique needs and objectives. Working closely with a network of TD specialists , I also provide access to sophisticated expertise as needed in areas such as insurance (to prepare for life’s unexpected bumps), tax margin strategies (to help you keep more of your capital), and estate planning (to help you create your desired legacy). In today’s complex world, the advanced expertise and resources of TD Bank Group can help you maximize your financial future. I begin by helping you to articulate what matters most , what motivates you and what pains you. Then I take steps to address your most urgent needs first. I help my clients get to know themselves better to invest smarter. Not all people want a complex 25-page financial plan, they may simply want to address a specific goal such as knowing “Will I be okay? Will my money last as long as I do?” My role is to work closely with them to provide meaningful answers and strategies. What sets me apart? A broader view .
