title: Senior Investment Advisor; Senior Portfolio Manager; For over 15 years I have worked for investors providing guidance on income and growth financial strategies, retirement and estate planning strategies. I have learned what matters most to you may go well beyond the investment discussion. Our team and I specialize in helping our valued clients like you further explore the following wealth considerations: 1) Building net worth 2) Protecting what matters most 3) Provide tax efficient advice 4) Leaving a legacy Our team brings together specialists in the areas of Insurance, Estate Planning and Tax strategies to address all areas of your financial strategy. My process: Discovery Understanding your whole picture is the first step towards creating a financial strategy designed with the purpose of meeting your unique expectations now and in the future. Build a Financial Strategy Once we understand who you are as an investor and what your long-term objectives are, we can form a financial strategy designed to meet your objective. Monitor and Adjust I am committed to continuously monitor and adjust your financial strategy as changes occur. These changes may be in Financial Markets but also may be changes to your personal situation. The world is different today and so your portfolio needs to evolve to reflect the changes that are occurring. My credentials include: CFA Charterholder (CFA®) - The gold standard among global investment industries, focused on global investment knowledge, professional standards and ethics. Certified Financial Planner (CFP®) - Recognized internationally for excellence in financial planning. Certificate in Retirement Strategy – Ensures the knowledge needed to help you determine and then meet your retirement planning goals. Discretionary Portfolio Management You will receive objective client focused advice, effective risk management, and our best execution and implementation of portfolio strategies. About me: My wife and I love creating new dishes in our top chef kitchen. Our ingredients are freshly handpicked from our home garden of basil and heirloom tomatoes. Together we have two children, Isabella (16) and Francesco (12). Both are blue belts in Karate. Isabella is enjoying Boxing classes and Frankie is a talented rising soccer star. Isabella and Francesco love playing with our family dog (6 yr. old Keeshond) named Ema. During the Winter we head up to the mountains to ski, and in the Summer we like to go camping and hiking as much as possible.; TD Wealth Specialists work with your family and, when required, tax and legal advisors, to answer questions about: • Wills, trusts, and estates • Executor and trustee services • Strategies to balance your priorities and charitable goals

title: Senior Portfolio Manager & Senior Investment Advisor; With 16 years of financial services and investment experience, I am actively focused on providing comprehensive wealth management solutions to individuals and families, estates & trusts, and charitable and business organizations. As a Senior Portfolio Manager with TD Wealth Private Investment Advice, I provide a high level of personalized service for my clients. As a member of TD Wealth Private Investment Advice, I work with a talented group of colleagues and have complete access to their expertise and the resources of TD Wealth and TD Bank Group. My role is to create a fully integrated and comprehensive plan for my clients, by ensuring that the appropriate specialists are brought in when required, to apply their specialized knowledge to a particular situation. This can range from investment management, to estate planning, and to credit and insurance needs. This collaboration is crucial to my clients' evolving needs from the accumulation of wealth to the preservation and transitioning of their wealth through every stage of their life. I hold a Bachelor of Business Administration degree from the University of Regina, the Certified Financial Planner (CFP®) and the Chartered Investment Manager (CIM®) designations, and I am a Chartered Financial Analyst (CFA®) charterholder. Outside work, I'm involved with the CFA Society of Victoria, as well as a member of the CFA Institute. Most importantly I enjoy spending time outdoors with my wife, son and two dogs. title: Associate Portfolio Manager; Senior Investment Advisor; A letter from Vicky Liu : Investing is a lifelong journey. Every story of yours matters to me. Throughout my career in the financial field, I’ve seen individuals navigate significant market downturns that impacted their retirement savings, as well as major life transitions that brought both emotional challenges and financial strain. If you asked me why I decided to become an Investment Advisor, the answer is simple - with all my experience, expertise, network and most importantly my understanding of people's unique values and goals, I want to stand by each of my clients as they embark upon their unique financial journeys. I want to ensure they are never alone and are always provided with care. As I always start my client relationship by listening to your story, here is a bit of mine: I graduated from the University of Toronto with a Bachelor of Business Administration degree. I hold both the Chartered Financial Analyst (CFA®), and the Chartered Professional Accountant (CPA) designations. In 2011, I began my career in the financial services industry in Toronto. Since then, I've enjoyed every moment working in this fast-paced yet inspiring industry. As an Associate Portfolio Manager and Senior Investment Advisor at TD Wealth Private Investment Advice, I provide highly personalized investment strategies tailored to each client’s unique objectives. I construct customized portfolios across equities, fixed income, and alternative investments within an open architecture platform, allowing for broad diversification across asset classes. Where appropriate, I incorporate risk management and hedging strategies designed to help mitigate volatility and preserve long-term capital. Working with TD specialists, I also provide wealth management services, including long term retirement planning, efficient tax strategies, and multi-generation estate planning strategies. My goal is to ensure that every aspect of a client's financial life is aligned, intentional, and forward-looking. Outside of work, I enjoy an active and adventurous lifestyle - boxing, scuba diving and playing the drums keep me energized. I also treasure spending time with my family, whether exploring the outdoors or just sharing everyday moments with them. Seeing my daughter's smile is a daily reminder of what truly matters.
persona_summary: As a TD Wealth Investment Advisor in Toronto I’ll work with you to design a unique and personalized investment and wealth plan. Contact me today.

title: Senior Investment Advisor; With over 20 years of experience as a Senior Investment Advisor with TD Wealth Private Investment Advice and Financial Planner with TD Wealth Financial Planning, Vicki brings a profound understanding of the wealth planning landscape to the table. Vicki's commitment is clear: to protect and nurture the achievements in life with tailored solutions that are thoughtfully designed for the distinct phases of your life, and to help you unveil the intrinsic value behind your personal vision of success and the things that truly matter to you. Vicki is a graduate of the University of Victoria, and in January 2000 became one of the first women in Canada to hold the Certified Financial Planner (CFP®) designation. At the heart of Vicki's approach is a genuine commitment to engagement. She builds a personalized wealth plan for each client, and through regular reviews and an unwavering commitment to trustworthiness and her clients' well-being, Vicki provides guidance to help her clients achieve their long-term investment and retirement goals. Moreover, Vicki collaborates with TD specialists in areas of Tax and Estate Planning, Insurance, High Net Worth Strategies, and Philanthropic services as needed to provide a comprehensive range of expertise. Vicki's commitment goes beyond just numbers; it's about creating an emotional connection with her clients. Vicki takes a holistic approach, and values the human element in wealth planning. She works to build a deep and meaningful connection with each person she works with, making her the ideal collaborator for those who want their wealth planning journey to be guided by care and empathy.; TD Wealth Specialists work with your family and, when required, tax and legal advisors, to answer questions about: • Wills, trusts, and estates • Executor and trustee services • Strategies to balance your priorities and charitable goals

title: Associate Portfolio Manager; Senior Investment Advisor; Vincent joined the team in September 2012 to focus on client relationship management, business development and developing and executing investment strategies for our discretionary and non-discretionary client portfolios. Before joining LSBB Family Office, Vincent worked with Invesco Trimark as a Regional Associate, focusing on business development and client servicing. Prior to that, he held positions in equity research and business development at alternative asset managers in Toronto specializing in equity market neutral and long/short investment strategies. Vincent holds the Certified Financial Planner (CFP®), Chartered Investment Manager (CIM®), and Fellow of CSI (FCSI®) designations. The FCSI® is the pinnacle achievement in the Canadian financial services industry. He has obtained his options and derivatives license, has over 11 years of experience in the investment industry, and he is also a Life Insurance Advisor with TD Wealth Insurance Services. He has also completed the Certificate in Retirement Strategy. He received a Bachelor of Arts degree (Political Science, Minor in Management Studies) from the University of Waterloo.

title: Portfolio Manager & Investment Advisor; Mr. Vy Nguyen is the Portfolio Manager with The Nguyen Pelletier Group at TD Wealth Private Investment Advice. He is a wealth management veteran with over 33 years of experience, including wealth management, financial planning, coaching, and leading high-performing teams of investment professionals. He has used this experience to help his clients achieve better results for themselves and their families. He holds the Chartered Investment Manager (CIM®) designation from the Canadian Securities Institute (CSI), the Financial Planner designation from the Institut québécois de planification financière (IQPF), and a Master of Business Administration (MBA) from the Université de Sherbrooke. For the past 16 years, Vy has advised and provided portfolio management services to high-net-worth individuals and their families for Canadian and European private banks and wealth management firms. He is recognized by his peers as an excellent communicator. He has led financial education seminars and presentations to communities across Quebec. Vy has a very positive attitude and is a solutions-oriented individual. He has been involved in his community for many years and has served on the boards of numerous charitable organizations. Vy now sits on the boards of the Montreal Museum of Fine Arts Foundation and the Collège Sainte-Anne Foundation. Vy has a lifelong passion for the visual arts. He is the ambassador for the TD Wealth Art Collection and promotes the collection's unique attributes to the community. On a personal note, Vy is the father of three beautiful children and participates in numerous sports throughout the year, including alpine skiing and triathlon. For him, it is important to share his values with his clients: family, health, and integrity. The Nguyen Pelletier Group is part of TD Wealth Private Investment Advice, a division of TD Waterhouse Canada Inc. which is a subsidiary of The Toronto-Dominion Bank.; Putting finances into perspective As small business owners, Nick and Justina make a powerhouse team, supporting each other through ups and downs. title: Senior Investment Advisor; Portfolio Manager; Wade has over a decade of industry experience and pride in offering exceptional client service. He has a passion for guiding affluent families in the efficient structuring of their wealth, using tailored planning strategies and prudent portfolio management. Wade's extensive education and experience in wealth planning for families, business owners, and professionals allows him to address virtually all their financial needs. From retirement planning, estate planning strategies, risk management, investment, and taxation strategies, Wade works with clients to ensure their needs and concerns are addressed and a plan is in place to efficiently accomplish their goals. Wade holds an advanced diploma in Financial Planning from Centennial College and a diploma in Financial Planning from The Canadian Institute of Financial Planning. He is also a Life Insurance Advisor with TD Wealth Insurance Services. Wade holds the following designations: Certified Financial Planner (CFP®), Chartered Investment Manager (CIM®), Certified International Wealth Manager (CIWM), and Registered Retirement Consultant (RRC®). As an Associate Portfolio Manager, he frees clients from having to make investment decisions while maintaining a portfolio they understand and are comfortable with. The CIWM is an advanced internationally recognized designation for experienced professionals. One of the highest designations for integrated wealth management planning around the world. Having earned these designations, Wade has the comprehensive knowledge and experience required to advise clients on sophisticated retirement and investment management strategies and discuss complex estate and tax planning strategies. Wade volunteers his time as an active member on the board of directors for the Gilda's Club of Simcoe Muskoka. Outside of work, he is usually studying to advance his knowledge and keep on top of leading industry opportunities for clients. Wade and his wife have three children and are actively involved in local conservation organizations, often attending fundraising events and as members of a local conservation group. They enjoy spending their time outdoors, hiking, swimming, gardening, and camping.; TD Wealth Specialists work with your family and, when required, tax and legal advisors, to answer questions about: • Wills, trusts, and estates • Executor and trustee services • Strategies to balance your priorities and charitable goals

title: Senior Portfolio Manager & Senior Investment Advisor; With 25+ years of financial services and investment experience, I am actively focused on providing comprehensive wealth management solutions to individuals and families, estates & trusts, and charitable and business organizations. As a Portfolio Manager with TD Wealth Private Investment Advice, I provide a high level of personalized service for my clients. As a member of TD Wealth, I work with a talented group of colleagues and have complete access to their expertise and the resources of the various TD Wealth and TD Bank Group teams. My role is to create a fully integrated and comprehensive plan for my clients, by ensuring that the appropriate specialists are brought in when required, to apply their expertise to a particular situation. This can range from investment management, to estate planning, and to credit and insurance needs. This collaboration is crucial to my client's evolving needs from the accumulation of wealth to the preservation and transitioning of their wealth through every stage of their life. I hold designations including the Chartered Financial Analyst designation and I am a member in good standing of the Chartered Financial Analyst Institute and the CFA Society in Ottawa. I hold three industry designations: Certified Financial Planner (CFP®), Canadian Investment Manager (CIM) and Fellow of the Canadian Securities Institute. I have completed the Canadian Securities Course and I am a licensed Portfolio Manager in both Ontario and Quebec. Outside work, I enjoy spending time with my wonderful family. I have fun pretending to be a farmer on a family farm that has been in my family for generations. My Community involvement includes the United Way, the Terry Fox run, The Royal Ottawa and I was a volunteer for the Ottawa Hospital Finance and Audit Committee.; Putting finances into perspective As small business owners, Nick and Justina make a powerhouse team, supporting each other through ups and downs. title: Senior Investment Advisor; For over 30 years, Wendy has helped individuals and families achieve their financial objectives by developing goal-oriented, integrated wealth management strategies. She earned her Financial Management Advisor (FMA) designation in 2005, and has been an Investment Advisor with TD Wealth Private Investment Advice since 1994. Prior to joining TD Wealth she headed up Asian Private Banking at the Bank of Montreal, and before that she was a professional currency trader. Wendy graduated from the University of Guelph with majors in Economics and Business Management. Wendy is passionate about educating girls and women about finance. In addition to the many events she hosts focusing on financial literacy, she also sponsors girls’ education in the developing world, and currently serves on the Boards of a private school and The Giving Foundation. When she is not working or volunteering, Wendy pursues her love for cooking, fine food, travel and reading. Wendy was born in Shanghai, grew up in Hong Kong and immigrated to Canada in 1979.; Implementing Tax Efficient Strategies You’ve worked hard to accumulate your wealth and we want to help you make the most of it. title: William MacLean Senior Portfolio Manager; Senior Investment Advisor; At TD Wealth, we believe that each client’s needs are truly unique. Our goal is to offer you the relevant, customized wealth advice you deserve - and we can do that only by fully understanding you. That’s why we take the time to understand you, your family and your values. Whether your needs are straightforward or complex, we’re dedicated to delivering tailored, comprehensive, wealth management strategies that are rooted in your goals. We will stay in tune with your needs and help ensure you’re on track to achieve the future you envision for yourself. As an Investment Advisor, my mandate is to help you preserve and grow your wealth though tailored investment solutions. Dedication to exceptional client experiences and innovative financial strategies are the foundations of our business. I will deliver proactive and personal advice, working closely with you to make key decisions about your portfolio that are in line with your goals. As a Portfolio Manager, I understand the unique needs of High-Net-Worth individuals and families. I can provide investment offerings that are supported by the high caliber and rigour that TD Asset Management Inc. uses with pension funds and foundations. I am committed to building a relationship with trust and confidence and can provide you with access to specialists across TD. I have been providing my clients with tailored wealth management solutions since 1987. My team with MacLean Wealth Management Group advises affluent investors – including professionals, business owners and retirees. We focus on leveraging our deep knowledge and genuine concern for our clients' well-being to foster long-term relationships, provide a meaningful wealth experience, build comprehensive risk-managed plans and aim to protect and grow your wealth in a tax efficient manner. When I’m not engaging with clients, I like to spend time with my family, friends, and my two rescue cats Greg and Archie. I also enjoy playing hockey, golf and biking. title: Investment Advisor; Bond and income strategies for conservative affluent investors Since 2006, high net worth retirees, families, companies and other affluent investors interested in preserving their wealth while generating income have been turning to MacMillan Executive Wealth Management Group for investment advice. Leveraging our deep insight and decades of experience, we help clients with investable assets of at least $2 million craft customized multigenerational portfolios based on their investment objectives and risk tolerance. With our emphasis on income investing and our particular expertise in bond strategies, we can help conservative clients and their families benefit from a steady stream of tax-efficient dividend and interest payments through fluctuating market cycles. Strategies that can stand the test of time We work hard to align your portfolio with your financial goals . Led by Bill MacMillan, Senior Vice President and Investment Advisor with more than 30 years of experience in the equity and bonds markets, we strive to develop portfolios that help investors preserve their wealth. Dividends and interest are our major focus . Markets go up and markets go down, with long dry spells for both stock and bond prices. We focus on dividend-paying equities and high-quality government and corporate bonds, and apply laddering strategies to those bonds, paying keen attention to maturity dates to help us maximize yields. Even when the markets weren’t doing well, our clients received dividends – it’s like the companies we invested in payed us rent while we waited for capital appreciation. Regular cash payments year in and year out can help compensate for weak stock market performance and low bond yields. This strategy simply makes sense for conservative investors who want to help preserve their wealth so they can leave a legacy, while avoiding big swings in the value of their portfolio. We favour an active approach to portfolio construction and are constantly identifying new opportunities to improve returns. Portfolios are diversified globally and across all asset classes and typically include a mix of both international and domestic securities consisting of equities, funds and bonds. Choose your level of involvement Your needs and preferences will help determine the most appropriate type of account for you. You can invest on a discretionary basis, where you entrust your investment decisions to our team, or a non-discretionary basis, where you take the reins and we call you for approval of each buy or sell in your account. The TD Premier Managed Portfolio Program is a separately-managed discretionary account that provides our clients with access to 20 world-class investment managers and over 60 investment strategies, covering a wide array of asset classes and investment styles. It frees you to focus on your priorities while your investments are managed by a team of top money managers. The TD Cornerstone Program is a full-service brokerage, non-discretionary, fee-for-service solution. As opposed to transactional accounts, where each transaction is paid for individually, with this fee-based account, you only pay an amount based on your fee-eligible assets. Cornerstone clients can benefit from the combination of full-service investment advice and wealth planning, the ability to approve every trade, and fee transparency and predictability. Access a broad spectrum of expertise Our team is also committed to helping you prepare for life’s contingencies by offering access to a full range of wealth planning services through TD specialists . From tax and estate planning, to insurance, to business succession planning strategies, we help provide the direction and support you require to anticipate and help meet your family’s future needs. We will also work with your older and younger family members to help ensure that we provide multigenerational strategies. MacMillan Executive Wealth Management Group is a part of TD Wealth Private Investment Advice, a division of TD Waterhouse Canada Inc., which is a subsidiary of The Toronto-Dominion Bank.; TD Wealth Specialists work with your family and, when required, tax and legal advisors, to answer questions about: • Wills, trusts, and estates • Executor and trustee services • Strategies to balance your priorities and charitable goals; Empowering Polly to achieve financial success When Polly moved to Canada, she was determined to build a great life for her family. title: Associate Portfolio Manager & Investment Advisor; As an Associate Portfolio Manager with TD Wealth Private Investment Advice, I support my team providing comprehensive wealth management services to high-net-worth individuals, foundations, not-for-profit organizations, and trusts. Our clientele includes senior executives (CEOs, CFOs), legal and medical professionals, entrepreneurs, business owners, lottery winners, beneficiaries of large inheritances, and trustees. At TD Wealth Private Investment Advice, we are committed to gaining a deep understanding of each client’s unique priorities and financial objectives. This enables us to create tailored investment strategies that align with their individual goals. By leveraging applied behavioral finance, we identify potential financial blind spots and work with clients to improve decision-making and optimize outcomes. Our services are underpinned by the same rigorous methodologies that TD Asset Management applies when managing assets for pension funds and foundations. We aim to deliver superior risk-adjusted returns while providing comprehensive wealth strategies focused on building net worth, implementing tax-efficient solutions, safeguarding assets, and establishing a lasting legacy.

title: Investment Advisor; Yen is an Investment Advisor with TD Wealth Private Investment Advice and holds the Certified Financial Planner (CFP®) designation, bringing a strong foundation in entrepreneurship and multigenerational wealth planning to his role. His involvement in business management began at age 16, supporting his family’s enterprise after immigrating from Hong Kong. With parents who faced language barriers and limited familiarity with the Canadian financial and tax landscape, he gained early exposure to business operations and tax planning, shaping his long-term professional focus. Throughout his career, Yen has specialized in working with business owners and professional corporations, collaborating closely with accountants and legal advisors to help develop coordinated, tax-efficient strategies. He also supports high-net-worth families, in collaboration with TD specialists, through all stages of wealth planning, including asset accumulation, retirement planning, and estate planning, with a focus on long-term continuity and generational wealth. Fluent in English, French, and Cantonese, Yen works effectively with clients from diverse cultural and linguistic backgrounds, helping ensure clarity and confidence in complex financial discussions. Yen is known for his collaborative approach and ability to translate complex concepts into practical strategies aligned with clients’ goals. His experience as a competitive athlete in football, basketball, and baseball from high school through university has shaped his disciplined, team-oriented mindset. Outside of work, Yen is a devoted husband and father who values family life. I manage investments for my clients who range from individual and families to privately held corporations and charitable organizations in a disciplined, comprehensive and highly personalized process. I leverage the expertise of a highly skilled team of wealth professionals within TD Wealth. I have a sound working knowledge of financial planning and taxation that come from years of counseling using an integrated approach to wealth management. I have over 25 years working in various facets of the investment and financial industry. I obtained the Chartered Professional Accountant (CPA, CA) designation in 1991 and the Chartered Financial Analyst® designation in 1996. In 2005 I achieved the designation of Certified Financial Planner. I graduated from University of Western Ontario with a Bachelor of Arts in Finance and Economics in 1988. title: Portfolio Manager & Investment Advisor; Prior pursuing my passion in wealth management, I was a business owner of a bakery facility and a tea house in Richmond where I managed and improved front-line client experience and corporate finance. Thereafter, I joined TD in 2010 and was recognized as one of the top Mutual Fund Investment Representatives in 2012. I was quickly promoted to a managerial role where I managed one of the top TD Canada Trust branches in Vancouver. In 2013, my branch was recognized as one of the Top 5 branches in B.C.. "My Passion is to help you achieve what truly matters to you" I hold a Chartered Financial Analyst® (CFA®) designation and is a member of the CFA® Institute and CFA® Vancouver Society . Having the CFA® designation means I, as your Portfolio Manager, can speak the same language as our analysts – it gives me a great understanding of the industry, the markets, and specifically how they affect you as an affluent investor. I believe that many successful business owners are looking for a higher level of service and dedication from their portfolio manager. I also know from experience that there’s no such thing as a cookie-cutter approach to meeting the needs of a client like you, and I am not a mind reader — which is why I spend a lot of time on the discovery process so I can learn what’s most important to you, right now. I see my role as not only managing your investments but as “How do I help you through other life events?” – that means helping you access whatever resources you need, when you need them.

title: Senior Investment Advisor; Associate Portfolio Manager; As the daughter of a father from a military family and an entrepreneurial mother from a multi-generational business family, (Yueh Chun) Judy's distinctive family background has played a strong role in defining her character, values and beliefs. These include self-discipline, creativity, trust and most importantly, putting her clients first! These values and upbringing have helped Judy build an excellent reputation and background in the Wealth Management industry. Since 2008, Judy has enjoyed a career in wealth management and thrives on helping clients with investment and financial decisions. She decided to pursue a professional career as an Investment Advisor after seeing many families, both affluent and of modest wealth, struggle with complicated financial challenges and a lack of knowledge with which to address them. Prior to joining TD Wealth Private Investment Advice, Judy spent many years at RBC Dominion Securities within their International Division. With her many years of experience working with domestic and international affluent clients, Judy has built many connections in North America and the Asia Pacific. Judy recognizes that, despite cultural differences, clients have similar end goals in terms of their financial well-being but seek tailored solutions from their advisor. With her "client goals-based philosophy" as her focus, Judy has built a successful business model by understanding her client's needs and delivering a strong wealth management discipline. This helps to build and protect client's wealth while maintaining maximum tax efficiency. Judy has also developed strong working relationships with other like-minded professionals dedicated to providing the most comprehensive solutions for her client’s needs. Judy and her team are capable of servicing clients speaking English, Mandarin, Cantonese and Taiwanese. Judy holds the Chartered Investment Manager (CIM®) designation, a Bachelor of Science degree (Applied Economic), Minor in Business with Finance Option, and is a licensed Life Insurance Advisor with TD Wealth Insurance Services. She is constantly completing wealth management courses to keep pace with industry trends and professional development. Judy is an avid traveler and enjoys exploring the world and immersing herself in different cultures with her husband Frank. When they are in Vancouver, they enjoy spending time working on their home and exploring the beautiful city.

title: Welcome to Healey Walker Wealth Advisory Group; Senior Portfolio Manager & Senior Investment Advisor; As a Senior Portfolio Manager and Senior Investment Advisor with TD Wealth Private Investment Advice, I work with high‑net‑worth individuals and families to deliver personalized investment and wealth management strategies. My practice focuses on long‑term financial planning, including retirement income planning, tax‑efficient strategies, and estate planning considerations, tailored to each client’s objectives and risk profile. Daciana and I lead Healey Walker Wealth Advisory Group in Vancouver, supported by a knowledgeable team and access to TD specialists who contribute investment, tax, insurance, and estate planning insights. Together, we provide coordinated wealth management services for executives, professionals, business owners, pre‑retirees, retirees, and families seeking disciplined, risk‑aware portfolio strategies. Our approach follows a structured, client‑focused process: understanding priorities, developing a personalized portfolio, implementing a comprehensive wealth plan, and ongoing monitoring with regular communication to help clients stay aligned with their goals as circumstances evolve. I have worked in the investment industry since 1996 and hold multiple professional designations, including FMA (Financial Management Advisor), EPC (Elder Planning Counselor), CDFS (Chartered Financial Divorce Specialist ), CFP® (Certified Financial Planner®), CIM® (The Chartered Investment Manager), FCSI® (Fellow of the Canadian Securities Institute), and others supporting specialized planning needs. I am also a Life Insurance Advisor with TD Wealth Insurance Services.; Healey Walker Wealth Advisory Group is a part of TD Wealth Private Investment Advice, a division of TD Waterhouse Canada Inc. which is a subsidiary of The Toronto-Dominion Bank.
